jobs.title: Futures User Operations 合约专业用户运营
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is the world's largest Universal Exchange (UEX), serving over 125 million users and offering access to over 2M crypto tokens, 100+ tokenized stocks, ETFs, commodities, FX, and precious metals such as gold. The ecosystem is committed to helping users trade smarter with its AI agent, which co-pilots trade execution.


Bitget is driving crypto adoption through strategic partnerships with LALIGA and MotoGP™. Aligned with its global impact strategy, Bitget has joined hands with UNICEF to support blockchain education for 1.1 million people by 2027. Bitget currently leads in the tokenized TradFi market, providing the industry's lowest fees and highest liquidity across 150 regions worldwide.


What you'll do


  •  Trading Experience Enhancement：
  • Conduct regular competitor research and user interviews; segment retail users and professional traders, and drive the implementation of solutions addressing core pain points and trading experience requirements.
  • Futures Product Operations：
  • Collaborate with the Product team to research competitor products and internal product user journeys; identify product gaps and drive implementation to enhance product competitiveness.
  • TradFi Futures Operations：
  • Identify market hotspots across TradFi assets, including precious metals, commodities, and U.S. equities; collaborate on the listing and delisting evaluation of TradFi futures/contracts, and support promotional campaigns around trending market opportunities.


What you'll need


  • More than 3 years of experience in operations or product roles at mainstream exchanges or traditional securities brokerage firms.
  • Deep understanding of futures/derivatives trading logic, with knowledge of professional futures traders’ user profiles and needs.
  • Strong understanding of TradFi assets, including precious metals, commodities, and equities.
  • Strong data analysis skills, with the ability to identify issues from trading data and drive decision-making.
  • Fluent in spoken English and able to use English as a working language.


岗位职责：

  • 交易体验提升：
  • 定期开展竞品调研与用户访谈，散户与专业交易者分层，推动核心痛点和交易体验需求落地；
  • 合约产品运营：
  • 与产品团队协作，调研竞品和本所产品路径，识别产品短板推动落地，提升产品竞争力；
  • TradFi合约运营：
  • 识别贵金属、大宗商品、美股热等TraFi资产热点，协同Tradfi合约上下币评估和活动热点宣发；


任职要求：

  • 主流交易所或传统券商运营/产品3 年以上经验。
  • 深入理解合约交易逻辑，了解合约专业用户画像及需求。
  • 对 TradFi 资产（贵金属/大宗商品/股票） 有深入理解。
  • 较强数据分析能力，能从交易数据中发现问题并驱动决策。
  • 英语口语可作为工作语言。


Why Bitget?

  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!


If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


For more information regarding candidates' personal data processing, please refer to Bitget Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Financial Risk Control Product Manager 金融风控产品（专家）
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is the world's largest Universal Exchange (UEX), serving over 125 million users and offering access to over 2M crypto tokens, 100+ tokenized stocks, ETFs, commodities, FX, and precious metals such as gold. The ecosystem is committed to helping users trade smarter with its AI agent, which co-pilots trade execution.


Bitget is driving crypto adoption through strategic partnerships with LALIGA and MotoGP™. Aligned with its global impact strategy, Bitget has joined hands with UNICEF to support blockchain education for 1.1 million people by 2027. Bitget currently leads in the tokenized TradFi market, providing the industry's lowest fees and highest liquidity across 150 regions worldwide.


What you'll do


  • Responsible for the daily management and optimization of the exchange’s financial parameters. Use quantitative analysis to drive refined adjustments of core parameters such as margin requirements, leverage, and limits, improving user experience and platform competitiveness while keeping risks under control.
  • Conduct daily inspections of platform-wide parameters, including margin rates, maintenance margin rates, maximum leverage, position limits, and funding rates. Provide optimization recommendations based on market changes and drive implementation.
  • Regularly analyze liquidation data to identify trading pairs and user segments with high risk of negative equity / socialized loss. Deliver improvement proposals, such as increasing margin requirements, reducing leverage, or limiting positions.
  • Build a dynamic parameter adjustment model based on multi-dimensional indicators such as market volatility, liquidity depth, and position concentration, enabling automated or semi-automated parameter tuning.


What you'll need


  • More than 5 years of finance-related experience, including at least 3 years of risk control or trading experience at a centralized cryptocurrency exchange (CEX).
  • Trader experience is preferred. Candidates should have personal trading experience in crypto or traditional financial markets, either manually or quantitatively.
  • Familiar with the risk characteristics of cryptocurrency derivatives, including perpetual futures, delivery futures, and options, as well as the operating mechanisms of exchanges.
  • Experience in the risk control team of a top 3 major cryptocurrency exchange is preferred.


岗位职责：

  • 负责交易所金融参数的日常管理与优化，通过定量分析驱动保证金、杠杆、限额等核心参数的精细化调校，在风险可控的前提下提升用户体验与平台竞争力。
  • 每日巡检全平台保证金率、维持保证金率、杠杆上限、持仓限额、资金费率等参数，结合市场变化提出调优建议并推动落地。
  • 定期分析爆仓数据，识别高穿仓风险币对和用户群，输出改进建议（提升保证金率/降低杠杆/限制持仓）。
  • 建立基于市场波动率、流动性深度、持仓集中度等多维指标的参数动态调整模型，实现参数自动/半自动调校。


任职要求：

  • 5年以上金融相关经验，3年以上加密货币交易所（CEX）风控或交易经验
  • 有交易员经验优先，自己做过币圈/传统金融交易（手动或量化均可）
  • 熟悉加密货币衍生品（永续合约、交割合约、期权）的风险特征和交易所运作机制
  • top3大所的风控团队优先。


Why Bitget?

  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!


If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


For more information regarding candidates' personal data processing, please refer to Bitget Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Financial Product Manager  金融产品经理（专家）
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is the world's largest Universal Exchange (UEX), serving over 125 million users and offering access to over 2M crypto tokens, 100+ tokenized stocks, ETFs, commodities, FX, and precious metals such as gold. The ecosystem is committed to helping users trade smarter with its AI agent, which co-pilots trade execution.


Bitget is driving crypto adoption through strategic partnerships with LALIGA and MotoGP™. Aligned with its global impact strategy, Bitget has joined hands with UNICEF to support blockchain education for 1.1 million people by 2027. Bitget currently leads in the tokenized TradFi market, providing the industry's lowest fees and highest liquidity across 150 regions worldwide.


What you'll do


  • Responsible for the product design of the core underlying trading risk-control mechanisms of the exchange. Lead the rule design, iteration, and optimization of key modules, including the margin model, liquidation engine, Auto-Deleveraging (ADL), and insurance fund.
  • The business scope covers traditional cryptocurrency futures/contracts as well as new products such as Stock Tokens and stock perpetual contracts. The role requires a strong understanding of the underlying mechanisms of derivatives and the ability to translate them into executable product solutions, including PRDs, rule tables, and acceptance criteria. Work closely with quantitative, risk control, and engineering teams to turn risk models from formulas into productized solutions.


What you'll need


  • More than 5 years of experience as a financial product manager, including at least 3 years of experience in trading product design at a centralized cryptocurrency exchange (CEX). Experience with futures/contracts or derivatives products is required.
  • Deep understanding of trading risk-control mechanisms, with the ability to clearly explain the complete logic flow of the three major modules: margin, liquidation, and ADL. This means not merely being familiar with these concepts, but being able to draw state machines and identify design pitfalls in edge cases.
  • Strong quantitative and data analysis capabilities. Proficient in using SQL to independently retrieve and analyze data, and able to use Excel/Google Sheets to build and simulate parameter models. Automation can be promoted later, but during the product design phase, the candidate must be able to manually validate the logic.
  • Strong understanding of trading, with personal trading experience in the crypto market, particularly in futures/contracts and/or margin trading.
  • Experience at a top 3 major cryptocurrency exchange is preferred.


岗位职责：

  • 负责交易所核心交易风控底层机制的产品设计，主导保证金模型、强制平仓引擎、自动减仓（ADL）、保险基金等关键模块的规则设计与迭代优化。
  • 业务范围覆盖传统加密货币合约及新型股票代币（Stock Token）/股票永续合约。需要既懂衍生品底层机制、又能落地成可执行的产品方案（PRD + 规则表 + 验收标准），与量化、风控、研发紧密协作，把风险模型从公式变成产品。


任职要求：

  • 5年以上金融产品经理经验，其中3年以上加密货币交易所（CEX）交易产品设计经验，必须有合约/衍生品产品经历.
  • 对交易风控机制有深层理解，能清晰解释保证金、强平、ADL 三大模块的完整逻辑链路——不是"知道有这几个概念"，而是能画出状态机并指出边界 case 的设计陷阱
  • 有量化和数据能力，熟练使用 SQL 自主取数分析，能用 Excel/Google Sheets 做参数表建模和推演（后续可推动自动化，但产品阶段必须能手工验证逻辑）
  • 懂交易自己在币圈做过交易（合约/杠杆）
  • top3的大所经历优先。


Why Bitget?

  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!


If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


For more information regarding candidates' personal data processing, please refer to Bitget Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: P2P Risk & Control Specialist P2P风控
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is the world's largest Universal Exchange (UEX), serving over 125 million users and offering access to over 2M crypto tokens, 100+ tokenized stocks, ETFs, commodities, FX, and precious metals such as gold. The ecosystem is committed to helping users trade smarter with its AI agent, which co-pilots trade execution.


Bitget is driving crypto adoption through strategic partnerships with LALIGA and MotoGP™. Aligned with its global impact strategy, Bitget has joined hands with UNICEF to support blockchain education for 1.1 million people by 2027. Bitget currently leads in the tokenized TradFi market, providing the industry's lowest fees and highest liquidity across 150 regions worldwide.


What you'll do


  • Monitor C2C (OTC) transactions in real time, identify and handle suspicious trading patterns (structured transactions, abnormal high-frequency activity, large transactions from new users), and manually review triggered orders to assess counterparty risk levels.
  • Lead the end-to-end emergency response for judicially frozen U-merchant / user bank accounts, covering evidence collection, bank communication, law enforcement coordination, and account unfreeze follow-up, while building a case archive to continuously optimize risk control rules.
  • Execute AML compliance requirements, identify and report Suspicious Transaction Reports (STRs), and track regulatory policy changes to ensure all business operations remain within the compliance framework.
  • Utilize on-chain analysis tools (Etherscan, OKLink, MistTrack, etc.) to trace USDT fund sources and identify contaminated addresses, intercepting tainted deposits before they reach user accounts to reduce freeze incident rates.
  • Continuously iterate risk control rule engines based on transaction data and historical cases, and produce weekly/monthly risk reports to analyze risk trends and provide strategic recommendations.
  • Collaborate with the customer service team to handle user complaints and disputes, and establish and maintain communication channels with banks and law enforcement agencies.


What you'll need


  • Bachelor's degree or above; Finance, Law, Economics, or Computer Science preferred
  • 3+ years in risk control / compliance; at least 1 year in crypto OTC or payment industry risk control
  • Native Chinese; ability to read English on-chain data and reports


岗位职责

  • 实时监控C2C（OTC）交易行为，识别并处置可疑交易模式（结构化交易、异常高频、新注册用户大额交易等），对触发风控规则的订单进行人工审核，判断交易对手风险等级。
  • 主导U商/用户银行卡被司法冻结的应急处理全流程，涵盖证据收集、银行沟通、警方配合及解冻跟进，同时建立冻卡事件档案，沉淀案例库，持续优化风控规则。
  • 执行反洗钱（AML）相关合规要求，识别和上报可疑交易报告，持续跟踪监管政策变化，确保业务在合规框架内运行。
  • 运用链上分析工具（Etherscan、OKLink、MistTrack等）追踪USDT资金来源，识别被污染地址，在赃款到账前进行拦截，降低冻卡发生率。
  • 基于交易数据和历史案例持续迭代风控规则引擎，输出周/月度风控报告，分析风险趋势，提出策略建议。
  • 与客服团队协同处理用户申诉和纠纷，与银行及执法机关建立并维护沟通渠道。


岗位要求

jobs.descriptionText:
About us

Bitget is the world's largest Universal Exchange (UEX), serving over 125 million users and offering access to over 2M crypto tokens, 100+ tokenized stocks, ETFs, commodities, FX, and precious metals such as gold. The ecosystem is committed to helping users trade smarter with its AI agent, which co-pilots trade execution.

Bitget is driving crypto adoption through strategic partnerships with LALIGA and MotoGP™. Aligned with its global impact strategy, Bitget has joined hands with UNICEF to support blockchain education for 1.1 million people by 2027. Bitget currently leads in the tokenized TradFi market, providing the industry's lowest fees and highest liquidity across 150 regions worldwide.

What you'll do

Monitor C2C (OTC) transactions in real time, identify and handle suspicious trading patterns (structured transactions, abnormal high-frequency activity, large transactions from new users), and manually review triggered orders to assess counterparty risk levels.
Lead the end-to-end emergency response for judicially frozen U-merchant / user bank accounts, covering evidence collection, bank communication, law enforcement coordination, and account unfreeze follow-up, while building a case archive to continuously optimize risk control rules.
Execute AML compliance requirements, identify and report Suspicious Transaction Reports (STRs), and track regulatory policy changes to ensure all business operations remain within the compliance framework.
Utilize on-chain analysis tools (Etherscan, OKLink, MistTrack, etc.) to trace USDT fund sources and identify contaminated addresses, intercepting tainted deposits before they reach user accounts to reduce freeze incident rates.
Continuously iterate risk control rule engines based on transaction data and historical cases, and produce weekly/monthly risk reports to analyze risk trends and provide strategic recommendations.
Collaborate with the customer service team to handle user complaints and disputes, and establish and maintain communication channels with banks and law enforcement agencies.

What you'll need

Bachelor's degree or above; Finance, Law, Economics, or Computer Science preferred
3+ years in risk control / compliance; at least 1 year in crypto OTC or payment industry risk control
Native Chinese; ability to read English on-chain data and reports

岗位职责
实时监控C2C（OTC）交易行为，识别并处置可疑交易模式（结构化交易、异常高频、新注册用户大额交易等），对触发风控规则的订单进行人工审核，判断交易对手风险等级。
主导U商/用户银行卡被司法冻结的应急处理全流程，涵盖证据收集、银行沟通、警方配合及解冻跟进，同时建立冻卡事件档案，沉淀案例库，持续优化风控规则。
执行反洗钱（AML）相关合规要求，识别和上报可疑交易报告，持续跟踪监管政策变化，确保业务在合规框架内运行。
运用链上分析工具（Etherscan、OKLink、MistTrack等）追踪USDT资金来源，识别被污染地址，在赃款到账前进行拦截，降低冻卡发生率。
基于交易数据和历史案例持续迭代风控规则引擎，输出周/月度风控报告，分析风险趋势，提出策略建议。
与客服团队协同处理用户申诉和纠纷，与银行及执法机关建立并维护沟通渠道。

岗位要求
本科及以上，金融、法律、经济、计算机相关专业优先
3年以上风控/合规相关经验，至少1年加密货币OTC或支付行业风控经验
中文母语，能阅读英文链上数据和报告

jobs.title: Operations Manager - LATAM
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What You’ll Do


  • Plan and execute integrated marketing campaigns aligned with platform goals and user needs, while managing budgets and optimizing performance.
  • Monitor campaign results, analyze performance metrics, and refine strategies to enhance user experience and ROI.
  • Drive user acquisition and transaction growth through targeted channel operations and data-driven resource allocation.
  • Develop and implement user growth strategies to improve engagement, retention, and lifetime value across the user lifecycle.
  • Build and enhance data analysis frameworks to track operational metrics and continuously optimize performance.
  • Conduct competitive and industry analysis to identify trends, benchmark best practices, and recommend strategic improvements.


What You’ll Need


  • At least 2 years of experience in web3 or crypto industry operations, preferably with overseas market exposure. (Outstanding candidates may be considered with less experience)
  • Solid understanding of user growth strategies.
  • Proven expertise in campaign planning, execution, and data analysis.
  • Strong communication, collaboration, and ability to perform under pressure.
  • Fluency in Spanish is required, along with proficiency in either English or Chinese.

jobs.title: 量化开发工程师-高频交易系统方向
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • Work closely with the business and strategic teams to deeply understand the requirements, develop high-performance and high-quality trading strategy codes, and conduct backtesting.
  • Analyze execution and trading data, evaluate the profit and loss performance of the strategies, and promptly iterate and improve the strategies.
  • Maintain the stability of the production environment quantitative trading system, be responsible for daily operations, monitoring, incident response, and continuous system upgrades.
  • Explore and optimize underlying system components, including network communication, concurrency, serialization, delay reduction, and overall runtime performance.
  • Participate in the formulation of the team's long-term technical roadmap, contribute to the architecture evolution, and help promote the entire organization to adopt the best engineering practices.


What you'll need


  • Computer science, statistics, mathematics, artificial intelligence majors.
  • More than 3 years of experience in quantitative strategy development, cryptocurrency trading, stocks, futures, options or market-making systems.
  • Understanding of high-frequency trading systems, matching engines, hedging, execution systems and low-latency infrastructure.
  • Proficient in programming languages such as Java, C++, Rust, etc., passionate about performance tuning, particularly focusing on latency, throughput, memory usage and system efficiency.
  • Solid computer fundamentals, including data structures, algorithms, operating systems, networks, concurrency, I/O and multithreading.
  • Curious about deep technical optimization. Able to thoroughly investigate problems through debugging, benchmarking and root cause analysis, proficient in reading English documents and open-source code.
  • Have practical experience in AI Coding, multi-agent workflow, and a deep understanding of context.


岗位职责：


  • 与业务和战略团队紧密合作，深入了解需求，开发高性能、高质量的交易策略代码，并进行回测。
  • 分析执行和交易数据，评估策略的盈亏表现，及时迭代和改进策略。
  • 维护生产环境量化交易系统的稳定性，负责日常运维、监控、事件响应和持续系统升级。
  • 探索并优化底层系统组件，包括网络通信、并发性、序列化、延迟降低和整体运行时性能。
  • 参与团队的长期技术路线图制定，为架构演进做出贡献，并帮助推动整个组织采用最佳工程实践。


任职要求：


  • 计算机科学、统计学、数学、人工智能专业。
  • 3年以上量化策略开发、加密货币交易、股票、期货、期权或做市系统经验。
  • 理解高频交易系统、撮合引擎、对冲、执行系统和低延迟基础设施。
  • 熟练掌握Java/C++/Rust等编程语言，热衷于性能调优，尤其关注延迟、吞吐量、内存占用和系统效率。
  • 扎实的计算机基础，包括数据结构、算法、操作系统、网络、并发、I/O和多线程。
  • 对深度技术优化充满好奇心。能够通过调试、基准测试和根本原因分析彻底调查问题，熟练阅读英文文档和开源代码。
  • 具备AI Coding的实践经验、multi-agents work flow，对context有较深的理解。


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Compliance Operations Analyst  (AML – KYC & Transaction Monitoring)
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • AML Reviews: Perform reviews (KYC/KYB, EDD, TM, Screening) with a focus on accuracy and timeliness.
  • Screening & Assessment: Conduct name screening (sanctions, PEP, adverse media) and evaluate potential matches according to internal policies.
  • Due Diligence: Assess customer profiles, including Source of Funds (SoF), Source of Wealth (SoW), PoA and periodic review.
  • Alert Investigation: Investigate alerts and cases related to transaction activity or customer risk.
  • Documentation: Prepare clear case files and investigation summaries supporting risk-based decisions.
  • Record Keeping: Maintain accurate, complete records of all activities and findings.
  • Law Enforcement & Regulatory Support: Liaise with law enforcement authorities and respond to regulatory requests, including preparing and submitting reports, transaction records, and supporting ongoing investigations as required.
  • Cross-Functional Support: Gain structured exposure and provide support across KYC, TM, and Name Screening functions.
  • Internal Collaboration: Work with stakeholders to ensure consistent risk evaluation and effective mitigation.
  • Handling Queries: Respond to internal AML-related queries and contribute to team-wide knowledge sharing.


Role Levels & Growth


Compliance Operations Analyst

  • Manage standard reviews with guidance and follow SOPs/established escalation protocols.
  • Build foundational knowledge in AML cases and investigations.

Senior Compliance Operations Analyst 

  • Independently handle complex cases across AML functions.
  • Guide junior staff, support QA, process improvement, and escalation management.
  • Ensure case consistency with regulatory expectations.


What you'll need


Compliance Operations Analyst

  • 1–3 years’ experience in AML, KYC, Transaction Monitoring, or Compliance Operations.
  • Basic knowledge of AML processes (KYC/KYB, EDD, TM, Screening).
  • Strong attention to detail and structured approach.

Senior Compliance Operations Analyst 

  • 3–6 years’ AML/CFT experience with strong exposure to cases and investigations.
  • Deep understanding of AML typologies, risk indicators, and regulatory frameworks.
  • Demonstrated ability to manage complex reviews independently.

For Both Levels

  • Proficient English (Mandarin a plus).
  • Effective workload and time management.
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.


Working Hours & Shift Requirements

  • Must be able to work Morning, Noon, or Night Shift (fixed shifts; this is not a rotating shift arrangement).
  • While shifts are currently fixed, business needs may evolve and shift arrangements may change in the future. Applicants should have the flexibility to adapt to potential shift changes as required by operational demands.


Preferred / Nice to Have

  • Crypto, fintech, or digital asset platform experience.
  • Familiarity with blockchain analytics tools (e.g., Chainalysis, Elliptic).
  • Past exposure to transaction monitoring, KYC (Sumsub) and screening systems (Worldcheck Refinitiv).
  • ACAMS or related AML certification.



Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!

Record Keeping: Maintain accurate, complete records of all activities and findings.
Law Enforcement & Regulatory Support: Liaise with law enforcement authorities and respond to regulatory requests, including preparing and submitting reports, transaction records, and supporting ongoing investigations as required.
Cross-Functional Support: Gain structured exposure and provide support across KYC, TM, and Name Screening functions.
Internal Collaboration: Work with stakeholders to ensure consistent risk evaluation and effective mitigation.
Handling Queries: Respond to internal AML-related queries and contribute to team-wide knowledge sharing.

Role Levels & Growth

Compliance Operations Analyst
Manage standard reviews with guidance and follow SOPs/established escalation protocols.
Build foundational knowledge in AML cases and investigations.
Senior Compliance Operations Analyst 
Independently handle complex cases across AML functions.
Guide junior staff, support QA, process improvement, and escalation management.
Ensure case consistency with regulatory expectations.

What you'll need

Compliance Operations Analyst
1–3 years’ experience in AML, KYC, Transaction Monitoring, or Compliance Operations.
Basic knowledge of AML processes (KYC/KYB, EDD, TM, Screening).
Strong attention to detail and structured approach.
Senior Compliance Operations Analyst 
3–6 years’ AML/CFT experience with strong exposure to cases and investigations.
Deep understanding of AML typologies, risk indicators, and regulatory frameworks.
Demonstrated ability to manage complex reviews independently.
For Both Levels
Proficient English (Mandarin a plus).
Effective workload and time management.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

Working Hours & Shift Requirements
Must be able to work Morning, Noon, or Night Shift (fixed shifts; this is not a rotating shift arrangement).
While shifts are currently fixed, business needs may evolve and shift arrangements may change in the future. Applicants should have the flexibility to adapt to potential shift changes as required by operational demands.

Preferred / Nice to Have
Crypto, fintech, or digital asset platform experience.
Familiarity with blockchain analytics tools (e.g., Chainalysis, Elliptic).
Past exposure to transaction monitoring, KYC (Sumsub) and screening systems (Worldcheck Refinitiv).
ACAMS or related AML certification.

Why Bitget?

Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
We offer competitive salaries and benefits
Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!

If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!

By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Senior Financial Product Manager 资深理财产品经理（owner）
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • Formulate and implement the company's strategic planning for financial products to ensure that product line development is in line with company goals and customer needs.
  • Analyze market trends and competitors, and make targeted product improvement and innovation suggestions to improve product competitiveness.
  • Determine the key functions and features of the product, develop a detailed product roadmap and release plan, and ensure that the product is delivered on time.
  • Coordinate cross-departmental teams, including design, technology, marketing and operations teams, to ensure product development progress and quality.
  • Manage the entire life cycle of financial products, including product launch, promotion, maintenance and elimination, and continuously optimize products.


What you'll need


  • Bachelor degree or above in finance, economics or related fields, with a solid theoretical foundation.
  • Those with more than 5 years of experience in financial management/financial product management and familiarity with web3 exchange financial products and related businesses are preferred.
  • Familiar with the financial market and product development process, and understand the characteristics and market demand of financial products.
  • Ability to improve and optimize existing products, and restructure the underlying mechanisms of products to optimize product operations and improve product scalability.
  • Strong data analysis skills and proficiency in product management software.
  • Excellent teamwork and communication skills, good at cross-departmental coordination and cooperation to promote the smooth progress of projects.
  • Good English language skills, can be used as a working language.


岗位职责：


  • 制定并执行公司理财产品的战略规划，确保产品线发展符合公司目标和客户需求。
  • 分析市场趋势和竞争对手，提出针对性的产品改进和创新建议，以提高产品竞争力。
  • 确定产品的关键功能和特性，制定详细的产品路线图和发布计划，确保产品按时交付。
  • 协调跨部门团队，包括设计、技术、市场和运营团队，确保产品开发进度和质量。
  • 管理理财产品的整个生命周期，包括产品上线、推广、维护和淘汰，持续优化产品。


任职要求：


  • 金融、经济学或相关领域本科及以上学历，具备扎实的理论基础。
  • 拥有5年以上理财/金融产品管理经验，熟悉web3交易所理财产品及相关业务者优先考虑。
  • 熟悉金融市场和产品开发流程，了解理财产品的特点和市场需求。
  • 具备改进和优化现有产品的能力，以及重构产品底层机制以优化产品运营并提高产品的可扩展性。
  • 具备较强的数据分析能力和熟练运用产品管理软件的经验。
  • 出色的团队合作和沟通能力，善于跨部门协调合作，推动项目顺利进行。
  • 具备良好的英语语言能力，可作为工作语言。


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Head of Live Streaming Business 直播业务负责人
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is the world's largest Universal Exchange (UEX), serving over 125 million users and offering access to over 2M crypto tokens, 100+ tokenized stocks, ETFs, commodities, FX, and precious metals such as gold. The ecosystem is committed to helping users trade smarter with its AI agent, which co-pilots trade execution.


Bitget is driving crypto adoption through strategic partnerships with LALIGA and MotoGP™. Aligned with its global impact strategy, Bitget has joined hands with UNICEF to support blockchain education for 1.1 million people by 2027. Bitget currently leads in the tokenized TradFi market, providing the industry's lowest fees and highest liquidity across 150 regions worldwide.


What you'll do

  • Develop the overall strategic plan for the live streaming business; define the positioning and execution approach of live streaming in the user acquisition and conversion funnel for new products such as RWA and CFD. Continuously optimize business strategies through a data-driven approach.
  • Build and manage a professional live streaming host team; identify, sign, and continuously manage high-quality host resources, while establishing host incentive and performance evaluation mechanisms.
  • Design traffic acquisition strategies for live streaming rooms, working closely with off-platform marketing, social media, KOL partnerships, and other channels to ensure sustained growth on the supply side.
  • Design dedicated live streaming campaigns for different product categories and build an end-to-end conversion funnel from content engagement to account opening and trading.
  • Research industry best practices and collaborate with product and technology teams to continuously improve product-related features and enhance the overall user experience.


What you'll need

  • 5+ years of experience in live streaming operations on internet finance platforms, with relevant team management experience.
  • Deep understanding of the content logic of financial live streaming, with the ability to differentiate operational strategies for educational, market commentary, and product marketing live streams.
  • Results-oriented, with strong familiarity with the full set of metrics and monitoring systems for live streaming operations.
  • Strong ability to work under pressure and execute effectively, with the capability to translate strategy into detailed execution in a fast-paced environment.
  • Basic understanding of Crypto, stocks, or CFD products, or a strong willingness to quickly learn emerging knowledge and new product categories.
  • Experience leading live streaming businesses at stock/CFD-related platforms such as Futu, Tiger Brokers, Xueqiu, East Money, Tonghuashun, or similar platforms is preferred.
  • Experience building related products or businesses from 0 to 1 is preferred.
  • Established network of high-quality finance-related live streaming hosts is preferred.


岗位职责：

  • 制定直播业务的整体战略规划，明确直播在 RWA、CFD 等新产品获客与转化路径中的定位与打法，数据驱动，持续优化业务策略
  • 搭建并管理专业主播团队，挖掘、签约并长期运营优质主播资源，建立主播激励与考核机制
  • 设计直播间流量获取策略，密切联动站外推广、社交媒体、KOL 合作等多渠道，确保供给端持续增长
  • 针对不同品类产品设计专项直播活动，打通从内容到开户/交易的转化链路
  • 研究行业最佳实践，与产品技术团队协作，持续完善产品相关功能，提升整体产品体验


任职要求：

  • 5 年以上互联网金融平台直播业务相关经验以及相应的团队管理经验
  • 深度理解金融直播的内容逻辑——能区分教育类、行情类、产品营销类直播的不同运营策略
  • 结果导向，熟悉直播业务的完整指标和监控体系
  • 抗压、执行力强，能在快节奏环境中从战略落到细节
  • 了解Crypto、股票或CFD 产品的基本逻辑，或有意愿快速学习新兴知识
  • 有富途、老虎证券、雪球、东方财富、同花顺等股票/CFD类平台直播业务负责经验者优先
  • 有相关产品从0到1建立经验者优先
  • 有成熟的优质财经主播资源积累者优先


Why Bitget?

  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!


If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


For more information regarding candidates' personal data processing, please refer to Bitget Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: RWA Senior Project Manager RWA 高级项目经理
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do

RWA Business Line Coordination and Execution

  • Responsible for the full lifecycle management of multiple RWA-related business lines, covering project initiation, institutional onboarding, product launch, and post-launch operations. Developed key milestones and execution plans to ensure timely and high-quality delivery across all business streams.
  • Internal and External Resource Coordination and Implementation
  • Served as the key liaison between institutional clients and internal teams, coordinating resources across compliance, product, technology, and operations. Drove efficient collaboration with external partners, including securities firms, custodians, auditors, and law firms, to ensure smooth implementation of business processes.
  • Operational Strategy Development and Continuous Optimization
  • Continuously optimized product features, trading processes, and user experience based on business data and user feedback. Collaborated with relevant teams to improve fiat deposit and withdrawal channels, lower user adoption barriers, and enhance overall conversion and retention.
  • Risk Management and Cross-Functional Communication
  • Identified compliance, business, and collaboration risks throughout project execution. Led cross-functional communication and problem-solving efforts, while developing reusable project management mechanisms and partnership templates to improve overall execution efficiency.



What you'll need


  • Education & Experience:
  • Bachelor’s degree or above, with more than 5 years of work experience. Experience in RWA（Real World Assets）, securities brokerage/financial services, or Web3 institutional business is required.
  • Institutional / B2B Expertise:Extensive experience in institutional negotiations, with the ability to independently interface with licensed securities brokers and compliant custodians. Familiarity with KYC（Know Your Customer）and AML（Anti-Money Laundering）processes is required.
  • User-Facing / B2C Mindset:Strong expertise in user operations, with the ability to continuously optimize product experience based on data analysis.
  • Project Management Capability:Strong cross-functional execution and coordination skills, with the ability to work with product, R&D, compliance, finance, and other teams to drive project progress and ensure successful implementation.
  • Professional Skills:Familiar with the tokenization process of RWA assets, including U.S. stocks, Hong Kong stocks, credit assets, and other asset classes. Proficient in mainstream project management methodologies. Excellent English communication skills, with the ability to independently liaise with overseas institutions.
  • Soft Skills:Results-oriented, resilient under pressure, and capable of defining clear paths and driving execution in uncertain or ambiguous environments.


岗位职责：

  • 负责多条RWA相关业务线的全生命周期管理，从项目立项、机构接入到产品上线及后续运营，制定关键里程碑与推进计划，确保各业务条线按时、高质量交付。
  • ﻿﻿内外部资源协同与落地 作为连接机构客户与内部团队的核心枢纽，协调合规、产品、技术、运营等多方资源，推动券商、托管行、审计及律所等合作方高效配合，保障业务流程顺畅落地。
  • ﻿﻿运营策略制定与迭代优化 基于业务数据与用户反馈，持续优化产品功能、交易流程与用户体验；协同相关团队完善法币出入金链路，降低使用门槛，提升整体转化与留存表现。
  • ﻿﻿风险把控与跨部门沟通 识别项目推进过程中的合规、业务与协作风险，牵头组织跨部门沟通与问题解决，沉淀可复用的项目管理机制与合作模板，提升整体执行效率。


任职要求：

  • 学历与经验：
  • 本科及以上学历，3-5 年以上工作经验；必须具备 RWA（真实世界资产）、券商金融或 Web3 机构业务相关经验，中英文作为工作语言。
  • B 端能力：具备丰富的机构谈判经验，能够独立对接持牌券商及合规托管机构，熟悉 KYC（了解你的客户）及 AML（反洗钱）流程。
  • C 端思维：精通用户运营，能够基于数据分析持续优化产品体验。
  • 项目管理能力：具备极强的跨部门推动能力，能够协调产品、研发、合规、财务等团队，推动项目进程并确保落地。
  • 专业技能：熟悉 RWA 资产代币化流程，包括美股、港股、信贷等资产类别；精通主流项目管理方法论；具备优秀的英文沟通能力，能够独立对接海外机构。
  • 软性素质：结果导向，抗压能力强，能够在不确定或模糊的环境中定义清晰路径，并推动执行落地。


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!

jobs.descriptionText:
About us

Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.

Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.

We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!

What you'll do
RWA Business Line Coordination and Execution
Responsible for the full lifecycle management of multiple RWA-related business lines, covering project initiation, institutional onboarding, product launch, and post-launch operations. Developed key milestones and execution plans to ensure timely and high-quality delivery across all business streams.
Internal and External Resource Coordination and Implementation
Served as the key liaison between institutional clients and internal teams, coordinating resources across compliance, product, technology, and operations. Drove efficient collaboration with external partners, including securities firms, custodians, auditors, and law firms, to ensure smooth implementation of business processes.
Operational Strategy Development and Continuous Optimization
Continuously optimized product features, trading processes, and user experience based on business data and user feedback. Collaborated with relevant teams to improve fiat deposit and withdrawal channels, lower user adoption barriers, and enhance overall conversion and retention.
Risk Management and Cross-Functional Communication
Identified compliance, business, and collaboration risks throughout project execution. Led cross-functional communication and problem-solving efforts, while developing reusable project management mechanisms and partnership templates to improve overall execution efficiency.

What you'll need

Education & Experience:
Bachelor’s degree or above, with more than 5 years of work experience. Experience in RWA（Real World Assets）, securities brokerage/financial services, or Web3 institutional business is required.
Institutional / B2B Expertise:Extensive experience in institutional negotiations, with the ability to independently interface with licensed securities brokers and compliant custodians. Familiarity with KYC（Know Your Customer）and AML（Anti-Money Laundering）processes is required.
User-Facing / B2C Mindset:Strong expertise in user operations, with the ability to continuously optimize product experience based on data analysis.
Project Management Capability:Strong cross-functional execution and coordination skills, with the ability to work with product, R&D, compliance, finance, and other teams to drive project progress and ensure successful implementation.
Professional Skills:Familiar with the tokenization process of RWA assets, including U.S. stocks, Hong Kong stocks, credit assets, and other asset classes. Proficient in mainstream project management methodologies. Excellent English communication skills, with the ability to independently liaise with overseas institutions.
Soft Skills:Results-oriented, resilient under pressure, and capable of defining clear paths and driving execution in uncertain or ambiguous environments.

岗位职责：
负责多条RWA相关业务线的全生命周期管理，从项目立项、机构接入到产品上线及后续运营，制定关键里程碑与推进计划，确保各业务条线按时、高质量交付。
﻿﻿内外部资源协同与落地 作为连接机构客户与内部团队的核心枢纽，协调合规、产品、技术、运营等多方资源，推动券商、托管行、审计及律所等合作方高效配合，保障业务流程顺畅落地。
﻿﻿运营策略制定与迭代优化 基于业务数据与用户反馈，持续优化产品功能、交易流程与用户体验；协同相关团队完善法币出入金链路，降低使用门槛，提升整体转化与留存表现。
﻿﻿风险把控与跨部门沟通 识别项目推进过程中的合规、业务与协作风险，牵头组织跨部门沟通与问题解决，沉淀可复用的项目管理机制与合作模板，提升整体执行效率。

任职要求：
学历与经验：
本科及以上学历，3-5 年以上工作经验；必须具备 RWA（真实世界资产）、券商金融或 Web3 机构业务相关经验，中英文作为工作语言。
B 端能力：具备丰富的机构谈判经验，能够独立对接持牌券商及合规托管机构，熟悉 KYC（了解你的客户）及 AML（反洗钱）流程。
C 端思维：精通用户运营，能够基于数据分析持续优化产品体验。
项目管理能力：具备极强的跨部门推动能力，能够协调产品、研发、合规、财务等团队，推动项目进程并确保落地。
专业技能：熟悉 RWA 资产代币化流程，包括美股、港股、信贷等资产类别；精通主流项目管理方法论；具备优秀的英文沟通能力，能够独立对接海外机构。
软性素质：结果导向，抗压能力强，能够在不确定或模糊的环境中定义清晰路径，并推动执行落地。

Why Bitget?

Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
We offer competitive salaries and benefits
Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!

If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!

By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Stock Business Development Manager 券商BD
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • Channel Expansion & Ecosystem Building: Responsible for connecting with traditional brokerage channels, high-profile financial KOLs, asset management institutions, and High-Net-Worth (HNW) clients across the Greater China region; establishing deep business partnerships to achieve growth targets including account openings, asset onboarding, and Assets Under Management (AUM).
  • End-to-End Business Operations: Independently conduct high-level commercial negotiations, implement customized partnership proposals, and perform post-cooperation data reviews; continuously optimize rebate structures and partnership models to maximize ROI and client retention.
  • Asset Allocation & Client Conversion: Deeply explore the diversified asset allocation needs of traditional Hong Kong and US stock investors; provide consultation, guidance, and conversion matchmaking for HNW clients migrating from traditional finance to emerging digital assets (Digital Assets / RWA / Web3).
  • Market Insight & Competitive Analysis: Closely track the latest strategies of peers and competitors (such as Futu, Longbridge, Fosun, etc.); deliver differentiated acquisition strategies to drive explosive business growth in the Greater China region.


What you'll need


  • Industry Background: Bachelor’s degree or above; 2–5 years of experience in BD, channel partnerships, or Institutional Sales within major Hong Kong and US stock brokerages, such as Futu, Tiger, Valuable (Vantage), or Longbridge.
  • Resource Advantage: Familiar with the channel ecosystem, rebate/commission-sharing mechanisms, and HNW user profiles of Hong Kong/US stock brokerages; candidates with established resources of financial KOLs, brokerage channels, or HNW clients are preferred.
  • Knowledge Base: Possess a foundational understanding of or a strong interest in digital assets/crypto industry; grasp basic concepts like RWA (Real World Asset tokenization) and demonstrate the ability to smoothly bridge traditional finance with emerging asset demands. (Candidates with a cross-over background in both Web2 and Web3 are preferred).
  • Core Competencies: Highly self-driven with exceptional commercial negotiation skills; result-oriented with high stress tolerance; possess rapid learning agility and execution capabilities in a fast-paced, dynamic environment.



岗位职责：


  1. 渠道拓展与生态建设： 负责对接大中华区传统券商渠道、知名财经 KOL、资管机构及高净值（HNW）客户，建立深度商务合作，达成开户、资产引入及管理资产规模（AUM）等增长指标。
  2. 全链路商务闭环： 独立进行高能级商务谈判、定制化合作方案落地及后期数据复盘，持续优化渠道分润与合作模式，提升合作 ROI 与客户留存。
  3. 资产配置与转型转化： 深入挖掘传统港美股客户的多元化资产配置需求，为高净值客群提供传统金融向新兴数字资产（Digital Assets / RWA / Web3）迁移的咨询、引导与转化对接。
  4. 市场洞察与竞品对标： 紧密追踪行业及同业竞品（如富途、长桥、复星等）的最新策略，输出差异化的拓新方案，助力大中华区业务的爆发式增长。


任职要求：


  1. 行业背景： 本科及以上学历，2-5年富途 (Futu)、老虎 (Tiger)、华盛 (Vantage)、长桥 (Longbridge) 等主流港美股券商的 BD、渠道合作或机构大客户销售（Institutional Sales）经验。
  2. 资源优势： 熟悉港美股券商的渠道生态、分润机制及高净值用户画像，自带成熟的财经 KOL、券商渠道或高净值客户资源者优先。
  3. 知识储备： 对数字资产/加密行业（Digital Assets / Crypto）有基础认知或浓厚兴趣，理解 RWA（真实世界资产通证化）等基本业态，能顺畅桥接传统金融与新兴资产需求。(具有 Web2+Web3 交叉背景者优先)
  4. 核心素养： 具备极强的商务自驱力与谈判能力，结果导向，抗压能力强，具备在变化环境中的快速学习与落地执行力。


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Payfi Product Manager Payfi 产品经理
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget Wallet is the non-custodial crypto wallet designed to make crypto simple and secure for everyone. With over 80 million users, we bring together a full suite of crypto services, including swaps, market insights, staking, rewards, DApp exploration, and payment solutions. Supporting 130+ blockchains and millions of tokens, Bitget Wallet enables seamless multi-chain trading across hundreds of DEXs and cross-chain bridges. Backed by a $300+ million user protection fund, it ensures the highest level of security for users' assets.


What you'll do


  • Lead the end-to-end product lifecycle for Web3 spend/ OTC products including virtual and physical spend/ OTC , card issuance, binding, payments, and user experience optimization.
  • Deeply understand the Visa and MasterCard network, including integration processes, settlement flows, security, and compliance requirements.
  • Collaborate with compliance and risk teams to design and refine KYC processes, ensuring adherence to regulatory requirements across different regions.
  • Work closely with growth and marketing teams to develop and execute user acquisition, activation, and retention strategies for card users.
  • Manage partnerships and integrations with issuing spend/ OTC , banks, card networks (Visa/MasterCard), and payment processors to ensure operational excellence.
  • Analyze product and user data to drive continuous improvements in product experience and business metrics.
  • Explore and drive innovation in Web3-native use cases for spend/ OTC , such as on-chain top-ups, NFT-linked cards, and decentralized identity integrations.


What you'll need


  • 3+ years of experience in fintech, payments, or internet product management; hands-on experience with spend/ OTC products is a strong plus.
  • Solid understanding of Visa/MasterCard payment rails, clearing & settlement, and card lifecycle management.
  • Familiar with KYC/KYT processes, AML standards, and regulatory frameworks in regions.
  • Good understanding of Web3 ecosystems, including wallets (e.g., MetaMask, Bitget Wallet), on-chain transactions, and basic blockchain concepts.
  • Proven experience in driving user growth with structured product methodologies.
  • Strong analytical, communication, and cross-functional collaboration skills.
  • Fluent in English; able to manage international partners and teams.
  • Bonus: Direct experience working on a Web3 spend/ OTC product (e.g。 Crypto.com Card, Bitget U Card, etc.).


工作职责

  • 全面负责 Web3 spend/ OTC 产品的端到端生命周期管理，包括虚拟卡和实体卡的发行、绑定、支付，以及用户体验优化。
  • 深入了解 Visa 和 MasterCard 网络，包括对接流程、清算流程、安全性与合规性要求。
  • 与合规和风控团队合作，设计并优化 KYC 流程，确保在不同地区符合监管要求。
  • 与增长和市场团队紧密合作，制定并执行卡片用户的获客、激活和留存策略。
  • 管理与发卡银行、spend/ OTC 以及支付处理方的合作与集成，确保卓越的运营表现。
  • 分析产品与用户数据，推动产品体验和业务指标的持续改进。
  • 探索并推动 Web3 原生卡片的创新应用场景，例如链上充值、NFT 绑定卡、去中心化身份集成等。

任职要求

  • 3 年以上金融科技、支付或互联网产品管理经验；有虚拟/实体卡产品实操经验者优先。
  • 扎实理解 Visa/MasterCard 支付网络、清算与结算流程，以及卡生命周期管理。
  • 熟悉 KYC/KYT 流程、反洗钱（AML）标准及新加坡、欧盟等地区的监管框架。
  • 对 Web3 生态有良好理解，包括钱包（如 MetaMask、Bitget Wallet）、链上交易以及基础区块链概念。
  • 具备通过结构化产品方法论驱动用户增长的经验。
  • 拥有较强的数据分析、沟通能力和跨团队协作能力。
  • 英语流利，能够管理国际合作伙伴和团队。
  • 加分项：具备 Web3 卡产品的直接工作经验 spend/ OTC （如 Crypto.com Card、Bitget U Card 等）。


If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


1. Risk Product Planning & Architecture Construction

  • Responsible for the overall planning and roadmap formulation of the exchange's risk control products. Focus on core business scenarios such as Spot, Derivatives/Futures, P2P, and Fiat On/Off-Ramp to identify potential risk exposures and drive the continuous construction and iteration of the risk product ecosystem.
  • Design and implement tailored risk strategies and product solutions for core risk scenarios, including transaction fraud, account takeover (ATO), money laundering, wash trading/arbitrage, market manipulation, and P2P fraud.
  • Own the product design and functional optimization of core modules such as risk rule engines, risk models, black/grey lists, KYC/AML verification, and case management systems.


2. Risk Strategy Formulation & Optimization

  • Analyze risk characteristics and attack vectors continuously by combining on-chain data, transactional behavior data, and case reviews to deliver actionable strategy optimization plans.
  • Collaborate closely with risk strategy, data, and algorithm teams to drive the R&D and deployment of rule-based strategies and intelligent risk models (including fraud intent recognition and syndication/group graph analysis).
  • Establish a risk-effectiveness evaluation framework. Conduct regular quantitative analysis of strategy performance to strike an optimal balance between security blocking and false positives (user friction), driving continuous strategy iterations.


3. Cross-Functional Collaboration & Project Management

  • Deeply understand business requirements to formulate product solutions that balance robust security with a smooth user trading experience.
  • Coordinate effectively with cross-functional teams, including Business, Operations, Compliance, Legal, Customer Service, Algorithms, and Engineering, to ensure seamless execution of product solutions.
  • Take full ownership of writing Product Requirement Documents (PRDs), organizing requirement reviews, and tracking development progress to ensure high-quality and timely project delivery.


4. Industry Research & Forward-Looking Insights

  • Keep abreast of technical trends in the crypto risk control domain, tracking the application progress of on-chain analysis tools (e.g., Chainalysis, Elliptic) and industry best practices.
  • Research the risk control product strategies of mainstream exchanges, proposing differentiated product optimization recommendations tailored to our business characteristics.
  • Monitor emerging fraud techniques and evolution trends of attack vectors to maintain a proactive and predictive capability toward risks.


What you'll need


1. Basic Qualifications

  • Education: Bachelor’s degree or above; majors in Computer Science, Information Security, Finance, Statistics, Mathematics, or related fields are preferred.
  • Experience: Minimum of 3+ years of experience in risk products, strategy products, or related fields. Backgrounds in crypto currency exchanges, payment institutions, or fintech platforms are highly preferred.


2. Professional Competencies

  • Familiarity with common risk scenarios and corresponding risk mitigation methods within crypto exchanges, including but not limited to:
  • Trading Risk: Wash trading, self-matching, market manipulation, and anomalous trading behavior identification.
  • Account Security: Account takeover (ATO), credential stuffing/credential attacks, and anomalous login detection.
  • P2P Risk: Off-platform guidance fraud, payment fraud, and syndicate wash trading.
  • On/Off-Ramp Risk: Fiat fraud, credit card fraud, and illicit fund aggregation/layering.
  • Data Proficiency: Strong data analysis capabilities; proficient in SQL or other data tools for data extraction and deep analysis, with a proven ability to uncover risk patterns from raw data.
  • Technical Agility: Solid understanding of technical frameworks such as risk rule engines, machine learning models, knowledge graphs, and on-chain analytics, enabling smooth and effective communication with technical teams.
  • Product Fundamentals: Outstanding product documentation skills, with the ability to independently deliver high-quality PRDs, workflows, strategy frameworks, and data reports.


3. Soft Skills & Core Attributes

  • Strong logical thinking and structured communication skills, capable of deconstructing complex problems into systematic solutions.
  • Robust project driving capability and cross-functional coordination skills, with a track record of successfully delivering goals even with limited resources.
  • Sharp risk awareness and business acumen, with the ability to proactively identify and flag latent vulnerabilities.
  • Highly rigorous, responsible, and resilient; capable of thriving in a fast-paced, highly complex, and high-pressure environment.


岗位职责


风控产品规划与体系建设

负责交易所风控产品的整体规划与路线图制定，围绕现货、合约、P2P、法币出入金等核心业务场景，识别潜在风险敞口，推动风控产品体系的持续建设与迭代；

针对交易欺诈、账户盗用、洗钱、刷单套利、市场操纵、P2P 欺诈等核心风险场景，设计并落地对应的风控策略与产品方案；

负责风控规则引擎、风险模型、黑灰名单、KYC/AML 核验、案件管理系统等核心模块的产品设计与功能优化。


风险策略制定与优化

结合链上数据、交易行为数据及案件复盘，持续分析风险特征与作案链路，输出策略优化方案；

与风控策略、数据、算法团队协作，推动规则策略与智能风控模型（包括欺诈意图识别、团伙图谱识别等）的研发与上线；

建立风控效果评估体系，定期对策略效果进行量化分析，在安全拦截与用户误伤之间寻求合理平衡，驱动策略持续迭代。


跨团队协作与项目推动

深入理解业务需求，在风控安全与用户交易体验之间寻求合理平衡，制定兼顾安全性与业务友好度的产品方案；

与业务、运营、合规、法务、客服、算法、工程等多方团队高效协作，推动产品方案落地；

负责产品需求文档的撰写，组织需求评审，跟进开发进度，确保项目按时高质量交付。


行业研究与前沿洞察

持续跟踪加密货币风控领域的技术趋势、链上分析工具（如 Chainalysis、Elliptic 等）的应用进展及行业最佳实践；

研究主流交易所风控产品策略，结合自身业务特点，提出差异化的产品优化建议；

关注新兴欺诈手法与攻击模式的演变趋势，具备前瞻性风险预判能力。


任职要求：


一、基本条件

本科及以上学历，计算机、信息安全、金融、统计、数学等相关专业优先；

3 年以上风控产品、策略产品或相关领域工作经验，有加密货币交易所、支付机构或互联网金融平台背景者优先。


二、专业能力

熟悉加密货币交易所常见风险场景及对应风控手段，包括但不限于：

交易风控：刷单套利、自成交、市场操纵、异常交易行为识别；

账户安全：账户盗用、撞库攻击、异常登录识别；

P2P 风控：线下引导欺诈、付款欺诈、团伙刷单；

出入金风控：法币欺诈、信用卡盗刷、资金归集；

具备较强的数据分析能力，能够熟练使用 SQL 或其他数据工具进行数据提取与分析，善于从数据中发现风险规律；

了解风控规则引擎、机器学习模型、图谱风控、链上分析等常见技术方案，具备一定的技术理解与沟通能力；

具备良好的产品文档撰写能力，能够独立完成 PRD、流程图、策略方案及数据分析报告等文档输出。


三、综合素质

具备较强的逻辑思维与结构化表达能力，能够清晰拆解复杂问题并给出系统性解决方案；

具备较强的项目推动能力与跨团队沟通协作能力，能够在资源有限的情况下有效推动目标落地；

具备较强的风险意识与业务敏感度，能够主动识别潜在风险并及时预警；

工作严谨负责，具备较强的抗压能力，能够适应快节奏、高复杂度的工作环境。


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: DEX Business Development Manager
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


Broker cooperation expansion and management

  • Design and optimize Broker/IB program (profit sharing/rebate/CPA/tiered mechanism, risk control and compliance terms)
  • Resource Conversion: Utilize your network in the industry to directly communicate with top overseas brokers and trading community founders, and quickly complete the source search and launch.
  • Deep collaboration: not just giving creatives, but also "playing" with brokers. Plan activities that traders are truly interested in, such as gambling competitions, follow-up trading strategies, online trading review AMA, etc.
  • Going concern accounts and channels: monthly business review, rebate verification, compliance advocacy, retention and incremental planning

Community and KOL/Trader BD

  • Connect with overseas Web3 trading communities, quantitative/institutional/Prop/KOL resources, promote joint activities, AMA, and trading competitions
  • Responsible for BD interfaces related to WeChat community matrix and TG/Discord community cooperation, coordinating community/operation landing

Participate in operations + activities

  • Activity planning, review with the operation team "what kind of activities can stimulate trading". Is it to reduce the minimum order quantity? Provide U-based contracts? Or hold a simulated trading competition to screen dark horses? Use the trader's intuition to guide budget allocation.
  • Offline penetration, when participating in summits such as Token2049 and KBW, the goal is not to distribute flyers at the booth, but to organize Side-events and traders' private cocktail parties to obtain high-quality leads in card games and dinners.

Regional expansion (phased)

  • Sort out and take over existing channels, establish Broker/community cooperation SOP and growth funnel
  • Key English-speaking market landing, establishing a network of local traders and community cooperation
  • Expand key markets such as South Korea, connect resources with large-scale event organizers (such as the Korean blockchain week KBW, etc.), and plan regional BD teams

Data and compliance

  • Establish BD Data Dashboard (Registration → Deposit → Trading → Retention/ARPU/LTV), iterate with Data driven
  • Align promotion standards and contract terms in different jurisdictions with compliance/legal to ensure brand and business safety

Internal collaboration

  • Work closely with products, transactions, risks, operations, marketing, legal, and finance to quickly respond to channel needs and issues


What you'll need


  • 1 year or more experience in BD/channel/ecosystem cooperation, Web3/Crypto/trading platform or brokerage/broker/IB related background is preferred, those with pure ToB sales background should be cautious.
  • Possess the ability to reach overseas circles, and have accessible Web3 trading communities, KOLs, Brokers/IBs, or quantitative/institutional resources
  • Deeply understand the profit model of CEX/DEX, have practical experience or unique insights into contracts, funding rates, slippage, trading depth, and copy trading systems. Able to design cooperation plans from the perspective of a trader.
  • Strong negotiation and project promotion capabilities: scheme design, business terms, contract promotion, implementation landing and review
  • Data-driven: Familiar with channel attribution and ROI analysis, able to drive growth with metrics
  • Strong cross-cultural communication and stress resistance, adaptable to business travel and cross-time zone collaboration
  • Language: Fluent English is the foundation, able to chat with traders of different skin colors across time zones. Accept global travel, wherever there are traders, that is your battlefield.

Bonus points

  • Have a mature BD network or trader network in the English-speaking area; can directly connect to large-scale event organizers (such as Korean blockchain week KBW, TOKEN2049, ETHGlobal, etc.)
  • Have practical experience in setting up and managing Broker/IB plans, or cooperating with Prop/market making/quantitative funds
  • Possess KOL ecosystem operation and joint activities (trading competition/AMA/airdrop) operation cases


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

Possess KOL ecosystem operation and joint activities (trading competition/AMA/airdrop) operation cases

Why Bitget?

Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
We offer competitive salaries and benefits
Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!

If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!

By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Senior AI Application Development Engineer/Agent Architect 高级 AI 应用开发工程师/Agent 架构师
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • Responsible for the design and development of the Agent application architecture based on large models, creating intelligent assistants, task-based Agents, AI Copilots and other systems for actual business scenarios;
  • Responsible for the design, development and optimization of core modules such as RAG, Tool Calling, Workflow, Memory, and multi-Agent collaboration;
  • Promote the deep integration of large model capabilities with business systems, completing the entire closed loop from prototype verification to online delivery;
  • Responsible for the engineering construction of AI applications, including model integration, service governance, effect evaluation, performance optimization, cost control and stability guarantee;
  • Track the development of Cursor, Claude Code, OpenClaw/OpenHands and mainstream Agent/AI Coding technologies, and explore their implementation methods in R&D efficiency improvement and business scenarios.


What you'll need


  • Bachelor's degree or above, with more than 3 years of relevant R&D experience;
  • Strong experience in designing and implementing Agent/Chatbot/AI application architectures;
  • Familiar with mainstream LLM application paradigms such as Prompt, RAG, Agent, Function Calling, Memory, and workflow orchestration;
  • Familiar with Cursor, Claude Code, and mainstream open-source Agent/Coding Agent ecosystems, with practical understanding of code agents, task execution, context management, tool invocation, and feedback loops;
  • Proficient in at least one programming language such as Python, Java, or TypeScript, with solid backend engineering skills;
  • Have experience in implementing complex business scenarios, and possess strong problem analysis, system design, and cross-team collaboration capabilities.

Bonus points

  • Have project experience in AI Coding, Research Assistant, Code Generation, Automated Code Merging, Code Review Agent, etc.;
  • Familiar with frameworks or ecosystems such as OpenClaw, OpenHands, AutoGen, LangGraph, CrewAI, and have actual usage or secondary development experience;
  • Candidates with experience in building enterprise-level Agent platforms, Copilot platforms, or AI development platforms from scratch are preferred.


岗位职责：


  • 负责基于大模型的 Agent 应用架构设计与研发，打造面向实际业务场景的智能助手、任务型 Agent、AI Copilot 等系统；
  • 负责 RAG、Tool Calling、Workflow、Memory、多 Agent 协作等核心模块的设计、开发与优化；
  • 推动大模型能力与业务系统深度结合，完成从原型验证到线上交付的完整闭环；
  • 负责 AI 应用的工程化建设，包括模型接入、服务治理、效果评估、性能优化、成本控制与稳定性保障；
  • 跟踪 Cursor、Claude Code、OpenClaw/OpenHands 及主流 Agent / AI Coding 技术发展，探索其在研发提效和业务场景中的落地方式。


任职要求：


  • 本科及以上学历，3 年以上相关研发经验；
  • 有较强的 Agent / Chatbot / AI 应用架构设计与落地经验；
  • 熟悉 Prompt、RAG、Agent、Function Calling、Memory、工作流编排等主流 LLM 应用范式；
  • 熟悉 Cursor、Claude Code 及主流开源 Agent / Coding Agent 生态，对代码代理、任务执行、上下文管理、工具调用、反馈闭环有实际理解；
  • 精通 Python、Java、TypeScript 等至少一种编程语言，具备扎实的后端工程能力；
  • 有复杂业务场景落地经验，具备较强的问题分析、系统设计和跨团队协作能力。

加分项

  • 有 AI Coding、研发助手、代码生成、自动化改码、代码审查 Agent 等项目经验；
  • 熟悉 OpenClaw、OpenHands、AutoGen、LangGraph、CrewAI 等框架或生态，并有实际使用或二次开发经验；
  • 有从 0 到 1 搭建企业级 Agent 平台、Copilot 平台或 AI 开发平台的经验者优先。


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.
