jobs.title: Agent Innovative Application Algorithm Engineer Agent创新应用算法工程师
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


1. Leading the exploration and incubation of innovative products for Agent technology

Actively keep track of the latest advancements in the field of AI Agents - including but not limited to the MCP/A2A interoperability protocol, Deep Research Agent, the Agentic Coding paradigm (such as the design philosophy of Anthropic Claude Code), the Skills modular architecture (such as the Skills model of OpenClaw/OpenHands), multi-Agent collaboration systems, and Agent driven by reasoning models - combined with the business scenarios in the virtual currency domain, independently initiate the conception, feasibility verification, and prototype construction of innovative products. We expect you to be the one who actively defines the problem, rather than waiting for the input of requirements.


2. Responsible for the algorithm design and large-scale implementation of the Agent system

Design and implement the Agent algorithm solutions for scenarios such as analysis of virtual currency on-chain assets, transaction decision assistance, in-depth research, and information aggregation. The core modules covered include:

  • Task Planning and Deep Reasoning (Planning & Extended Thinking): Following the design philosophy of "first deep thinking then action" in Anthropic Agentic Coding, combined with the adaptive search planning paradigm of Deep Research Agent, the Agent can autonomously break down complex financial tasks, conduct thorough reasoning, and execute multiple steps;
  • Skill Abstraction and Composable Architecture (Skills Composition): Drawing on the Skills model of OpenClaw, the capabilities of querying chain data, K-line technical analysis, contract risk auditing, public opinion monitoring, and transaction strategy execution are encapsulated into standardized and reusable Skill modules, enabling the Agent to dynamically select and orchestrate Skills based on tasks and continuously accumulate new Skills to achieve capability evolution;
  • Tool Invocation Orchestration (Tool-use Orchestration): Based on standard protocols such as MCP, realize standardized connections between the Agent and chain data sources, market interfaces, DeFi protocols, and analysis tools;
  • Multi-Agent Collaboration (Multi-Agent Collaboration): Drawing on the idea of A2A protocol, build a collaborative workflow for multiple Agents, supporting the dynamic orchestration and communication of roles such as research Agent, trading Agent, and risk control Agent;
  • Iterative Self-Verification and Correction (Iterative Self-Refinement): Deeply drawing on the "execution → verification → correction" closed-loop mechanism of Anthropic Claude Code, build the Agent's autonomous verification and iterative optimization capabilities in financial decision-making scenarios to ensure the reliability and accuracy of the output;
  • Autonomous Exploration of the Environment and Context Construction: Referencing the Agent's autonomous exploration of code repositories in Agentic Coding, enable the Agent to actively perceive and comprehensively understand the chain ecosystem and market environment, reducing reliance on manual information input;
  • Long-term Memory and Knowledge Accumulation: Support the Agent's continuous tracking, experience accumulation, and knowledge management of long-term market information;
  • Promote a complete closed loop from proof of concept (PoC) to production-level systems.


3. Establish an Agent Evaluation and Continuous Optimization System

Introduce and customize the Agent Harness class evaluation framework (refer to industry practices such as SWE-bench, AgentBench, TAU-bench, etc.), establish a standardized evaluation system for virtual currency Agent products, and design evaluation indicators and Benchmarks covering the following dimensions:

  • End-to-end task completion rate
  • Accuracy of tool invocation and rationality of Skill combination
  • Success rate of multi-step reasoning and quality of planning
  • Self-correction and fault-tolerant rollback capabilities
  • Compliance rate of security boundaries
  • Continuously iterate algorithm strategies through data-driven methods to ensure the reliability of the Agent in real business scenarios and the user experience.


4. Drive cross-functional collaboration and resource integration

As the core driver on the algorithm side, actively integrate data, engineering, front-end and back-end, testing and other resources to promote efficient project collaboration. Work closely with product and business teams to convert business insights into technical solutions, and quickly adjust and iterate based on market feedback to enhance product competitiveness.


5. Technological Forecasts and Knowledge Accumulation

Continuously monitor the latest research and engineering practices of OpenAI, Anthropic, Google DeepMind, and open-source communities (such as OpenClaw/OpenHands) in areas such as Agent architecture, reasoning models, interoperability protocols, Skills combinable paradigms, and Agentic Coding. Actively produce technical research reports, competitor analyses, and feasibility plans to provide a basis for the team's technical route decisions.


What you'll need


1. Master's degree or above, majoring in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Financial Engineering, Blockchain, etc.

2. Excellent English communication skills, capable of quickly reading, understanding, and extracting English advanced technical literature, open-source project documents, and protocol specifications.

3. Familiar with mainstream Agent frameworks and ecosystems (such as LangChain/LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen, OpenAI Agents SDK, OpenClaw/OpenHands, Dify, etc.), understand emerging interoperability protocols like MCP/A2A and Skills composability architecture, and have successful experience in implementing Agent applications based on these frameworks.

4. Proficient in Python programming, proficient in at least one deep learning framework (such as PyTorch, TensorFlow) or machine learning library (such as Scikit-learn), possess core skills in LLM application layers such as Prompt Engineering, RAG, Fine-tuning, multi-round conversation management, and can independently complete the entire process from algorithm design to engineering deployment.

5. Solid code engineering and system design capabilities, able to write efficient, maintainable, and scalable code, familiar with version control tools like Git and collaborative development processes.

6. Those who have published papers in renowned academic conferences or journals in the relevant field are preferred, or those who have achieved excellent results in competitions on platforms like Kaggle are preferred.

7. Possess good teamwork spirit and communication skills, able to work efficiently with people from different backgrounds, skilled at abstracting vague business requirements into clear technical problems and driving their resolution.


Bonus points:

1. Familiar with core concepts and business logic in areas such as Web3, blockchain, DeFi, and virtual currencies. Have at least 3 years of work experience in related industries such as stocks, futures, and virtual currencies, or have practical experience in manual trading or quantitative trading.

2. Have experience independently incubating AI Agent products. Be familiar with the product development ideas of Anthropic Agentic Coding or similar "Agent autonomously completing end-to-end tasks". Possess a strong sense of product perception and business sensitivity.

3. Have engineering experience in modularizing Agent capabilities, encapsulating Skills, and orchestrating them. Understand the design concept of a composable Agent architecture.

4. Have experience in building Agent evaluation systems (Agent Harness/Benchmark). Understand how to scientifically measure the capability boundaries and improvement directions of Agents.

5. Have in-depth thoughts on the application trends of AI in the financial technology field. Can proactively propose innovative directions and actively verify their feasibility.

6. Possess a Builder mindset - not satisfied with completing assigned tasks, but continuously actively seeking high-value problems, defining solutions, and promoting their implementation.


岗位职责：


1、主导Agent创新产品的探索与孵化

主动跟踪AI Agent领域的前沿进展——包括但不限于MCP/A2A互操作协议、Deep Research Agent、Agentic Coding范式（如Anthropic Claude Code的设计哲学）、Skills可组合架构（如OpenClaw/OpenHands的Skills模式）、多Agent协作系统、推理模型驱动的Agent等最新技术范式——结合虚拟货币领域的业务场景，自主发起创新产品的构思、可行性验证与原型搭建。我们期望你是一个主动定义问题的人，而非等待需求输入。

 

2、负责Agent系统的算法设计与规模化落地

设计并实现面向虚拟货币链上资产分析、交易决策辅助、深度研究与信息聚合等场景的Agent算法方案，涵盖以下核心模块：

  • 任务规划与深度推理（Planning & Extended Thinking）：参考Anthropic Agentic Coding中"先深度思考再行动"的设计哲学，结合Deep Research Agent的自适应搜索规划范式，实现Agent对复杂金融任务的自主拆解、充分推理与多步执行；
  • 技能抽象与可组合架构（Skills Composition）：借鉴OpenClaw的Skills模式，将链上数据查询、K线技术分析、合约风险审计、舆情监控、交易策略执行等能力封装为标准化、可复用的Skill模块，支持Agent根据任务动态选择与编排Skills，并持续沉淀新的Skill以实现能力进化；
  • 工具调用编排（Tool-use Orchestration）：基于MCP协议等标准，实现Agent与链上数据源、行情接口、DeFi协议、分析工具的标准化对接；
  • 多Agent协作（Multi-Agent Collaboration）：借鉴A2A协议思想，构建多Agent协同工作流，支持研究Agent、交易Agent、风控Agent等角色的动态编排与通信；
  • 迭代自我验证与纠错（Iterative Self-Refinement）：深度借鉴Anthropic Claude Code的"执行→验证→修正"闭环机制，构建Agent在金融决策场景中的自主验证与迭代优化能力，确保输出的可靠性与准确性；
  • 环境自主探索与上下文构建：参考Agentic Coding中Agent自主探索代码仓库的范式，实现Agent对链上生态、市场环境的主动感知与全局理解，减少对人工信息喂入的依赖；
  • 长期记忆与知识积累：支持Agent对长周期市场信息的持续跟踪、经验沉淀与知识管理。
  • 推动从概念验证（PoC）到生产级系统的完整闭环。

 

3、构建Agent评估与持续优化体系

引入并定制Agent Harness类评测框架（参考SWE-bench、AgentBench、TAU-bench等业界实践），建立面向虚拟货币Agent产品的标准化评测体系，设计涵盖以下维度的评测指标与Benchmark：

  • 端到端任务完成率
  • 工具调用准确率与Skill组合合理性
  • 多步推理成功率与规划质量
  • 自我纠错与容错回退能力
  • 安全边界遵守率
  • 通过数据驱动的方式持续迭代算法策略，确保Agent在真实业务场景中的可靠性与用户体验。

 

4、驱动跨职能协作与资源整合

作为算法侧的核心驱动者，主动拉通数据、工程、前后端、测试等资源，推动项目高效协作。与产品、业务团队深度配合，将业务洞察转化为技术方案，根据市场反馈快速调整迭代，提升产品竞争力。

 

5、技术前瞻与知识沉淀

持续关注OpenAI、Anthropic、Google DeepMind、开源社区（OpenClaw/OpenHands等）在Agent架构、推理模型、互操作协议、Skills可组合范式、Agentic Coding等方向的最新研究与工程实践，主动输出技术调研报告、竞品分析与可行性方案，为团队技术路线决策提供依据。


任职要求：


1、 硕士及以上学历，计算机科学、人工智能、金融工程、区块链等相关专业；

2、 良好的英文沟通能力，能快速阅读、理解并提炼英文前沿技术文献、开源项目文档与协议规范；

3、 熟悉主流Agent框架与生态（如LangChain/LangGraph、CrewAI、AutoGen、OpenAI Agents SDK、OpenClaw/OpenHands、Dify等），了解MCP/A2A等新兴互操作协议与Skills可组合架构，有基于上述框架成功落地Agent应用的经验；

4、 精通Python编程，熟练掌握至少一种深度学习框架（如PyTorch、TensorFlow）或机器学习库（如Scikit-learn），具备Prompt Engineering、RAG、Fine-tuning、多轮对话管理等LLM应用层核心技能，能独立完成从算法设计到工程部署的全流程；

5、 具备扎实的代码工程能力与系统设计能力，能编写高效、可维护、可扩展的代码，熟悉Git等版本控制工具与协作开发流程；

6、 在国内外知名学术会议或期刊上发表过相关领域论文者优先，或在Kaggle等竞赛平台取得优异成绩者优先；

7、 具备良好的团队协作精神与沟通能力，能与不同背景的人员高效合作，善于将模糊的业务需求抽象为清晰的技术问题并推动解决。

 

加分项﻿

1、 熟悉Web3、区块链、DeFi、虚拟货币等领域的核心概念与业务逻辑，有至少3年股票、期货、虚拟货币等相关行业工作经历，或有实际人工交易/量化交易经验；

2、 有从0到1独立孵化AI Agent产品的经历，熟悉Anthropic Agentic Coding或类似"Agent自主完成端到端任务"的产品研发思路，具备强烈的产品感知力和业务敏感度；

3、 有Agent能力模块化、Skill封装与编排的工程实践经验，理解可组合Agent架构的设计理念；

4、 有构建Agent评测体系（Agent Harness/Benchmark）的经验，了解如何科学衡量Agent的能力边界与改进方向；

5、 对AI在金融科技领域的应用趋势有深入思考，能前瞻性地提出创新方向并主动验证可行性；

6、 具备Builder心态——不满足于完成分配的任务，而是持续主动寻找高价值问题、定义解决方案并推动落地。


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.
jobs.descriptionText:
About us

Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.

Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.

We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!

What you'll do

1. Leading the exploration and incubation of innovative products for Agent technology
Actively keep track of the latest advancements in the field of AI Agents - including but not limited to the MCP/A2A interoperability protocol, Deep Research Agent, the Agentic Coding paradigm (such as the design philosophy of Anthropic Claude Code), the Skills modular architecture (such as the Skills model of OpenClaw/OpenHands), multi-Agent collaboration systems, and Agent driven by reasoning models - combined with the business scenarios in the virtual currency domain, independently initiate the conception, feasibility verification, and prototype construction of innovative products. We expect you to be the one who actively defines the problem, rather than waiting for the input of requirements.

2. Responsible for the algorithm design and large-scale implementation of the Agent system
Design and implement the Agent algorithm solutions for scenarios such as analysis of virtual currency on-chain assets, transaction decision assistance, in-depth research, and information aggregation. The core modules covered include:
Task Planning and Deep Reasoning (Planning & Extended Thinking): Following the design philosophy of "first deep thinking then action" in Anthropic Agentic Coding, combined with the adaptive search planning paradigm of Deep Research Agent, the Agent can autonomously break down complex financial tasks, conduct thorough reasoning, and execute multiple steps;
Skill Abstraction and Composable Architecture (Skills Composition): Drawing on the Skills model of OpenClaw, the capabilities of querying chain data, K-line technical analysis, contract risk auditing, public opinion monitoring, and transaction strategy execution are encapsulated into standardized and reusable Skill modules, enabling the Agent to dynamically select and orchestrate Skills based on tasks and continuously accumulate new Skills to achieve capability evolution;
Tool Invocation Orchestration (Tool-use Orchestration): Based on standard protocols such as MCP, realize standardized connections between the Agent and chain data sources, market interfaces, DeFi protocols, and analysis tools;
Multi-Agent Collaboration (Multi-Agent Collaboration): Drawing on the idea of A2A protocol, build a collaborative workflow for multiple Agents, supporting the dynamic orchestration and communication of roles such as research Agent, trading Agent, and risk control Agent;
Iterative Self-Verification and Correction (Iterative Self-Refinement): Deeply drawing on the "execution → verification → correction" closed-loop mechanism of Anthropic Claude Code, build the Agent's autonomous verification and iterative optimization capabilities in financial decision-making scenarios to ensure the reliability and accuracy of the output;
Autonomous Exploration of the Environment and Context Construction: Referencing the Agent's autonomous exploration of code repositories in Agentic Coding, enable the Agent to actively perceive and comprehensively understand the chain ecosystem and market environment, reducing reliance on manual information input;
Long-term Memory and Knowledge Accumulation: Support the Agent's continuous tracking, experience accumulation, and knowledge management of long-term market information;
Promote a complete closed loop from proof of concept (PoC) to production-level systems.

3. Establish an Agent Evaluation and Continuous Optimization System
Introduce and customize the Agent Harness class evaluation framework (refer to industry practices such as SWE-bench, AgentBench, TAU-bench, etc.), establish a standardized evaluation system for virtual currency Agent products, and design evaluation indicators and Benchmarks covering the following dimensions:
End-to-end task completion rate
Accuracy of tool invocation and rationality of Skill combination
Success rate of multi-step reasoning and quality of planning
Self-correction and fault-tolerant rollback capabilities
Compliance rate of security boundaries
Continuously iterate algorithm strategies through data-driven methods to ensure the reliability of the Agent in real business scenarios and the user experience.

4. Drive cross-functional collaboration and resource integration
As the core driver on the algorithm side, actively integrate data, engineering, front-end and back-end, testing and other resources to promote efficient project collaboration. Work closely with product and business teams to convert business insights into technical solutions, and quickly adjust and iterate based on market feedback to enhance product competitiveness. 

5. Technological Forecasts and Knowledge Accumulation
Continuously monitor the latest research and engineering practices of OpenAI, Anthropic, Google DeepMind, and open-source communities (such as OpenClaw/OpenHands) in areas such as Agent architecture, reasoning models, interoperability protocols, Skills combinable paradigms, and Agentic Coding. Actively produce technical research reports, competitor analyses, and feasibility plans to provide a basis for the team's technical route decisions.

What you'll need

1. Master's degree or above, majoring in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Financial Engineering, Blockchain, etc.
2. Excellent English communication skills, capable of quickly reading, understanding, and extracting English advanced technical literature, open-source project documents, and protocol specifications.
3. Familiar with mainstream Agent frameworks and ecosystems (such as LangChain/LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen, OpenAI Agents SDK, OpenClaw/OpenHands, Dify, etc.), understand emerging interoperability protocols like MCP/A2A and Skills composability architecture, and have successful experience in implementing Agent applications based on these frameworks.
4. Proficient in Python programming, proficient in at least one deep learning framework (such as PyTorch, TensorFlow) or machine learning library (such as Scikit-learn), possess core skills in LLM application layers such as Prompt Engineering, RAG, Fine-tuning, multi-round conversation management, and can independently complete the entire process from algorithm design to engineering deployment.
5. Solid code engineering and system design capabilities, able to write efficient, maintainable, and scalable code, familiar with version control tools like Git and collaborative development processes.
6. Those who have published papers in renowned academic conferences or journals in the relevant field are preferred, or those who have achieved excellent results in competitions on platforms like Kaggle are preferred.
7. Possess good teamwork spirit and communication skills, able to work efficiently with people from different backgrounds, skilled at abstracting vague business requirements into clear technical problems and driving their resolution.

Bonus points:
1. Familiar with core concepts and business logic in areas such as Web3, blockchain, DeFi, and virtual currencies. Have at least 3 years of work experience in related industries such as stocks, futures, and virtual currencies, or have practical experience in manual trading or quantitative trading.
2. Have experience independently incubating AI Agent products. Be familiar with the product development ideas of Anthropic Agentic Coding or similar "Agent autonomously completing end-to-end tasks". Possess a strong sense of product perception and business sensitivity.
3. Have engineering experience in modularizing Agent capabilities, encapsulating Skills, and orchestrating them. Understand the design concept of a composable Agent architecture.
4. Have experience in building Agent evaluation systems (Agent Harness/Benchmark). Understand how to scientifically measure the capability boundaries and improvement directions of Agents.
5. Have in-depth thoughts on the application trends of AI in the financial technology field. Can proactively propose innovative directions and actively verify their feasibility.
6. Possess a Builder mindset - not satisfied with completing assigned tasks, but continuously actively seeking high-value problems, defining solutions, and promoting their implementation.

岗位职责：

1、主导Agent创新产品的探索与孵化
主动跟踪AI Agent领域的前沿进展——包括但不限于MCP/A2A互操作协议、Deep Research Agent、Agentic Coding范式（如Anthropic Claude Code的设计哲学）、Skills可组合架构（如OpenClaw/OpenHands的Skills模式）、多Agent协作系统、推理模型驱动的Agent等最新技术范式——结合虚拟货币领域的业务场景，自主发起创新产品的构思、可行性验证与原型搭建。我们期望你是一个主动定义问题的人，而非等待需求输入。
 
2、负责Agent系统的算法设计与规模化落地
设计并实现面向虚拟货币链上资产分析、交易决策辅助、深度研究与信息聚合等场景的Agent算法方案，涵盖以下核心模块：
任务规划与深度推理（Planning & Extended Thinking）：参考Anthropic Agentic Coding中"先深度思考再行动"的设计哲学，结合Deep Research Agent的自适应搜索规划范式，实现Agent对复杂金融任务的自主拆解、充分推理与多步执行；
技能抽象与可组合架构（Skills Composition）：借鉴OpenClaw的Skills模式，将链上数据查询、K线技术分析、合约风险审计、舆情监控、交易策略执行等能力封装为标准化、可复用的Skill模块，支持Agent根据任务动态选择与编排Skills，并持续沉淀新的Skill以实现能力进化；
工具调用编排（Tool-use Orchestration）：基于MCP协议等标准，实现Agent与链上数据源、行情接口、DeFi协议、分析工具的标准化对接；
多Agent协作（Multi-Agent Collaboration）：借鉴A2A协议思想，构建多Agent协同工作流，支持研究Agent、交易Agent、风控Agent等角色的动态编排与通信；
迭代自我验证与纠错（Iterative Self-Refinement）：深度借鉴Anthropic Claude Code的"执行→验证→修正"闭环机制，构建Agent在金融决策场景中的自主验证与迭代优化能力，确保输出的可靠性与准确性；
环境自主探索与上下文构建：参考Agentic Coding中Agent自主探索代码仓库的范式，实现Agent对链上生态、市场环境的主动感知与全局理解，减少对人工信息喂入的依赖；
长期记忆与知识积累：支持Agent对长周期市场信息的持续跟踪、经验沉淀与知识管理。
推动从概念验证（PoC）到生产级系统的完整闭环。
 
3、构建Agent评估与持续优化体系
引入并定制Agent Harness类评测框架（参考SWE-bench、AgentBench、TAU-bench等业界实践），建立面向虚拟货币Agent产品的标准化评测体系，设计涵盖以下维度的评测指标与Benchmark：
端到端任务完成率
工具调用准确率与Skill组合合理性
多步推理成功率与规划质量
自我纠错与容错回退能力
安全边界遵守率
通过数据驱动的方式持续迭代算法策略，确保Agent在真实业务场景中的可靠性与用户体验。
 
4、驱动跨职能协作与资源整合
作为算法侧的核心驱动者，主动拉通数据、工程、前后端、测试等资源，推动项目高效协作。与产品、业务团队深度配合，将业务洞察转化为技术方案，根据市场反馈快速调整迭代，提升产品竞争力。
 
5、技术前瞻与知识沉淀
持续关注OpenAI、Anthropic、Google DeepMind、开源社区（OpenClaw/OpenHands等）在Agent架构、推理模型、互操作协议、Skills可组合范式、Agentic Coding等方向的最新研究与工程实践，主动输出技术调研报告、竞品分析与可行性方案，为团队技术路线决策提供依据。

任职要求：

1、 硕士及以上学历，计算机科学、人工智能、金融工程、区块链等相关专业；
2、 良好的英文沟通能力，能快速阅读、理解并提炼英文前沿技术文献、开源项目文档与协议规范；
3、 熟悉主流Agent框架与生态（如LangChain/LangGraph、CrewAI、AutoGen、OpenAI Agents SDK、OpenClaw/OpenHands、Dify等），了解MCP/A2A等新兴互操作协议与Skills可组合架构，有基于上述框架成功落地Agent应用的经验；
4、 精通Python编程，熟练掌握至少一种深度学习框架（如PyTorch、TensorFlow）或机器学习库（如Scikit-learn），具备Prompt Engineering、RAG、Fine-tuning、多轮对话管理等LLM应用层核心技能，能独立完成从算法设计到工程部署的全流程；
5、 具备扎实的代码工程能力与系统设计能力，能编写高效、可维护、可扩展的代码，熟悉Git等版本控制工具与协作开发流程；
6、 在国内外知名学术会议或期刊上发表过相关领域论文者优先，或在Kaggle等竞赛平台取得优异成绩者优先；
7、 具备良好的团队协作精神与沟通能力，能与不同背景的人员高效合作，善于将模糊的业务需求抽象为清晰的技术问题并推动解决。
 
加分项﻿
1、 熟悉Web3、区块链、DeFi、虚拟货币等领域的核心概念与业务逻辑，有至少3年股票、期货、虚拟货币等相关行业工作经历，或有实际人工交易/量化交易经验；
2、 有从0到1独立孵化AI Agent产品的经历，熟悉Anthropic Agentic Coding或类似"Agent自主完成端到端任务"的产品研发思路，具备强烈的产品感知力和业务敏感度；
3、 有Agent能力模块化、Skill封装与编排的工程实践经验，理解可组合Agent架构的设计理念；
4、 有构建Agent评测体系（Agent Harness/Benchmark）的经验，了解如何科学衡量Agent的能力边界与改进方向；
5、 对AI在金融科技领域的应用趋势有深入思考，能前瞻性地提出创新方向并主动验证可行性；
6、 具备Builder心态——不满足于完成分配的任务，而是持续主动寻找高价值问题、定义解决方案并推动落地。

Why Bitget?

Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
We offer competitive salaries and benefits
Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!

If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!

By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Business Development Manager (Korean speaker)
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • Drive Trading Volume & FTT Growth: Identify, recruit, and manage KOLs, affiliates, trading groups, and communities across East Asia that can deliver measurable trading activity (FTTs, 100FTTs, trading volume) rather than only content creation.
  • Performance-Oriented Partnerships: Build and negotiate partnerships with KOLs, affiliates, and institutional partners based on volume-driven KPIs, ensuring accountability and sustainable ROI.
  • Campaign Execution & Monitoring: Execute trading-focused campaigns (e.g., signals, copy trading, trading contests, affiliate pushes, trading education sessions) designed to maximize active user trading and volume growth.
  • Performance Tracking & Optimization: Monitor and analyze performance metrics (FTT, trading volume, ROI per partner) and continuously optimize strategies to ensure consistent achievement of business targets.
  • Market Intelligence: Stay informed about industry developments, competitor strategies, and user trading behaviors across East Asia to design effective, compliance-aligned, volume-driven initiatives.
  • Retention & Community Building: Work with KOLs, affiliates, and trading leaders to establish sustainable trading communities (VIP groups, copy trading channels, institutional partnerships) that drive long-term engagement and recurring volume.


What you'll need


  • Proven track record in business development, affiliate/KOL management, or institutional partnerships in the Crypto/Fintech/Trading industry.
  • Existing network of trading KOLs, communities, affiliates, and institutional contacts across East Asia is highly desirable.
  • Familiarity with both crypto and traditional finance markets, with the ability to bridge relationships between institutional players and retail trading communities.
  • Strong understanding of crypto trading funnels (sign-up → KYC → FTT → 100FTT → retention) and what drives real trading volume.
  • Excellent negotiation, interpersonal, and relationship management skills.
  • Analytical and data-driven mindset; able to measure, report, and optimize partner performance against volume targets.
  • Strong written and verbal communication skills in English and Korean.
  • Passion for crypto trading and financial markets, with the ability to engage, influence, and build trust with both retail and institutional stakeholders.
  • Ability to perform under pressure with clear performance-based targets tied directly to trading metrics.



Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Operations Manager (Korean Speaker)
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What You’ll Do


  • Plan and execute integrated marketing campaigns aligned with platform goals and user needs, while managing budgets and optimizing performance.
  • Monitor campaign results, analyze performance metrics, and refine strategies to enhance user experience and ROI.
  • Drive user acquisition and transaction growth through targeted channel operations and data-driven resource allocation.
  • Develop and implement user growth strategies to improve engagement, retention, and lifetime value across the user lifecycle.
  • Build and enhance data analysis frameworks to track operational metrics and continuously optimize performance.
  • Conduct competitive and industry analysis to identify trends, benchmark best practices, and recommend strategic improvements.


What You’ll Need


  • At least 2 years of experience in web3 or crypto industry operations, preferably with overseas market exposure. (Outstanding candidates may be considered with less experience)
  • Solid understanding of user growth strategies.
  • Proven expertise in campaign planning, execution, and data analysis.
  • Strong communication, collaboration, and ability to perform under pressure.
  • Fluency in Korean, English or Chinese.


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey

jobs.title: VIP Relationship Manager-Germany
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What You’ll Do

  • Manage and grow a portfolio of VIP trading clients, focusing on retention, engagement, and asset growth.
  • Drive key VIP metrics including trading volume, onboarding conversion, and growth.
  • Provide high-touch, one-on-one relationship management tailored to client trading behavior and needs.
  • Analyze client trading patterns and performance data to identify engagement and growth opportunities.
  • Share market insights, trading strategies, and product updates to support active trading.
  • Build and maintain long-term relationships with VIP clients, including occasional in-person meetings when required.

What You’ll Need

  • Native-level German and professional working proficiency in English (required).
  • Bachelor’s degree or above.
  • 1–3 years of experience in VIP client management, relationship management, key account management, or similar roles.
  • Experience in crypto exchanges or Web3 is a strong plus; candidates from traditional finance (futures, derivatives, brokerage, CFD trading) are also welcome.
  • Hands-on experience or strong understanding of leveraged trading, futures, or derivatives products (required).
  • Strong communication skills, high responsiveness, and a client-oriented mindset.


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey

About us

Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.

Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.

We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!

What You’ll Do
Manage and grow a portfolio of VIP trading clients, focusing on retention, engagement, and asset growth.
Drive key VIP metrics including trading volume, onboarding conversion, and growth.
Provide high-touch, one-on-one relationship management tailored to client trading behavior and needs.
Analyze client trading patterns and performance data to identify engagement and growth opportunities.
Share market insights, trading strategies, and product updates to support active trading.
Build and maintain long-term relationships with VIP clients, including occasional in-person meetings when required.
What You’ll Need
Native-level German and professional working proficiency in English (required).
Bachelor’s degree or above.
1–3 years of experience in VIP client management, relationship management, key account management, or similar roles.
Experience in crypto exchanges or Web3 is a strong plus; candidates from traditional finance (futures, derivatives, brokerage, CFD trading) are also welcome.
Hands-on experience or strong understanding of leveraged trading, futures, or derivatives products (required).
Strong communication skills, high responsiveness, and a client-oriented mindset.

Why Bitget?

Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
We offer competitive salaries and benefits
Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!

If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!

By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: KOL Business Development(Poland)
jobs.descriptionHtml:
What You’ll Do:

  • Identify and build relationships with local KOLs, influencers, communities, projects, and other potential partners to promote Bitget in the local market and achieve user and trading volume growth.
  • As a representative of Bitget, maintain strong relationships with KOLs and marketing channels to ensure long-term collaboration.
  • Manage and track the execution and performance of KOL marketing strategies, making adjustments to ensure optimal performance and maximum ROI.
  • Stay informed on local industry trends, developments, and competitor activities, and adapt strategies accordingly.
  • Organize and participate in offline events, including meetups, community gatherings, and industry activities, to support KOL collaboration and drive trading growth.


What You’ll Need:

  • Bachelor’s degree or above.
  • Good understanding of the European KOL ecosystem.
  • Native or fluent proficiency in Polish; professional working proficiency in English.

  • Proven ability to drive real trading volume via KOLs or growth partnerships.
  • Results-driven mindset with the ability to work towards clear, volume-based performance targets.

jobs.title: BGW Flutter Engineer 客户端Flutter开发
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget Wallet is the non-custodial crypto wallet designed to make crypto simple and secure for everyone. With over 80 million users, we bring together a full suite of crypto services, including swaps, market insights, staking, rewards, DApp exploration, and payment solutions. Supporting 130+ blockchains and millions of tokens, Bitget Wallet enables seamless multi-chain trading across hundreds of DEXs and cross-chain bridges. Backed by a $300+ million user protection fund, it ensures the highest level of security for users' assets.


What you'll do


  • Develop and maintain Web3 wallet-related features based on the Flutter framework, ensuring an excellent user experience.
  • Work closely with cross-functional teams to deliver business requirements.
  • Participate in client-side technical infrastructure to enhance development efficiency and performance.


What you'll do


  • Bachelor’s degree or above in Computer Science or related field, with 5+ years of mobile development experience and 2+ years of Flutter development experience; experience at major tech companies is a plus.
  • Proficient in Dart programming language, with a deep understanding of Flutter’s rendering mechanism and cross-platform development processes.
  • Solid programming fundamentals, familiarity with common design patterns, and a strong focus on code quality and performance.
  • Capable of native development for both Android and iOS platforms.
  • Experience in client-side technical infrastructure (such as technical metrics monitoring, CI/CD, technical components).
  • Familiar with basic blockchain principles.


岗位职责


  • 基于Flutter框架，开发和维护web3 Wallet方向的相关需求，确保良好的用户体验。
  • 与各职能团队紧密合作，推动业务需求落地。
  • 参与客户技术基建工作，提升开发效率、性能体验。


任职要求


  • 计算机科学或相关专业本科及以上学历，5 年及以上移动开发经验，2 年及以上 Flutter 开发经验，有大厂经验。
  • 精通 Dart 编程语言，深刻理解 Flutter 的渲染机制和跨平台开发流程。
  • 具备扎实的编程基础，熟悉常用的设计模式，重视代码质量和性能体验。
  • 具备 Android 和 iOS 原生开发能力。
  • 有客户端技术基建经验（如技术指标采集监控、CI/CD、技术组件）。
  • 熟悉区块链基本原理。



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Smart Contract Engineer 智能合约工程师
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget Wallet is the non-custodial crypto wallet designed to make crypto simple and secure for everyone. With over 80 million users, we bring together a full suite of crypto services, including swaps, market insights, staking, rewards, DApp exploration, and payment solutions. Supporting 130+ blockchains and millions of tokens, Bitget Wallet enables seamless multi-chain trading across hundreds of DEXs and cross-chain bridges. Backed by a $300+ million user protection fund, it ensures the highest level of security for users' assets.


What you'll do


  • Design, develop, self-test, and deploy smart contracts using Solidity or other smart contract languages, ensuring the security and reliability of business logic.
  • Develop smart contracts for multiple heterogeneous blockchain ecosystems (including but not limited to EVM, Solana, Move-based chains), and assist the team in building business capabilities across these chains.
  • Work closely with various business teams to address technical challenges in smart contract and cross-chain capability development. Assist other business lines or developers in overcoming critical technical roadblocks.
  • Keep up with cutting-edge blockchain technologies and standards. Quickly understand and learn new technologies and tools, and regularly provide accurate and high-quality reports or conclusions to the R&D team.


What you'll need


  • At least 2 years of in-depth development experience in Solidity or other smart contract languages (such as Rust).
  • Experience participating in the full development lifecycle of smart contract projects on Ethereum, Solana, or other major blockchain platforms.
  • Familiarity with smart contract security vulnerabilities and secure coding practices; strong security awareness, ability to thoroughly analyze security incidents and share insights within the team.
  • Deep understanding of blockchain technologies and heterogeneous chain concepts; solid knowledge of blockchain operational mechanisms.
  • In-depth understanding of the implementation principles behind mainstream DeFi projects; able to conduct research on advanced technologies and share insights with the team.
  • Excellent teamwork and communication skills, able to work effectively with team members.
  • Good documentation skills, able to clearly record design and implementation details.
  • Strong sense of ownership.


岗位职责


  • 使用Solidity或其他智能合约语言设计、开发、自测、部署智能合约。确保合约业务的安全、可靠。
  • 可以面向多个异构链生态（包括但不限于EVM、Solana、Move系）进行智能合约开发，并且能协助团队在异构链生态的各业务建设。
  • 与各业务团队密切合作，解决智能合约和异构链能力建设等方面的技术挑战。协助其他业务线或开发人员解决技术攻关
  • 持续关注前沿的区块链技术和标准，迅速理解和学习新技术和工具，并面向产研团队定期输出准确优秀的结论或报告


任职要求


  • 至少具备两年以上的 Solidity 或其他智能合约语言（如rust）的深入开发经验
  • 在Ethereum、Solana或其他主流区块链平台上参与过完整的智能合约项目开发
  • 熟悉智能合约安全漏洞及安全编码实现，具备良好的安全意识，能透彻的分析安全事件并在团队内分享
  • 具备对区块链技术和异构链概念深刻的理解，深入理解区块链运行机制。
  • 对主流DeFi项目的实现原理有深入的了解，能够对前沿技术进行深入调研及团队分享
  • 出色的团队协作和沟通能力，能够有效与团队成员协调工作。
  • 良好的文档编写能力，能够清晰记录设计和实现细节。
  • Owner意识


加分项

  • 至少两年以上智能合约开发经验（不限语言，包括但不限于Solidity、Rust、Move、FunC）
  • 有大型项目开发经验、合约安全相关经验，能提供项目开源链接（Github或者区块浏览器都可以）
  • 合约项目是原创开发，并不是简单Fork
  • 熟悉Solana特性，有丰富的开发经验，主导过从方案设计到开发部署的完整项目。



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Risk Control & Data Analyst 风控审核数据分析岗
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is the world's largest Universal Exchange (UEX), serving over 125 million users and offering access to over 2M crypto tokens, 100+ tokenized stocks, ETFs, commodities, FX, and precious metals such as gold. The ecosystem is committed to helping users trade smarter with its AI agent, which co-pilots trade execution.


Bitget is driving crypto adoption through strategic partnerships with LALIGA and MotoGP™. Aligned with its global impact strategy, Bitget has joined hands with UNICEF to support blockchain education for 1.1 million people by 2027. Bitget currently leads in the tokenized TradFi market, providing the industry's lowest fees and highest liquidity across 150 regions worldwide.


What you'll do


  1. Conduct daily review and disposition of core exchange risk scenarios, including but not limited to abnormal transactions, on-chain deposits/withdrawals, unusual fund movements, KYC, P2P, promotional/activity risks, and group-related fraud rings; independently perform risk assessment, evidence analysis, and disposition decisions.
  2. Own risk event and audit data analysis — independently perform data extraction, metric design, and monitoring solution setup based on business scenarios; continuously track core metrics such as ticket volume, review turnaround time, accuracy rate, risk leakage, fund losses, abnormal users, and strategy effectiveness.
  3. Demonstrate strong SQL skills, including multi-table joins, complex conditional filtering, window functions, aggregation, and anomaly data investigation; independently support risk investigations, ad-hoc analysis, and audit dashboard development.
  4. Design and build risk monitoring dashboards — break down core metrics, thresholds, time windows, and alert rules based on business risk; drive visualization of audit, risk, and strategy data to promptly detect abnormal fluctuations and potential fund loss risks.
  5. Proficiently use AI coding and productivity tools such as Claude Code and Cursor to assist with data analysis, SQL development, rule structuring, automation workflow design, and daily work efficiency improvement.
  6. Independently author and maintain AI Skills — translate manual review SOPs, risk judgment logic, data extraction rules, and disposition standards into clear, executable, and verifiable AI-driven review workflows, and continuously optimize based on backtesting results.


What you'll need


  • IPrior experience in risk control review/auditing
  • Basic understanding of crypto spot and futures/contract trading
  • Strong sense of responsibility, patience, and team collaboration skills


岗位职责

  • 负责交易所核心风险场景的日常审核与处置，包括但不限于异常交易、链上充提、资金异动、KYC、P2P、活动风险、团伙关联等场景，能够独立完成风险研判、证据分析和处置决策。
  • 负责风险事件及审核数据分析，能够根据业务场景独立完成数据取数、指标设计和监控方案搭建，持续监控工单量、审核时效、准确率、风险漏过、资损、异常用户及策略效果等核心指标。
  • 具备较强 SQL 能力，能够熟练使用 SQL 完成多表关联、复杂条件筛选、窗口分析、聚合统计及异常数据排查，独立支持风险排查、专项分析和审核看板建设。
  • 负责风险监控看板的设计与建设，能够根据业务风险拆解核心指标、阈值、时间窗口和预警规则，推动审核数据、风险数据和策略数据可视化，及时发现异常波动及潜在资损风险。
  • 熟练使用 Claude Code、Cursor 等 AI 编程及效率工具，能够借助 AI 完成数据分析、SQL 编写、规则梳理、自动化流程设计及日常工作提效。
  • 能够独立编写和维护 AI Skill，将人工审核 SOP、风险判断逻辑、取数规则和处置标准转化为结构清晰、可执行、可验证的 AI 审核流程，并持续根据回测结果进行优化。


岗位要求

  • ﻿有风控审核经验
  • 对币圈现货、合约有一定了解
  • 强烈的责任心、耐心和团队合作能力


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!For more information regarding candidates' personal data processing, please refer to Bitget Candidate Privacy Notice.
jobs.descriptionText:
About us

Bitget is the world's largest Universal Exchange (UEX), serving over 125 million users and offering access to over 2M crypto tokens, 100+ tokenized stocks, ETFs, commodities, FX, and precious metals such as gold. The ecosystem is committed to helping users trade smarter with its AI agent, which co-pilots trade execution.

Bitget is driving crypto adoption through strategic partnerships with LALIGA and MotoGP™. Aligned with its global impact strategy, Bitget has joined hands with UNICEF to support blockchain education for 1.1 million people by 2027. Bitget currently leads in the tokenized TradFi market, providing the industry's lowest fees and highest liquidity across 150 regions worldwide.

What you'll do

Conduct daily review and disposition of core exchange risk scenarios, including but not limited to abnormal transactions, on-chain deposits/withdrawals, unusual fund movements, KYC, P2P, promotional/activity risks, and group-related fraud rings; independently perform risk assessment, evidence analysis, and disposition decisions.
Own risk event and audit data analysis — independently perform data extraction, metric design, and monitoring solution setup based on business scenarios; continuously track core metrics such as ticket volume, review turnaround time, accuracy rate, risk leakage, fund losses, abnormal users, and strategy effectiveness.
Demonstrate strong SQL skills, including multi-table joins, complex conditional filtering, window functions, aggregation, and anomaly data investigation; independently support risk investigations, ad-hoc analysis, and audit dashboard development.
Design and build risk monitoring dashboards — break down core metrics, thresholds, time windows, and alert rules based on business risk; drive visualization of audit, risk, and strategy data to promptly detect abnormal fluctuations and potential fund loss risks.
Proficiently use AI coding and productivity tools such as Claude Code and Cursor to assist with data analysis, SQL development, rule structuring, automation workflow design, and daily work efficiency improvement.
Independently author and maintain AI Skills — translate manual review SOPs, risk judgment logic, data extraction rules, and disposition standards into clear, executable, and verifiable AI-driven review workflows, and continuously optimize based on backtesting results.

What you'll need

IPrior experience in risk control review/auditing
Basic understanding of crypto spot and futures/contract trading
Strong sense of responsibility, patience, and team collaboration skills

岗位职责
负责交易所核心风险场景的日常审核与处置，包括但不限于异常交易、链上充提、资金异动、KYC、P2P、活动风险、团伙关联等场景，能够独立完成风险研判、证据分析和处置决策。
负责风险事件及审核数据分析，能够根据业务场景独立完成数据取数、指标设计和监控方案搭建，持续监控工单量、审核时效、准确率、风险漏过、资损、异常用户及策略效果等核心指标。
具备较强 SQL 能力，能够熟练使用 SQL 完成多表关联、复杂条件筛选、窗口分析、聚合统计及异常数据排查，独立支持风险排查、专项分析和审核看板建设。
负责风险监控看板的设计与建设，能够根据业务风险拆解核心指标、阈值、时间窗口和预警规则，推动审核数据、风险数据和策略数据可视化，及时发现异常波动及潜在资损风险。
熟练使用 Claude Code、Cursor 等 AI 编程及效率工具，能够借助 AI 完成数据分析、SQL 编写、规则梳理、自动化流程设计及日常工作提效。
能够独立编写和维护 AI Skill，将人工审核 SOP、风险判断逻辑、取数规则和处置标准转化为结构清晰、可执行、可验证的 AI 审核流程，并持续根据回测结果进行优化。

岗位要求
﻿有风控审核经验
对币圈现货、合约有一定了解
强烈的责任心、耐心和团队合作能力

Why Bitget?

Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions 
We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
We offer competitive salaries and benefits
Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!

If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!For more information regarding candidates' personal data processing, please refer to Bitget Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Professional Trading Clients Operations Manager 专业交易客户高级运营经理
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is the world's largest Universal Exchange (UEX), serving over 125 million users and offering access to over 2M crypto tokens, 100+ tokenized stocks, ETFs, commodities, FX, and precious metals such as gold. The ecosystem is committed to helping users trade smarter with its AI agent, which co-pilots trade execution.


Bitget is driving crypto adoption through strategic partnerships with LALIGA and MotoGP™. Aligned with its global impact strategy, Bitget has joined hands with UNICEF to support blockchain education for 1.1 million people by 2027. Bitget currently leads in the tokenized TradFi market, providing the industry's lowest fees and highest liquidity across 150 regions worldwide.


岗位职责

  • 面向 VIP、API、量化及机构客户，基于 API、UTA、借贷、费率、账户结构、风控等需求，提供专业交易产品解决方案。
  • 协同产品、技术、风控、BD、RM 等团队，推动客户问题解决、产品需求落地及专业交易能力迭代。
  • 制定 API 与机构客户运营增长策略，提升专业交易用户规模、交易量、资产沉淀及产品渗透率。
  • 策划专业交易客户活动、费率政策、权益方案及专项激励，支持区域团队获客与转化。
  • 推动 UTA 杠杆、质押借贷、配资等业务增长，建立 VIP配资与借贷处理 SOP。
  • 支持期权、美股、股票代币、数字货币等多品类专业交易客户需求，沉淀典型客户案例和解决方案。
  • 搭建客户需求与问题跟踪机制，输出 FAQ、SOP、培训材料及客户方案，为区域 BD/RM 提供中台支持。


岗位要求

  • 5年以上交易所、券商、机构业务、VIP运营、API客户运营或借贷业务相关经验。
  • 熟悉数字货币现货、合约、期权、统一账户、API交易、借贷、保证金等产品。
  • 有机构客户、量化团队、做市商、API客户、大客户运营经验者优先。
  • 具备较强的产品理解、业务分析、客户需求拆解和跨部门项目推动能力。
  • 具备数据驱动思维，能够围绕交易量、资产规模、借贷余额、客户留存等指标制定运营策略。
  • 中文和英文流利，能够独立完成客户沟通、方案输出和内部培训。
  • 有 Binance、OKX、Bybit、Deribit、券商 PB、量化机构或做市商相关经验者优先。


Why Bitget?

  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!


If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


For more information regarding candidates' personal data processing, please refer to Bitget Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: TradFi Futures Operations TradFi合约运营
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is the world's largest Universal Exchange (UEX), serving over 125 million users and offering access to over 2M crypto tokens, 100+ tokenized stocks, ETFs, commodities, FX, and precious metals such as gold. The ecosystem is committed to helping users trade smarter with its AI agent, which co-pilots trade execution.


Bitget is driving crypto adoption through strategic partnerships with LALIGA and MotoGP™. Aligned with its global impact strategy, Bitget has joined hands with UNICEF to support blockchain education for 1.1 million people by 2027. Bitget currently leads in the tokenized TradFi market, providing the industry's lowest fees and highest liquidity across 150 regions worldwide.


What you'll do


  • Identify market trends and hotspots, including precious metals, commodities, U.S. equity themes, and IPOs; collaborate on the listing and delisting evaluation of TradFi futures/contracts, and quickly drive marketing and promotional campaigns around trending opportunities.
  • Coordinate with the content team to produce market analysis, investor education content, and market commentary related to TradFi futures/contracts, enhancing user awareness and engagement.
  • Collaborate on the planning of TradFi futures/contracts trading campaigns and competitions, as well as related marketing and promotional strategies.
  • Monitor order book depth, bid-ask spreads, and other liquidity indicators of TradFi trading pairs; promptly identify liquidity anomalies and drive resolution with relevant teams.


What you'll need


  • More than 3 years of experience in crypto futures/derivatives operations or operations within the traditional brokerage industry.
  • Deep understanding of TradFi assets, including precious metals, commodities, and equities.
  • Strong data analysis capabilities.
  • Results-oriented, with strong project execution and cross-functional collaboration skills.
  • Preferred: English can be used as a working language.


岗位职责：

  • 识别市场热点（贵金属、大宗商品、美股热点、IPO），协同Tradfi合约上下币评估，快速推动热点宣发。
  • 协调内容团队产出TradFi合约相关行情分析、投教内容、市场解读，提升用户认知与参与度。
  • 协同TradFi合约活动交易赛的策划，宣发与推广策略。
  • 追踪TradFi 币对盘口深度、价差等，及时发现流动性异常并推动解决。


任职要求：

  • 3 年以上加密货币合约运营或传统券商行业运营经验
  • 对 TradFi 资产（贵金属/大宗商品/股票） 有深入理解
  • 具备较强数据分析能力。
  • 结果导向，有较强的项目推动力和跨部门协作能力
  • 加分项：英语可作为工作语言。


Why Bitget?

  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!


If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


For more information regarding candidates' personal data processing, please refer to Bitget Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: VIP Client Operations Manager  券商VIP客户运营
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • Deeply analyze the pain points and needs of VIP users, improve the VIP services and rights of the platform, and improve the retention and activity of major customers through effective operation strategies.
  • Combining important businesses such as spot trading, contracts, wealth management, and US stock tokens, we can output effective strategies for VIPs, increase their user base and product penetration.
  • Work closely with the product team, business team, Customer Manager (RM), and regional marketing team to integrate resources and develop and implement effective VIP growth strategies.
  • Based on Data Analysis and growth needs, optimize VIP layering and lifecycle management system to improve business target effectiveness.
  • Monitor market trends and competitor dynamics, adjust operational strategies in a timely manner, and maintain a leading competitive advantage.
  • Plan and organize marketing activities for VIP customers, improve customer participation and active level through content operation, marketing activities, etc., and promote the deepening of Customer relationship.


What you'll need


  • Language proficiency: Proficient in Chinese and English, able to communicate fluently in writing and speaking.
  • Work experience: More than 2 years of user operation related work experience, with experience in large customer operations preferred.
  • Industry experience: Experience in the digital currency industry or traditional financial industry is preferred.
  • Professional Ability: Strong business thinking and resource integration ability, excellent XFN communication and collaboration ability; Excellent business thinking, logical analysis and systematic planning ability, sensitive to data, able to quickly identify market dynamics and customer demand changes.


岗位职责

  • 结合TradFi（股票代币、CFD等）产品，输出针对VIP的运营策略，提升VIP用户规模、产品渗透度、交易规模；
  • 与产品团队、业务团队、客户经理（RM）及区域市场团队紧密合作，整合资源，制定实施有效的VIP增长策略；
  • 跟进及统筹解决各类VIP客户针对股票代币、股票合约、TradFI的交易问题，能推动产品侧持续迭代；
  • 策划并组织针对VIP客户的股票代币营销活动、投资分享会，通过内容运营、投教活动等，协助获客推广；
  • 基于数据分析与增长需求，优化TradFi业务在VIP的生命周期管理体系，以提升业务目标效果；
  • 监控市场趋势及竞争对手动态，及时调整运营策略，保持领先竞争优势。


岗位要求

  • 语言能力：精通中文和英文，能够进行流畅的书面和口头沟通；
  • 工作经验：具有3年以上用户运营相关工作经验，有券商大客户运营、券商销售或投资分析经验优先；
  • 行业经验：数字货币行业合约和Tradfi业务运营、美股券商行业经验优先；
  • 专业能力：具备较强的业务思维和资源整合能力，出色的跨部门沟通与协作能力；拥有优秀的商业思维、逻辑分析和系统性规划能力，对数据敏感，能够快速识别市场动态与客户需求变化。



Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

语言能力：精通中文和英文，能够进行流畅的书面和口头沟通；
工作经验：具有3年以上用户运营相关工作经验，有券商大客户运营、券商销售或投资分析经验优先；
行业经验：数字货币行业合约和Tradfi业务运营、美股券商行业经验优先；
专业能力：具备较强的业务思维和资源整合能力，出色的跨部门沟通与协作能力；拥有优秀的商业思维、逻辑分析和系统性规划能力，对数据敏感，能够快速识别市场动态与客户需求变化。

jobs.title: Compliance Officer/ MLRO (Kazakhstan)
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is the world's largest Universal Exchange (UEX), serving over 125 million users and offering access to over 2M crypto tokens, 100+ tokenized stocks, ETFs, commodities, FX, and precious metals such as gold. The ecosystem is committed to helping users trade smarter with its AI agent, which co-pilots trade execution.


Bitget is driving crypto adoption through strategic partnerships with LALIGA and MotoGP™. Aligned with its global impact strategy, Bitget has joined hands with UNICEF to support blockchain education for 1.1 million people by 2027. Bitget currently leads in the tokenized TradFi market, providing the industry's lowest fees and highest liquidity across 150 regions worldwide.


What you'll do


  • Assist in the AFSA license application process and maintain ongoing compliance.
  • Develop and implement compliance frameworks, policies, and procedures.
  • Conduct AML/CTF monitoring, including transaction reviews and suspicious activity reporting (SAR).
  • Perform risk assessments and internal audits to identify gaps.
  • Liaise with AFSA and other regulators (e.g. AIFC).
  • Train staff on compliance protocols and AML updates.
  • Investigate breaches and recommend corrective actions.
  • Stay updated on Astana and Kazakhstan's crypto regulations and global trends.


What you'll need


  • Bachelor’s degree in Law, Finance, or related field.
  • 5+ years in compliance within financial services/crypto/fintech.
  • Expertise in AFSA regulations, Astana and Kazakhstan AML laws, and international standards (FATF).
  • Certifications: CAMS, ICA Diploma in AML, or equivalent.
  • Strong analytical, communication, and leadership skills.
  • Experience with blockchain analytics tools (e.g., Chainalysis).
  • Knowledge of cross-border compliance challenges.



Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!


If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!



For more information regarding candidates' personal data processing, please refer to Bitget Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us

  • Own the merchant management operations — design and optimize merchant business systems, operational mechanisms, and growth strategies from scratch
  • Plan and execute merchant-facing campaigns, identify business expansion opportunities, and drive sustainable growth through structured operation plans
  • Set and track operational goals across different scenarios and markets, boost merchant community engagement through data-driven, fine-grained management
  • Work cross-functionally with product, risk, growth, and regional teams to remove blockers and hit operational targets
  • Stay close to business trends and industry dynamics, turn insights into actionable product improvement suggestions


What you'll need


  • Bachelor's degree or above; bilingual in English and Chinese
  • Solid experience in event planning and merchant relationship management — ran community operations or business operation projects before

We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. jobs.title: Live Streaming Growth Operations(Part-time) 直播增长运营（兼职）
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is the world's largest Universal Exchange (UEX), serving over 125 million users and offering access to over 2M crypto tokens, 100+ tokenized stocks, ETFs, commodities, FX, and precious metals such as gold. The ecosystem is committed to helping users trade smarter with its AI agent, which co-pilots trade execution.


Bitget is driving crypto adoption through strategic partnerships with LALIGA and MotoGP™. Aligned with its global impact strategy, Bitget has joined hands with UNICEF to support blockchain education for 1.1 million people by 2027. Bitget currently leads in the tokenized TradFi market, providing the industry's lowest fees and highest liquidity across 150 regions worldwide.


What you'll do


  • Responsible for expanding streamer, KOL, and content partnership resources for the exchange’s live streaming business, continuously enriching the live content ecosystem.
  • Identify and build partnerships with traders, analysts, KOLs, project teams, communities, and MCN agencies to drive the supply of high-quality live streaming content.
  • Manage the full lifecycle of streamers and partners, including recruitment, contracting, onboarding, training, incentive design, and day-to-day operational maintenance.
  • Support the planning and execution of live streaming campaigns, AMAs, trading competitions, trending-topic sessions, and other content initiatives to increase user activity and engagement.
  • Work closely with marketing, community, and business teams to integrate live streaming content with trading products and business goals, improving user conversion and trading activity.
  • Continuously monitor industry trends and competitors’ live streaming ecosystems to identify potential partnership resources and growth opportunities.
  • Track partnership performance and conduct data analysis; regularly review results and optimize operational strategies.


What you'll need


Basic Requirements

  • 2+ years of experience in internet platforms, live streaming platforms, content platforms, community operations, or business development.
  • Solid understanding of the crypto industry, including the Crypto KOL ecosystem, community ecosystem, and content distribution methods.
  • Strong communication and business development skills, with the ability to independently drive partnership discussions and execution.
  • Results-oriented, with strong resource development awareness and execution capability.

Preferred Qualifications

  • Experience working at a crypto exchange, Web3 project, MCN agency, or live streaming platform.
  • Existing resources among Crypto KOLs, streamers, communities, or project teams.
  • Familiarity with overseas content platforms such as X / Twitter, Telegram, Discord, YouTube, and TikTok.
  • Experience in creator operations, streamer operations, business partnerships, or user growth.
  • Ability to use English as a working language is preferred.

Ideal Candidate Profile

  • Enjoys working with people and is strong at developing and maintaining relationships.
  • Proactively identifies and develops resources instead of waiting for opportunities to come in.
  • Understands the Crypto content ecosystem and knows who is creating content, who has traffic, and who can bring value.
  • Comfortable with frequent external communication and business negotiations.
  • Does not necessarily need to be a senior operations professional, but should have strong BD capabilities and resource sensitivity.

One-Sentence Summary

  • We are looking for a growth operations professional who can bring in streamers, KOLs, and high-quality content; activate partnerships; and build a vibrant live streaming ecosystem. For this role, resource development and BD capabilities are more important than pure operations experience.


岗位职责：

  • 负责交易所直播业务的主播、KOL及内容合作资源拓展，持续丰富直播内容生态。
  • 挖掘并建立与交易员、分析师、KOL、项目方、社区及MCN机构的合作关系，推动优质直播内容供给。
  • 跟进主播及合作伙伴全生命周期管理，包括招募、签约、培训、激励及日常运营维护。
  • 协助策划并执行直播活动、AMA、交易赛事、热点专题等内容项目，提升用户活跃度和参与度。
  • 联动市场、社区及业务团队，推动直播内容与交易业务结合，提升用户转化及交易活跃度。
  • 持续跟踪行业动态和竞品直播生态，挖掘潜在合作资源及增长机会。
  • 负责合作效果跟踪与数据分析，定期复盘并优化运营策略。


任职要求：

基础要求

  • 2年以上互联网、直播平台、内容平台、社区运营或商务拓展（BD）经验。
  • 对加密货币行业有一定了解，熟悉Crypto KOL生态、社区生态及内容传播方式。
  • 具备较强的沟通能力和商务拓展能力，能够独立推进合作洽谈及落地执行。
  • 结果导向，具备较强的资源开拓意识和执行力。

优先考虑

  • 有交易所、Web3项目、MCN机构或直播平台工作经验。
  • 拥有Crypto领域KOL、主播、社区或项目方资源。
  • 熟悉X（Twitter）、Telegram、Discord、YouTube、TikTok等海外内容平台生态。
  • 有达人运营、主播运营、商务合作或用户增长相关经验。
  • 英语可作为工作语言者优先。

理想候选人画像

  • 喜欢与人打交道，擅长拓展和维护关系；
  • 能主动挖掘资源，不等资源找上门；
  • 熟悉Crypto内容生态，知道谁在做内容、谁有流量、谁能带来价值；
  • 能接受较高频率的对外沟通和商务谈判；
  • 不一定是资深运营，但要有较强的BD属性和资源敏感度。

一句话总结：

  • 寻找一个能把主播、KOL和优质内容“拉进来”、把合作“跑起来”、把直播生态“做热起来”的增长运营。对于这个岗位来说，资源和BD能力的重要性会高于纯运营能力。


Why Bitget?

  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!


If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


For more information regarding candidates' personal data processing, please refer to Bitget Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Compliance Product Manager 合规产品经理
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • Work with Compliance and Legal to interpret licensing and regulatory requirements and convert them into clear product requirements and user journeys.
  • Design high-level product solutions for regulated sites/products, balancing compliance, user experience, and technical feasibility.
  • Coordinate cross-functional teams (Product, Engineering, Data, Design, Operations, Support) to produce detailed designs, user stories, and acceptance criteria.
  • Ensure end-to-end alignment and traceability from regulatory requirement → product design → implementation → evidence/documentation.
  • Support PMO/project teams with solution expertise: clarify scope, manage dependencies, identify risks/issues, and support timely delivery.
  • Drive stakeholder communication and decision-making forums; document decisions, trade-offs, and implementation rationale.
  • Support launch readiness and post-launch optimization, including operational processes and control monitoring where needed.


What you'll need


  • 7+ years of product management experience, including significant experience in financial services compliance/regulatory products.
  • Strong experience partnering with Compliance and Legal teams and delivering product changes to meet regulatory or licensing expectations.
  • Ability to learn quickly, think logically, and structure complex problems into executable plans.
  • Strong communication and stakeholder management skills across technical and non-technical teams.
  • Strong documentation and product execution skills (PRD/user stories/flows).
  • Fluent in both English and Mandarin (spoken and written) is required.
  • Crypto industry experience is an advantage; passion for crypto is highly preferred.

Nice to Have

  • Experience with KYC/KYB, sanctions screening, AML controls, disclosures, record retention, regulatory reporting, or audit/exam support.
  • Experience working in fast-paced, multi-market regulatory environments.


岗位职责：


  • 与合规和法律部门合作，了解许可和监管要求，并将其转化为明确的产品要求和用户旅程。
  • 为受监管的网站/产品设计高级产品解决方案，平衡合规性、用户体验和技术可行性。
  • 协调跨职能团队（产品、工程、数据、设计、运营、支持）以制定详细的设计、用户故事和验收标准。
  • 确保从法规要求→产品设计→实施→证据/留档的端到端对齐和可追溯性。
  • 支持具有解决方案专业知识的PMO/项目团队：明确范围，管理依赖关系，识别风险/问题，并支持及时交付。
  • 推动利益相关者沟通和决策论坛；记录决策、权衡和实施理由。
  • 支持发布准备和发布后优化，包括需要的操作流程和控制监控。


任职要求：


  • 7年以上产品管理经验，包括在金融服务合规/监管产品方面的丰富经验。
  • 与合规和法律团队合作并交付产品更改以满足监管或许可期望的丰富经验。
  • 能够快速学习，逻辑思考，并将复杂问题结构化为可执行的计划。
  • 技术和非技术团队之间强大的沟通和利益相关者管理技能。
  • 强大的留档和产品执行技能（PRD/用户故事/流程）。
  • 流利的英语和普通话（口语和书写）是必需的。
  • 加密行业经验是一个优势；对加密的热情是首选。

加分项

  • 具有KYC/KYB、制裁筛选、AML控制、披露、记录保留、监管报告或审计/考试支持的经验。
  • 在快节奏、多市场监管环境中工作的经验。


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.
