Bitget is the world's largest Universal Exchange (UEX), serving over 125 million users and offering access to over 2M crypto tokens, 100+ tokenized stocks, ETFs, commodities, FX, and precious metals such as gold. The ecosystem is committed to helping users trade smarter with its AI agent, which co-pilots trade execution.


Bitget is driving crypto adoption through strategic partnerships with LALIGA and MotoGP™. Aligned with its global impact strategy, Bitget has joined hands with UNICEF to support blockchain education for 1.1 million people by 2027. Bitget currently leads in the tokenized TradFi market, providing the industry's lowest fees and highest liquidity across 150 regions worldwide.



What you'll do


  • Provide data support across all business lines of the exchange, including but not limited to Spot/Derivatives (Futures, Margin, Options), Wealth Management/Lending, Funds & Deposit/Withdrawal, Growth & Marketing, Institutional/VIP, Risk & Compliance, Customer Service and Operations. Quickly understand key business flows and rules, and translate business questions into measurable metrics and analytical frameworks.
  • KPI system collaboration and governance: the KPI system is primarily built by business teams and/or the data middle platform. As a Data BP, you are expected to deeply understand business goals and operating actions, help business teams define and establish metrics (definitions, dimensions, granularity, boundaries), and take ownership of KPI governance (definition alignment, versioning, lineage/usage documentation, data reconciliation & quality checks, change impact assessment and communication).
  • Monitoring and root-cause analysis: build and maintain core business/operations/risk dashboards and alerting mechanisms. Monitor key metrics on a daily basis, analyze metric dynamics periodically, identify and diagnose anomalies promptly, and provide actionable intervention/adjustment suggestions with closed-loop tracking and post-mortems.
  • Requirement abstraction and cross-team delivery: consolidate scattered business requests into structured requirements. Abstract business logic and metric definitions into data models (subject areas, fact/dimension tables, wide tables, aggregates, field definitions), produce deliverable requirement documents and work with the data warehouse engineering team to implement them. Abstract dashboard, self-service analytics, metric query, alert subscription, etc. into data tool/product requirements and drive roadmap planning, acceptance and iteration with the data product team.
  • Cross-functional collaboration: work closely with Product, Operations, Risk Strategy, Engineering and Data Warehouse teams to drive requirement review, development acceptance, go-live iterations and effectiveness reviews; act as the data owner for key domains.
  • Ownership and “dirty work” coverage: go beyond responding to requests; proactively discover issues and propose analytical directions/solutions. Be willing to cover critical yet tedious work such as definition alignment, data quality troubleshooting, historical backfills, pipeline/root-cause debugging, and dashboard iteration/maintenance.


What you'll need


  • 3+ years of experience in data engineering/data analytics/data BP/business analytics; experience in crypto exchanges, financial services, internet growth, or financial/fund management is a plus.
  • Proficient in SQL with strong data analysis and data engineering capabilities; highly data-sensitive and able to derive actionable insights from large-scale data.
  • Solid offline SQL development skills: able to independently develop and schedule offline warehouse jobs (layered modeling, wide/aggregate table development, incremental/full processing, performance tuning, reconciliation and data quality validations).
  • Flink real-time development skills: able to build real-time pipelines for metrics and detailed events using Flink; familiar with common streaming patterns (window aggregation, dimension joins, deduplication, late events handling, exactly-once/fault tolerance) and capable of troubleshooting and optimization in production.
  • Familiar with data development and scheduling platforms such as DataWorks: able to use the platform for task development, dependency management, release/go-live, monitoring & alerting, backfills, and permission/resource management.
  • Strong business abstraction and structured communication skills: able to convert business processes, rules and metric definitions into executable requirement documents (field definitions, dimensions/granularity, definition boundaries, edge cases, acceptance criteria).
  • Good understanding of data warehousing and data modeling concepts (layering, subject areas, fact/dimension modeling, wide vs. detailed tables, metric governance), and able to collaborate efficiently with DW/engineering teams to build reusable data assets.
  • Proficient with at least one BI/visualization tool and able to build dashboards independently (e.g., Tableau/DataWind/Quick BI), with alerting and drill-down analysis design capability.
  • Strong communication, collaboration and project execution skills, able to align stakeholders across business/product/engineering and drive delivery.
  • High self-motivation and patience: willing to invest in critical but “boring” operational work, including data troubleshooting, anomaly tracking, dashboard iterations and closed-loop post-mortems.


岗位职责：


  • 熟悉并覆盖交易所全业务线的数据支持工作，包括但不限于：现货/合约/杠杆/期权、理财/借贷、资金与充提、增长投放与运营、机构/VIP、风控合规、客服与运营等；能够快速理解业务链路与关键规则，将业务问题抽象为可量化指标与分析框架。
  • 指标体系协同与治理：指标体系的主要建设方为业务侧/中台侧，数据BP需深入理解业务目标与运营动作，协助业务梳理与建立指标（指标定义、维度、粒度、口径边界），并负责指标体系的管理与持续治理（口径统一、版本管理、血缘/使用说明、数据质量对账、变更影响评估与宣导）。
  • 监控与归因：建设并维护核心经营/运营/风控监控看板与告警机制；日常监控关键指标，研究指标动态变化并开展周期性分析；对异常波动进行定位与归因，输出干预/调整建议，推动形成可执行的行动闭环与复盘机制。
  • 需求归纳与跨团队交付：能够将零散业务需求进行归纳、抽象与结构化沉淀；将业务逻辑与指标口径抽象为数据模型/主题域/宽表/明细口径与字段定义，形成可研发的需求文档并提交给数据仓库研发团队落地；将看板、自助取数、指标查询、告警订阅等能力需求抽象为数据工具/数据产品需求，提交给数据产品团队并推进排期、验收与迭代。
  • 跨团队协作：与产品、运营、风控策略、研发、数仓等团队协作，推进需求评审、开发验收、上线迭代与效果复盘；在关键方向承担数据owner职责。
  • owner意识与基础工作覆盖：不仅响应需求，更要主动发现问题、提出分析方向与解决方案；能够覆盖数据工作中大量琐碎但关键的环节（口径对齐、数据质量排查、历史回溯、链路定位、看板迭代维护等）。


任职要求：


  • 3年及以上数据研发/数据分析/数据BP/商业分析经验；具备交易所、金融、互联网增长、财务资金管理等相关经验者优先。
  • 具备较强的业务抽象与结构化表达能力：能将业务流程、规则与口径沉淀为可执行的需求文档（字段定义、维度粒度、口径说明、边界case、验收标准）。
  • SQL离线开发能力：能独立完成数仓离线任务开发与调度（如分层建设、宽表/汇总表开发、增量/全量处理、性能优化、数据对账与质量校验）。
  • Flink实时开发能力：能基于Flink完成实时指标/实时明细链路开发，理解常见实时计算场景（窗口聚合、维表关联、去重、迟到数据处理、Exactly-once/容错语义等），并能进行线上问题排查与优化。
  • 熟悉DataWorks等数据开发与调度平台：能使用平台完成任务开发、依赖管理、发布上线、监控告警、补数回溯、权限与资源管理等。
  • 熟练使用至少一种BI/可视化工具并能独立搭建看板（如Tableau/DataWind/Quick BI等），具备监控告警与钻取分析设计能力。
  • 熟悉数据仓库基础与数据建模思想（分层、主题域、宽表/明细、口径管理），能与数仓研发高效协作完成数据资产沉淀。
  • 具备较强的沟通协作与项目推进能力，能跨业务/产品/研发多方对齐口径并推动交付。
  • 强自驱与耐心：能长期投入数据工作中枯燥但关键的建设与运营，包括数据排查、异常追踪、看板迭代与复盘闭环。



Why Bitget?

  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!


If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


For more information regarding candidates' personal data processing, please refer to Bitget Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: CS Specialist (Portuguese & Spanish)
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is the world's largest Universal Exchange (UEX), serving over 125 million users and offering access to over 2M crypto tokens, 100+ tokenized stocks, ETFs, commodities, FX, and precious metals such as gold. The ecosystem is committed to helping users trade smarter with its AI agent, which co-pilots trade execution.


Bitget is driving crypto adoption through strategic partnerships with LALIGA and MotoGP™. Aligned with its global impact strategy, Bitget has joined hands with UNICEF to support blockchain education for 1.1 million people by 2027. Bitget currently leads in the tokenized TradFi market, providing the industry's lowest fees and highest liquidity across 150 regions worldwide.


What you'll do


  • Provide high-quality customer support to EU and Portuguese / Spanish-speaking customers through multiple channels, including email and live chat.
  • Handle customer inquiries, complaints, and complex cases, conducting thorough investigations using internal systems and tools, and ensuring all outcomes are accurately documented in designated platforms.
  • Support customers on product, account, and transaction-related issues while adhering to EU regulatory and compliance standards.
  • Collaborate closely with internal teams (e.g. Product, Compliance, Risk, Operations) and external partners to resolve customer issues and improve overall service quality for the EU market.
  • Maintain strong awareness of EU customer expectations, cultural nuances, and service standards to deliver a professional and customer-centric experience.
  • Stay up to date with the company’s products, services, and EU market / industry trends to provide accurate and timely support.
  • Escalate high-risk, sensitive, or unresolved cases in line with established procedures and the operational escalation matrix.


What you'll need


  • Diploma or Bachelor’s Degree in any related field.
  • Minimum 1 year of customer service experience, preferably supporting EU customers in banking, financial services, fintech, crypto, or other regulated industries.
  • Native or fluent Portuguese & Spanish (spoken and written) — mandatory, with strong customer-facing communication skills.
  • Good working proficiency in English (spoken and written) for internal communication and documentation.
  • Familiarity with EU compliance-driven environments (e.g. KYC, AML, GDPR) is a strong advantage.
  • Willingness to work on a rotational schedule to support 24x7 operations, including public holidays as required.
  • Strong interpersonal and communication skills, with the ability to handle escalations and challenging customer interactions calmly and professionally.
  • Solution-oriented mindset with sound judgment and cost-aware decision-making.
  • Excellent time management and multitasking skills in a fast-paced, high-volume support environment.
  • Quick learner who adapts well to change and acts on feedback constructively.


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!For more information regarding candidates' personal data processing, please refer to Bitget Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: US Equity Risk Control Operations 美股风控运营
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • Responsible for day-to-day risk control operations for the company’s proprietary Omnibus US equity business, including margin trading, securities lending (short selling), and US equity options. Manage intra-day and post-trading position risks.
  • Handle margin leverage management, maintenance margin monitoring, call and forced liquidation execution, to mitigate leverage overdraft risks.
  • Oversee risk control for securities lending: quota management of stock sources, short position monitoring, short selling risk alerts, and abnormal position handling.
  • Core priority: Independently manage the risk of US equity option trading, including option position exposure, margin validation, expiration/assignment risks, and monitoring and handling of abnormal option trades.
  • Interface with upstream custodian brokers, reconcile risk positions, address risk discrepancies, and follow up on transaction exceptions and settlement risk closure.
  • Monitor daily risk indicators, maintain risk ledgers, generate weekly/daily reports, and cooperate with compliance, clearing/settlement, and trading teams for risk inspections.


What you'll need


  • Bachelor’s degree or above; over 3 years of risk control operations experience at US brokerage or proprietary trading institutions.
  • Must-have: Hands-on risk operations experience with US equity margin trading, short selling via securities lending, and US equity options; familiar with full US equity product risk control logic.
  • Familiar with US trading rules, margin systems, option risk mechanisms; understands position exposure, risk coefficients, and forced liquidation processes.
  • Able to read and write English, capable of interpreting risk control reports and systems from overseas brokers; proficient in Excel, strong data sensitivity, attention to detail, high stress tolerance.

Bonus Qualifications

  • Experience at top brokerage firms or US proprietary trading risk control.
  • Familiarity with risk control for option strategies/portfolio.
  • Experience in risk process optimization or system integration.
  • Holder of FRM/FCA certificates is preferred.



岗位职责：


  • 负责公司自营 Omnibus 美股业务Margin 保证金交易、融券做空、美股期权的日常风控运营，把控盘中、盘后持仓风险。
  • 负责保证金杠杆管控、维持保证金监控、追保与强平流程执行，防范杠杆透支风险。
  • 负责融券业务风控：券源额度管理、做空头寸监控、做空风险预警、异常头寸处置。
  • 核心重点：独立负责美股期权交易风险管理，包含期权持仓敞口、保证金校验、到期行权风险、异常期权交易监控与处置。
  • 对接上游托管券商，核对风控头寸、处理风险差异，跟进各类交易异常、交割风险闭环。
  • 日常风控指标监控、风险台账记录、周报日报输出，配合合规、清结算、交易团队完成风险核查。


任职要求：


  • 本科及以上学历，3年以上美股券商 / 自营机构风控运营经验。
  • 硬性必备：同时具备美股 Margin、融券做空、美股期权风控运营实操经验，熟悉美股全品类交易风控逻辑。
  • 熟悉美股交易规则、保证金制度、期权风险机制，懂持仓敞口、风险系数、强平逻辑。
  • 英文可读写，能看懂海外券商风控报表与系统；熟练 Excel，数据敏感、严谨细心、抗压性强。

加分项

  • 有头部券商、美股自营机构风控经验；熟悉期权组合策略风控；有风控流程优化、系统对接经验，
  • 持有FRM/FCA证书者优先

jobs.descriptionText:
About us

Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.

Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.

We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!

What you'll do

Responsible for day-to-day risk control operations for the company’s proprietary Omnibus US equity business, including margin trading, securities lending (short selling), and US equity options. Manage intra-day and post-trading position risks.
Handle margin leverage management, maintenance margin monitoring, call and forced liquidation execution, to mitigate leverage overdraft risks.
Oversee risk control for securities lending: quota management of stock sources, short position monitoring, short selling risk alerts, and abnormal position handling.
Core priority: Independently manage the risk of US equity option trading, including option position exposure, margin validation, expiration/assignment risks, and monitoring and handling of abnormal option trades.
Interface with upstream custodian brokers, reconcile risk positions, address risk discrepancies, and follow up on transaction exceptions and settlement risk closure.
Monitor daily risk indicators, maintain risk ledgers, generate weekly/daily reports, and cooperate with compliance, clearing/settlement, and trading teams for risk inspections.

What you'll need

Bachelor’s degree or above; over 3 years of risk control operations experience at US brokerage or proprietary trading institutions.
Must-have: Hands-on risk operations experience with US equity margin trading, short selling via securities lending, and US equity options; familiar with full US equity product risk control logic.
Familiar with US trading rules, margin systems, option risk mechanisms; understands position exposure, risk coefficients, and forced liquidation processes.
Able to read and write English, capable of interpreting risk control reports and systems from overseas brokers; proficient in Excel, strong data sensitivity, attention to detail, high stress tolerance.
Bonus Qualifications
Experience at top brokerage firms or US proprietary trading risk control.
Familiarity with risk control for option strategies/portfolio.
Experience in risk process optimization or system integration.
Holder of FRM/FCA certificates is preferred.

jobs.title: Channel Operations Manager
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • Primarily responsible for global exchange channel expansion, including KOLs and community nodes.
  • Leverage platform user acquisition tools to design and execute channel campaigns, driving user growth and trading conversion.
  • Analyze channel retention and trading performance data to identify high-quality channels and phase out underperforming ones, improving overall channel health.
  • Support platform content distribution through channels and community nodes.


What you'll need


  • Bachelor’s degree or above.
  • Candidates with experience in similar roles at competitor companies (Web3, trading, or financial/banking/payment industries) are preferred.
  • Ability to work efficiently under pressure.
  • Strong communication and teamwork skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively across departments.
  • Proficient in both English and Mandarin for professional communication.

jobs.title: Market Researcher- Turkish speaking
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


1.Market Research and User Insights

  • Conduct in-depth research on local users, including user profiles, behavior patterns, pain points, needs, decision-making processes, and consumption habits.
  • Collect first-hand insights through interviews, surveys, field visits, community observation, and other research methods.
  • Continuously track local industry trends, competitor movements, channel changes, and user feedback.

2.Channel and Ecosystem Research

  • Map local online and offline channel structures, including distributors, agents, KOLs/KOCs, communities, retail stores, platforms, and other ecosystem players.
  • Identify key channel resources, partnership opportunities, and potential risks.
  • Help build local market channel maps, resource databases, and ecosystem insights.

3.User Experience and Local Knowledge System Building

  • Build a structured understanding of local UEX/User Experience in the target market.
  • Analyze how different user groups perceive products, make purchase decisions, use products, and respond to pricing, campaigns, and channels.
  • Deliver structured research reports, market maps, user insight documents, and strategic recommendations.

4.Campaign and Growth Recommendations

  • Provide localized recommendations for marketing campaigns, user growth initiatives, channel cooperation, and brand communication.
  • Support business teams in designing market strategies that better fit local user needs.
  • Track campaign results, collect user feedback, and continuously refine recommendations.

5.Frequent Travel and Field Visits

  • Conduct frequent local travel, user interviews, channel visits, and field research based on project needs.
  • Engage deeply with local user groups and channel partners to obtain authentic feedback and market insights.


What you'll need


  • Bachelor’s degree or above from a top-tier university in the local or target market; master’s degree preferred.
  • Fresh graduates or early-career candidates with up to 2 years of experience are preferred.
  • Strong learning ability, sharp thinking, clear logic, and ability to quickly understand complex business topics.
  • Open-minded and willing to build judgments from first-hand facts rather than relying on fixed frameworks or past experience.
  • Strong curiosity for new things and willingness to work on ambiguous, 0-to-1 projects.
  • Strong information-gathering, interviewing, analytical, and structured communication skills.
  • Ability to extract key insights from large amounts of fragmented information and turn them into clear conclusions.
  • Highly self-driven and able to push tasks forward independently.
  • Strong execution capability, hardworking attitude, and willingness to handle frequent travel, intensive field visits, and hands-on research.
  • Excellent communication skills with users, channels, partners, and internal teams


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!

jobs.title: Senior Finance Transformation Manager
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is the world's largest Universal Exchange (UEX), serving over 125 million users and offering access to over 2M crypto tokens, 100+ tokenized stocks, ETFs, commodities, FX, and precious metals such as gold. The ecosystem is committed to helping users trade smarter with its AI agent, which co-pilots trade execution.


Bitget is driving crypto adoption through strategic partnerships with LALIGA and MotoGP™. Aligned with its global impact strategy, Bitget has joined hands with UNICEF to support blockchain education for 1.1 million people by 2027. Bitget currently leads in the tokenized TradFi market, providing the industry's lowest fees and highest liquidity across 150 regions worldwide.


What you'll do


  • Own and improve the end-to-end finance booking workflow: map current state, identify gaps, design improved logic, and implement changes with system and finance teams
  • Deliver quick wins within weeks—identify highest-impact, lowest-friction improvements and execute rapidly
  • Act as product owner for finance workflow tools: groom backlog, write requirements, prioritize with IT and ops, and drive UAT
  • Facilitate stakeholder alignment across Finance, Product, and Technology teams
  • Build and maintain process documentation: SOPs, flow diagrams, control matrices, and exception logs
  • Support the Finance COE in building a transformation roadmap: standardize first, automate second, integrate third
  • Identify opportunities for AI tools to reduce manual work, improve accuracy, and speed up reporting; pilot and scale solutions
  • Monitor implementation results and iterate based on key metrics


What you'll need


Education & Core Experience:

  • Bachelor's degree or higher in Accounting, Finance, Business Administration, or related discipline
  • Minimum 5-7 years of experience in finance process optimization, workflow design, financial systems implementation, or business process management — preferably in tech, fintech, or financial services
  • Proven track record of leading end-to-end finance transformation initiatives or large-scale process improvement projects

Technical & Functional Expertise:

  • Deep understanding of finance booking processes, transaction flows, and general ledger accounting
  • Hands-on experience with financial systems (ERP, accounting software) and workflow automation tools
  • Solid knowledge of internal controls, SOPs, and process documentation best practices
  • Familiarity with product management methodologies and backlog prioritization frameworks
  • Experience working with AI/automation tools or identifying automation opportunities in finance operations is a strong advantage

Competencies & Soft Skills:

  • Self-starter with the ability to work independently, take ownership, and drive results with minimal oversight
  • Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills — ability to translate between finance, product, and technology teams
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving capabilities; comfortable with ambiguity and complexity
  • Adaptable and resourceful; thrives in fast-paced, dynamic environments where processes are still evolving
  • Demonstrated ability to balance quick wins with long-term transformation roadmaps

Languages:

  • Fluent English (written and verbal) for cross-functional collaboration
  • Professional working proficiency in Mandarin Chinese is a plus


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!


If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!



For more information regarding candidates' personal data processing, please refer to Bitget Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Deputy AML Officer (EU, MiFID)
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is the world's largest Universal Exchange (UEX), serving over 125 million users and offering access to over 2M crypto tokens, 100+ tokenized stocks, ETFs, commodities, FX, and precious metals such as gold. The ecosystem is committed to helping users trade smarter with its AI agent, which co-pilots trade execution.


Bitget is driving crypto adoption through strategic partnerships with LALIGA and MotoGP™. Aligned with its global impact strategy, Bitget has joined hands with UNICEF to support blockchain education for 1.1 million people by 2027. Bitget currently leads in the tokenized TradFi market, providing the industry's lowest fees and highest liquidity across 150 regions worldwide.


What you'll do


  • Assist in the development and implementation of company policies and procedures to ensure compliance with MiFID II / MiFIR requirements and other relevant regulatory obligations.
  • Manage the MiFID II compliance framework, including client onboarding, client categorisation, and suitability and appropriateness assessment processes.
  • Monitor and supervise compliance with MiFID II / MiFIR obligations, conduct of business rules, and the requirements of national and European supervisory authorities (e.g. BaFin, ESMA).
  • Monitor and interpret relevant MiFID II / MiFIR laws, regulations, and regulatory guidance, advising on their impact on the company's operations and business strategies.
  • Conduct risk assessments and reviews of implemented MiFID II policies, controls, and frameworks, including best execution, product governance, and conflicts of interest policies.
  • Undertake regular, periodic and ad-hoc reporting to internal and external stakeholders, including fulfilling regulatory reporting obligations under MiFIR (e.g. transaction reporting, trade transparency).
  • Collaborate with internal teams, including legal, finance, technology, and operations, to address MiFID II compliance issues and support broader business objectives.
  • Stay up-to-date with regulatory developments, including ESMA guidelines and evolving MiFID II / MiFIR requirements, to proactively identify and address potential compliance risks.
  • Provide training to business and compliance departments on MiFID II obligations, including investor protection rules, inducements, and conflicts of interest.
  • Assist in managing regulatory escalations and complaints handling, and support in creating operational structures that ensure ongoing MiFID II compliance.


What you'll need


  • University Degree in Law, Economics, Finance, or a related field, with a preference for candidates with a legal background.
  • Minimum 5 years of experience in compliance departments within financial institutions, investment firms, banks, or FinTechs, with demonstrable experience in MiFID II compliance. Prior experience within the crypto or digital assets industry is a plus but not required. Ideally, prior experience includes direct communication with supervisory authorities.
  • Strong knowledge of MiFID II / MiFIR requirements, including client categorisation, suitability and appropriateness, best execution, product governance, transaction reporting, and conduct of business rules.
  • Familiarity with ESMA guidelines and the broader European regulatory landscape for investment services, with an awareness of how emerging frameworks such as MiCA may interact with MiFID II obligations.
  • Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced environment.
  • Strong communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to engage effectively with regulators, senior management, and cross-functional teams.
  • Good command of written and oral English; proficiency in German is strongly preferred but is not a knock-out criterion.
  • Experience working in a start-up or high-growth technology or financial services company will be advantageous.


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!


If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!



For more information regarding candidates' personal data processing, please refer to Bitget Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Financial Product Manager 金融产品经理（传统金融资讯、行情方向）
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is the world's largest Universal Exchange (UEX), serving over 125 million users and offering access to over 2M crypto tokens, 100+ tokenized stocks, ETFs, commodities, FX, and precious metals such as gold. The ecosystem is committed to helping users trade smarter with its AI agent, which co-pilots trade execution.


Bitget is driving crypto adoption through strategic partnerships with LALIGA and MotoGP™. Aligned with its global impact strategy, Bitget has joined hands with UNICEF to support blockchain education for 1.1 million people by 2027. Bitget currently leads in the tokenized TradFi market, providing the industry's lowest fees and highest liquidity across 150 regions worldwide.


What you'll do


  • Responsible for executing and implementing the company’s overall strategic planning for financial information products and securities market data–driven decision-support products, aligning product direction with business objectives and real user needs, and building a comprehensive product feature framework.
  • Continuously conduct research on industry trends, market dynamics, competitor products, and user needs; deliver targeted product iteration and innovation proposals to continuously enhance the product’s core market competitiveness.
  • Participate in defining core product features and differentiated modules. Based on the product roadmap and version release schedule, manage project milestones end to end to ensure timely and high-quality delivery of each release.
  • Collaborate cross-functionally with R&D, UI/Design, Marketing, Content Operations, and other teams to drive project execution, coordinate requirements, synchronize development progress, and resolve cross-functional collaboration issues.
  • Conduct in-depth analysis of the underlying logic of existing products. Leverage AI tools and digital technologies to reconstruct the product’s core operating mechanisms, optimize product architecture, and improve overall operational and user efficiency.


What you'll need


  • Bachelor’s degree or above in Finance, Economics, Financial Management, or other related disciplines, with a solid theoretical foundation in finance.
  • 5+ years of hands-on experience in the full-cycle design and management of financial information or securities-related products. Experience in the Web3 finance sector is preferred.
  • Strong understanding of financial market rules and the full product development lifecycle for financial products, with deep insight into the characteristics of various financial instruments and market user needs.
  • Proven ability to restructure and optimize products; able to leverage AI and other digital tools to rebuild underlying product architecture and effectively improve product operational efficiency.
  • Excellent logical abstraction skills and ability to break down and solve complex problems; capable of independent judgment and strategic thinking, with a holistic view of product planning.
  • Proficient in various product management tools, with strong data sensitivity and data analysis capabilities; able to drive product iteration through data insights.
  • Strong communication, coordination, and teamwork skills, with experience in managing medium-to-large cross-functional projects and ensuring efficient project delivery.


岗位职责：

  • 负责执行落地公司金融资讯、证券行情辅助决策类产品整体战略规划，对齐公司经营目标与用户真实需求，搭建完整产品功能体系；
  • 持续调研行业市场趋势、竞品动态、结合用户需求，输出针对性产品迭代与创新方案，持续提升产品市场核心竞争力；
  • 参与定义产品核心功能、特色模块，根据产品路线图与版本发布排期，全程把控项目节点，保障各版本按时、保质交付；
  • 联动研发、UI/设计、市场、内容运营等多部门协同推进项目，统筹沟通需求、同步开发进度，解决跨环节协作问题；
  • 深度拆解现有产品底层逻辑，借助AI工具、数字化手段重构产品底层运行机制，优化产品架构，提升整体运营与使用效率。


任职要求：

  • 本科及以上学历，金融、经济、财经类相关专业，具备扎实金融专业理论功底；
  • 5年及以上金融资讯、证券类产品完整设计与管理实操经验，熟悉Web3金融赛道者优先录用；
  • 精通金融市场规则、金融产品完整开发流程，深刻理解各类金融工具产品属性与市场用户需求；
  • 具备产品重构优化能力，可结合AI等数字化工具重构产品底层架构，有效提升产品运营效率；
  • 优秀逻辑抽象、复杂问题拆解解决能力，具备独立研判思维，产品规划拥有全局视野；
  • 熟练使用各类产品管理工具，具备较强数据敏感度与数据分析能力，依托数据驱动产品迭代；
  • 沟通协调、团队协作能力突出，具备统筹多部门协作中大型项目的经验，保障项目高效落地。


Why Bitget?

  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!


If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


For more information regarding candidates' personal data processing, please refer to Bitget Candidate Privacy Notice.

The ecosystem is committed to helping users trade smarter with its AI agent, which co-pilots trade execution.

Bitget is driving crypto adoption through strategic partnerships with LALIGA and MotoGP™. Aligned with its global impact strategy, Bitget has joined hands with UNICEF to support blockchain education for 1.1 million people by 2027. Bitget currently leads in the tokenized TradFi market, providing the industry's lowest fees and highest liquidity across 150 regions worldwide.

jobs.title: CFD量化风控专家（HK/MY）
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


1. User Profiling Feature Engineering & Quantitative Client Segmentation Modeling

  • Feature Mining: Extract and construct a quantitative feature library reflecting clients' trading habits, risk exposures, and profitability from massive, high-frequency Tick data and user behavior data (e.g., capital utilization rates, overnight position preferences, dynamic win rates, Sharpe ratios, slippage sensitivity, etc.).
  • Effectiveness Evaluation & Selection: Establish a rigorous feature validation framework (e.g., IV/WOE analysis, T-tests/hypothesis testing, correlation analysis, SHAP values for feature importance, etc.) to eliminate noisy factors.
  • Anti-Overfitting & Data Leakage Prevention: Ensure the decay rate of features in out-of-sample and live trading environments remains controllable; strictly prevent look-ahead bias (future functions) to guarantee model robustness and generalizability.
  • Client Segmentation & Flow Routing: Build machine learning or statistical models to accurately identify "toxic flow" versus standard retail flow. Provide quantitative decision support for the A/B Book hedging and routing engine to maximize revenue and minimize risk.

2. Risk Control Algorithm Design & Hedging Strategies

  • Dynamic Margin & Liquidation Algorithms: Optimize the platform's dynamic leverage rules and tiered maintenance margin models to effectively mitigate negative equity/runaway loss risks under extreme market conditions.
  • Risk Exposure & VaR Models: Establish a real-time risk exposure monitoring system for multi-asset classes (Forex, Commodities, Indices, and other CFDs); develop quantitative models for VaR (Value at Risk) and stress testing.
  • Anomalous Trading & Fraud Detection: Design anti-abuse/anti-cheating algorithms to identify and block illicit or disruptive trading behaviors in real time, such as latency arbitrage, high-frequency scalping, and market manipulation.
  • Automated Hedging Strategy Development: Assist in designing internal risk hedging models for B-Book and automated external routing (Straight-Through Processing/STP) algorithms for C-Book (hybrid models).

3. Engineering Implementation & System Iteration

  • Collaborate closely with data engineering and backend development teams to translate quantitative models into production-ready, executable code within low-latency environments.
  • Continuously track the on-live performance of models (analyzing backtest vs. production variance) to iterate and fine-tune algorithms.


What you'll need


1. Educational Background

  • Bachelor’s degree or above from a top-tier university (985/211 or equivalent global ranking); major in Mathematics, Statistics, Financial Engineering, Computer Science, Physics, or related quantitative/STEM disciplines.

2. Professional Experience

  • 1–3 years of experience in quantitative risk control, algorithmic trading, or data science within the financial industry; backgrounds in Forex or CFD derivatives trading platforms are highly preferred.

3. Core Skills

  • Technical Proficiency: Expert-level command of Python (including Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn, TensorFlow/PyTorch, etc.) and SQL.
  • Analytical Foundation: Solid expertise in machine learning, statistical analysis, and financial time-series analysis.

4. Business Acumen

  • Deep understanding of derivatives pricing, margin mechanisms, Greeks, and VaR models.
  • Familiarity with Market Maker mechanisms, A/B Book risk management logic, and Liquidity Provider (LP) integration principles.

5. Soft Skills

  • Highly sensitive to data; possesses outstanding logical thinking, structured problem-solving capabilities, and excellent cross-departmental communication and collaboration skills.


Plus Points

  • Familiarity with the backend architecture and underlying logic of mainstream trading platforms such as MT4, MT5, or cTrader.
  • Prior experience in a similar core role at a top-tier global CFD broker (e.g., IG, CMC Markets, Exness, etc.).
  • Hands-on experience in processing High-Frequency Trading (HFT) datasets.


岗位职责：

用户画像特征工程与用户分层量化建模

  • 特征挖掘： 从海量高频Tick数据及用户行为数据中，挖掘并构建反映客户交易习惯、风险敞口和盈利能力的量化特征库（如资金利用率、隔夜持仓偏好、动态胜率、夏普比率、滑点敏感度等）。
  • 有效性评估与筛选： 建立严谨的特征有效性检验体系（如IV/WOE分析、T检验/假设检验、相关性分析、特征重要性SHAP值等），剔除噪音因子。
  • 防过拟合与数据泄漏： 确保特征在样本外及实盘环境中的衰减率可控，严格防止未来函数介入，保证模型的鲁棒性与泛化能力。
  • 客群分类与流量路由： 构建机器学习或统计模型，精准识别“毒性流量”与普通零售流量。为A/B Book对冲路由引擎提供量化决策支持，实现收益最大化与风险最小化。

风控算法设计与对冲策略

  • 动态保证金与平仓算法：优化平台动态杠杆规则、阶梯维持保证金模型，有效防范极端行情下的穿仓风险。
  • 风险敞口与VaR模型： 建立多资产（外汇、商品、指数等CFD）的实时风险敞口监控体系，开发VaR及压力测试量化模型。
  • 异常交易与欺诈检测： 设计反作弊算法，实时识别并拦截延迟套利、高频剥头皮、价格操纵等违规/破坏性交易行为。
  • 自动化对冲策略开发： 协助设计B Book内部风险对冲模型及C Book（混合模式）的自动化外部抛单（STP）算法。

工程落地与系统迭代

  • 与数据开发及后台技术团队紧密合作，将量化模型转化为可实盘运行的工程代码（低延迟环境）。
  • 持续追踪模型的线上表现（回测与实盘差异分析），进行算法的迭代与调优。


任职要求：

  1. 教育背景： 985/211本科及以上学历，数学、统计学、金融工程、计算机科学、物理等相关理工科专业。
  2. 行业经验： 1-3年金融行业量化风控、算法交易或数据科学经验；有外汇（Forex）、CFD衍生品交易平台背景者优先。
  3. 核心技能：
  4. 精通 Python（Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn, TensorFlow/PyTorch等）及 SQL。
  5. 扎实的机器学习、统计分析及时间序列分析能力。
  6. 业务理解：
  7. 深入理解衍生品定价、保证金机制、Greeks及VaR模型。
  8. 熟悉做市商（Market Maker）机制、A/B Book风险管理逻辑及流动性提供商（LP）对接原理。
  9. 软性素质： 对数据高度敏感，具备出色的逻辑思维、问题解决能力及跨部门沟通协作能力。


【加分项】

  • 熟悉 MT4/MT5/cTrader 等主流交易平台底层逻辑。
  • 曾在头部全球性CFD券商（如IG, CMC Markets, Exness等）担任过类似核心岗位。
  • 拥有高频交易（HFT）数据处理经验。


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: General Manager/Marketing Director for Pakistan
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • This individual will lead all local business compliance, legal coordination, regulatory engagement, licensing strategy, and government relations efforts required to establish and maintain a compliant operating framework for Bitget in Pakistan.
  • The role requires direct engagement with regulatory bodies, government stakeholders, policymakers, legal advisors, banking partners, and industry councils including PVARA and other relevant authorities.
  • The ideal candidate possesses strong experience in financial services, fintech, regulatory affairs, legal/compliance leadership, or government liaison roles, along with deep knowledge of Pakistan's evolving digital asset ecosystem.
  • Serve as the official local signatory and authorized representative for Bitget's Pakistan operations.
  • Lead strategic engagement with VARA, financial authorities, government ministries, regulators, and policy stakeholders.
  • Represent Bitget in regulatory meetings, consultations, licensing discussions, and industry forums.
  • Build and maintain strong relationships with government entities, policymakers, legal institutions, and banking partners.
  • Monitor evolving cryptocurrency, fintech, AML, KYC, sanctions, and virtual asset regulations
  • Advise leadership on market-entry strategy, regulatory risk, and local operational structures.
  • Support local partnerships with financial institutions, payment providers, and ecosystem stakeholders.
  • Provide strategic intelligence on Pakistan's crypto, fintech, and policy landscape.
  • Assist with crisis management, regulatory communications, and stakeholder negotiations where required.


What you'll need


  • Former regulator, policy advisor, banking executive, fintech compliance lead, or legal counsel.
  • Experience dealing with virtual asset regulations, fintech licensing, or financial regulatory frameworks.
  • Prior experience representing multinational businesses or international exchanges is a strong advantage.
  • The role requires direct engagement with regulatory bodies, government stakeholders, policymakers, legal advisors, banking partners, and industry councils including PVARA and other relevant authorities.
  • The ideal candidate possesses strong experience in financial services, fintech, regulatory affairs, legal/compliance leadership, or government liaison roles, along with deep knowledge of Pakistan's evolving digital asset ecosystem.


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey

  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!

jobs.title: Growth Operations Manager（card）
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. What you'll do



  • Own the day-to-day operations of the card business, ensuring stable, secure, and efficient service delivery.
  • Manage relationships with issuers, card processors, payment partners, and other external stakeholders to support business growth and operational excellence.
  • Design and optimize the end-to-end user lifecycle funnel, including application, activation, card usage,retention, and re-engagement, to drive card adoption and transaction volume
  • Establish and monitor key operational and growth metrics, conduct data analysis, identify opportunities andrisks, and implement actionable improvement plans
  • Continuously improve customer experience and operational processes to enhance efficiency and usersatisfaction.omlaa
  • Work closely with Product, Risk, Compliance, Finance, Customer Support, Marketing, and other internalteams to launch new card features, execute campaigns, and achieve business objectives.
  • Stay informed about industry trends, competitor developments, and regulatory changes, providing insights tosupport product and growth strategiesJao


What you'll need


  • Bachelor's degree or above.
  • 5+ years of experience in card issuing, payments, fintech, digital banking, crypto, or related financial servicesindustries.
  • Strong understanding of Visa and Mastercard issuing ecosystems, payment rails, and card operationsprocesses.
  • Proven experience in Card Operations, Payment Operations, Growth Operations, or related functions, with atrack record of independently driving projects from planning to execution.
  • Strong analytical skills with the ability to leverage data to identify opportunities, solve problems, and drivebusiness growth.
  • Excellent stakeholder management, communication, and cross-functional collaboration skills.
  • Growth-oriented mindset with hands-on experience in user acquisition, activation, engagement, retention,and lifecycle management.
  • Fluent in English, with the ability to work effectively in an international and cross-functional environment.

jobs.title: 量化研究员-高频做市方向
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is the world's largest Universal Exchange (UEX), serving over 125 million users and offering access to over 2M crypto tokens, 100+ tokenized stocks, ETFs, commodities, FX, and precious metals such as gold. The ecosystem is committed to helping users trade smarter with its AI agent, which co-pilots trade execution.


Bitget is driving crypto adoption through strategic partnerships with LALIGA and MotoGP™. Aligned with its global impact strategy, Bitget has joined hands with UNICEF to support blockchain education for 1.1 million people by 2027. Bitget currently leads in the tokenized TradFi market, providing the industry's lowest fees and highest liquidity across 150 regions worldwide.


岗位职责：

策略开发与优化

  1. 设计、回测并部署自动化交易模型，包括定价引擎、波动率管理和库存控制。
  2. 研究市场微观结构，挖掘 alpha 信号，改进现有算法（如价差捕获、价差套利、资金费率套利）。
  3. 将研究见解转化为交易信号，并通过回测和实盘模拟进行验证。

交易与风险管理

  1. 管理日常交易活动：持续报出买卖价差，监控风险限额，调整跨不同交易所的碎片化库存规模。
  2. 实施稳健的风险控制措施（PnL 归因、回撤限制、对冲风险敞口） ，并适应 7×24 小时的市场环境。
  3. 分析交易后的盈亏驱动因素、市场冲击和滑点，以优化定价模型。

技术与协作

  1. 与量化研究员、软件工程师及其他交易员密切合作，改进交易系统和降低执行延迟。
  2. 参与低延迟架构设计与优化（例如多线程、分布式系统）。
  3. 持续跟踪加密货币市场动态、交易所 API 更新以及 DeFi 协议，发掘新的交易机会。


任职要求：

  • 本科及以上学历，具备3-5年支付行业或相关领域工作经验。
  • 对法币系统及相关知识有深入理解。
  • 熟悉法币数据结构与框架，具备扎实的数据处理能力。
  • 具备独立的数据分析能力，能够从数据中提炼出有价值的洞察。
  • 有竞品公司（Web3、交易或金融/银行/支付行业）相同职位经验者优先。
  • 能够在压力下高效工作。
  • 具备良好的沟通与团队协作能力，能够跨部门高效合作。
  • 熟练使用英语和普通话进行工作交流。


Why Bitget?

  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!


If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


For more information regarding candidates' personal data processing, please refer to Bitget Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: CS Specialist (Mandarin)
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • Attend to all inquiries/issues from global customers through multiple supported channels, e.g. email, LiveChat, etc.
  • Handle customer's complaints and conduct comprehensive investigations using various tools. Accountable for each research/investigation outcome is documented and store in the designated location.
  • Liaise with both internal & external team to handle complaints and feedback related to our products and services, e.g. website, platforms, etc.
  • Maintain up-to-date knowledge about the company's latest products & services as well as the industry’s trends to better support customers.
  • Escalate any queries or unresolved matters that are unable to complete within the agreed procedure to line manager or higher, as per the operational escalation matrix.


What you'll need


  • SPM or Diploma or Degree in any related field.
  • Minimum 1 year of experience related to customer service experience in the banking, financial and/or fintech sector.
  • Excellent verbal and written in Mandarin and English language. Multilingual in writing and speaking would be a plus.
  • Willing to work according to schedule to support 24x7 operations.
  • Strong people skills: Ability to navigate difficult situations and stay calm when under pressure.
  • Solution mindset: Passionate in finding right solution(s) for the customer, and resolve the issue by overcoming obstacles; good cost-efficient decision making.
  • Excellent time management: Ability to multi-task to solve customer's issues/queries, while able to deliver the assigned task in a timely manner.
  • Quick learner: Ability to ramp up quickly and act on feedback constructively.


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey

What you'll do


Competency Building & Framework Design

  • Participate in the construction and continuous optimization of the company's Learning & Development (L&D) system (e.g., Leadership Development, Professional Competencies, New Hire Onboarding/Landing).
  • Design training programs with tangible business value based on organizational stages and business growth.
  • Effectively bridge the gaps between competency models, performance feedback, and talent development pathways.

Project Design & Implementation

  • Independently lead key development projects (e.g., Management Training, Key Talent Development, Specialized Skill Enhancement).
  • Manage the complete closed-loop process: Needs Discovery → Solution Design → Implementation → Evaluation.
  • Drive inter-departmental cooperation effectively within a high-paced environment.

Business Alignment & Insights

  • Deeply understand business logic and team pain points rather than passively receiving training requests.
  • Translate "business problems" into "competency/mechanism gaps" and actionable development solutions.
  • Build long-term collaborative relationships with HRBPs and Business Unit leaders.

Learning Mechanisms & Organizational Efficiency

  • Design sustainable and scalable learning mechanisms.
  • Facilitate experience sharing, best-practice extraction, and the transformation of knowledge into organizational assets.
  • Monitor the real-world impact of learning initiatives on organizational efficiency and talent growth.


What you'll need

  • 5–8 years of experience in Learning & Development (L&D), Talent Development (TD), or Training Systems.
  • Experience in the full-cycle design and implementation of development projects, rather than just curriculum delivery.
  • Experience in fast-growing organizations, Internet, Tech, Finance, or the Web3 industry is highly preferred.

﻿

学习发展专家（Learning & Development Specialist / Expert）

我们正在寻找一位真正理解“组织为什么需要学习发展”的伙伴。这不是一个单纯做培训执行的岗位，而是需要你能够站在业务与组织视角，推动能力建设、管理提升与文化落地。


岗位职责

能力建设与体系设计

  • 参与搭建与持续优化公司学习发展体系（管理者培养、专业能力、新员工Landing等）
  • 基于业务发展与组织阶段，设计有实际业务价值的培养方案
  • 将能力模型、绩效反馈、人才发展路径有效连接

项目设计与落地推动

  • 独立负责关键培养项目（如管理者培养、关键人才发展、专项能力提升等）
  • 从需求洞察 → 方案设计 → 推动执行 → 效果评估形成完整闭环
  • 能够在高节奏环境下推动跨部门协作

业务对齐与需求洞察

  • 深入理解业务逻辑与团队实际痛点，而非被动接收培训需求
  • 将“业务问题”转化为“能力/机制等问题”与“发展方案”
  • 与HRBP、业务负责人形成长期协作关系

学习机制与组织效能优化

  • 设计可持续运行的学习机制
  • 推动经验沉淀、最佳实践萃取、知识资产化
  • 关注学习对组织效率与人才成长的真实影响


岗位要求

经验与背景

  • 5–8 年学习发展 / 人才发展 / 培训体系相关经验
  • 有完整培养项目设计与落地经验，而非单纯课程交付
  • 有快速发展型组织 / 互联网 / 科技 / 金融 / Web3 行业经验优先


能力要求

  • 能独立设计项目，而不仅是执行方案
  • 能理解业务，而不仅是培训逻辑
  • 能推动落地，而不仅是提出设想和建议
  • 能评估效果，而不仅是完成动作


你将在这里面对的工作状态

  • 节奏快，但不会做无意义的培训
  • 要求高，但所有工作都与业务与组织真实问题相关
  • 需要思考，而不仅是执行
  • 需要推动，而不仅是配合


﻿Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: RWA 股票风控策略分析师
jobs.descriptionHtml:
岗位职责

  1. 负责 CEX 平台 RWA 股票类产品的风险监控与策略分析，包括价格波动、流动性、敞口、持仓集中度及异常交易行为。
  2. 制定和优化股票类 RWA 产品风控规则，包括交易限额、持仓上限、价格偏离、熔断、强平、保证金及预警机制。
  3. 监控用户及机构客户交易行为，识别异常交易、市场操纵、对敲、自成交、刷量、价格拉抬打压等风险。
  4. 跟踪标的股票、ETF、指数及相关市场行情，评估链上/平台内 RWA 资产价格与外部市场价格偏离风险。
  5. 参与 RWA 股票产品上线前风险评估，包括标的流动性、波动率、交易时段、停牌、公司行为及监管风险。
  6. 进行风险数据分析，输出日报、周报、专题分析及风险事件复盘报告。
  7. 协同产品、交易、合规、技术团队，推动风控策略系统化、自动化和监控看板建设。
  8. 参与突发风险事件处理，如极端行情、价格异常、流动性枯竭、外部市场停牌或数据源异常。


任职要求

  1. 本科及以上学历，金融、经济、数学、统计、计算机、金融工程等相关专业优先。
  2. 2 年以上股票、券商、基金、量化交易、加密交易所或金融科技风控相关经验。
  3. 熟悉股票、ETF、指数等金融产品交易机制，了解美股、港股或 A 股市场规则者优先。
  4. 熟悉 CEX 交易机制、订单簿、撮合、保证金、强平、API 交易及异常交易监控逻辑者优先。
  5. 具备良好的数据分析能力，熟练使用 SQL、Excel，掌握 Python 者优先。
  6. 理解市场风险、流动性风险、价格偏离风险、信用风险及操作风险。
  7. 具备较强风险敏感度，能够独立分析异常交易行为并提出风控策略建议。
  8. 英文读写能力良好，能够跟踪海外股票市场、监管动态及公司公告。

jobs.title: Brazil VIP Relationship Manager
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!



What You’ll Do


  • Manage and grow relationships with VIP, institutional, and high-net-worth clients on the Bitget platform.
  • Act as the main point of contact for VIP users, providing timely support, market updates, and platform guidance.
  • Develop and execute client acquisition and retention strategies to increase trading volume and user engagement.
  • Identify client needs and provide tailored solutions related to spot trading, futures trading, copy trading, staking, and other Bitget products.
  • Work closely with internal teams such as product, operations, marketing, compliance, and customer support to improve the VIP client experience.
  • Monitor client trading activity, feedback, and market trends to identify business opportunities.
  • Assist VIP clients with onboarding, KYC/KYB processes, account setup, API access, fee structure, and trading-related inquiries.
  • Promote Bitget’s VIP programs, campaigns, events, and institutional services.
  • Maintain strong knowledge of cryptocurrency markets, exchange products, derivatives, and competitor offerings.
  • Represent Bitget at industry events, conferences, networking sessions, and client meetings.
  • Ensure all client interactions comply with company policies, regulatory requirements, and risk management standards.
  • Prepare regular reports on client activity, sales pipeline, revenue growth, and relationship management performance.


What You’ll Need

  • Bachelor’s degree in Business, Finance, Economics, Marketing, or a related field is preferred.
  • Proven experience in relationship management, business development, sales, or account management, preferably in cryptocurrency, fintech, banking, brokerage, or financial services.
  • Strong understanding of crypto trading, spot markets, futures, derivatives, exchange operations, and blockchain industry trends.
  • Existing network of crypto traders, institutional clients, market makers, brokers, or high-net-worth individuals is a strong advantage.
  • Excellent communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
  • Ability to build long-term client relationships and handle VIP clients professionally.
  • Strong sales mindset with the ability to meet trading volume, revenue, and client growth targets.
  • Familiarity with VIP fee structures, liquidity solutions, API trading, and institutional trading needs is beneficial.
  • Self-motivated, target-driven, and able to work independently in a fast-paced environment.
  • Strong analytical skills with the ability to track client behavior and identify growth opportunities.
  • Native Portuguese and fluent English is required; additional languages such as Spanish, are a plus.
  • Comfortable working remotely or across different time zones if required.
  • Passion for cryptocurrency, Web3, and digital asset markets.


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Senior Corporate Counsel (6-Month)
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • Provide specialized legal advice and guidance on M&A transactions, investments, and joint ventures.
  • Support and lead complex corporate transactions with a focus on deals involving crypto and Web3-related products.
  • Draft, review, and negotiate commercial agreements to protect company interests, particularly in M&A and joint ventures.
  • Ensure compliance with applicable laws and regulations across jurisdictions, including regulatory issues related to crypto and Web3.
  • Monitor and advise on legal risks emerging from innovations in crypto and Web3 spaces.
  • Manage relationships with external legal counsel, especially those with expertise in M&A and blockchain-related matters.
  • Collaborate with product, finance, and business teams to provide legal insight on Web3 and crypto initiatives.
  • Develop and implement corporate policies and procedures relevant to emerging technologies.
  • Mentor and provide guidance to junior legal staff and paralegals on specialized transaction matters.


What you'll need


  • A law degree (LLB, JD or equivalent) from an accredited institution and admission to practice law.
  • Minimum of 5-8 years of experience in corporate law, preferably within a large corporation or law firm.
  • Strong specialization in mergers and acquisitions (M&A), investment, and joint venture transactions.
  • Knowledge and experience in crypto and Web3 technologies, especially with regard to product knowledge, preferred.
  • Strong knowledge of corporate governance, securities law, contracts, and compliance.
  • Proven experience in negotiating and drafting a wide range of commercial agreements.
  • Excellent analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills.
  • Ability to provide practical legal advice aligned with business objectives.
  • Strong leadership and project management skills.
  • Experience managing external counsel and collaborating with cross-functional teams.
  • High ethical standards and integrity.
  • Fluency in English and Mandarin.


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey

If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!

Manage relationships with external legal counsel, especially those with expertise in M&A and blockchain-related matters.
Collaborate with product, finance, and business teams to provide legal insight on Web3 and crypto initiatives.
Develop and implement corporate policies and procedures relevant to emerging technologies.
Mentor and provide guidance to junior legal staff and paralegals on specialized transaction matters.

What you'll need

A law degree (LLB, JD or equivalent) from an accredited institution and admission to practice law.
Minimum of 5-8 years of experience in corporate law, preferably within a large corporation or law firm.
Strong specialization in mergers and acquisitions (M&A), investment, and joint venture transactions.
Knowledge and experience in crypto and Web3 technologies, especially with regard to product knowledge, preferred.
Strong knowledge of corporate governance, securities law, contracts, and compliance.
Proven experience in negotiating and drafting a wide range of commercial agreements.
Excellent analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills.
Ability to provide practical legal advice aligned with business objectives.
Strong leadership and project management skills.
Experience managing external counsel and collaborating with cross-functional teams.
High ethical standards and integrity.
Fluency in English and Mandarin.

Why Bitget?

Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
We offer competitive salaries and benefits
Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!

jobs.title: Freelance Video Designer
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is the world's largest Universal Exchange (UEX), serving over 125 million users and offering access to over 2M crypto tokens, 100+ tokenized stocks, ETFs, commodities, FX, and precious metals such as gold. The ecosystem is committed to helping users trade smarter with its AI agent, which co-pilots trade execution.


Bitget is driving crypto adoption through strategic partnerships with LALIGA and MotoGP™. Aligned with its global impact strategy, Bitget has joined hands with UNICEF to support blockchain education for 1.1 million people by 2027. Bitget currently leads in the tokenized TradFi market, providing the industry's lowest fees and highest liquidity across 150 regions worldwide.


What you'll do

  • Independently handle video design, editing, animation, and post-production based on creative briefs.
  • Participate in early-stage creative discussions and storyboard development to ensure alignment with creative goals.
  • Leverage AI video tools to improve production efficiency and visual quality.
  • Collaborate closely with the Video Production Manager to deliver high-quality content on schedule.


What you'll need


  • Professional video editing skills

Proficient in mainstream editing software such as Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve; able to independently manage the full workflow from footage organization to final export.


  • Proficiency with AI video tools

Able to flexibly select and combine AI tools (e.g., Higgsfield, Seedance, Runway, Kling) based on project needs; strong in prompt engineering and style control.


  • Strong sense of pacing and rhythm

Strong intuition for rhythm and narrative structure; able to create a smooth and engaging viewing experience through editing, music, sound design, and transitions.


  • Excellent visual aesthetics

Deep understanding of color, composition, lighting, and typography; capable of consistently delivering visually polished work.

  • Color grading and audio processing skills

Able to perform professional color grading for a consistent visual style, and handle basic audio tasks such as noise reduction, voice-over mixing, and background music blending.


  • 2D animation capability

Able to independently produce 2D animation (frame-by-frame, character animation, motion graphics), with proficiency in After Effects or equivalent tools.


  • Portfolio required

Please include a portfolio in your resume showcasing representative video, animation, or AI-generated visual work; this will be a key criterion in initial screening.


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey

jobs.title: Business Analyst-Trading
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is the world's largest Universal Exchange (UEX), serving over 125 million users and offering access to over 2M crypto tokens, 100+ tokenized stocks, ETFs, commodities, FX, and precious metals such as gold. The ecosystem is committed to helping users trade smarter with its AI agent, which co-pilots trade execution.


Bitget is driving crypto adoption through strategic partnerships with LALIGA and MotoGP™. Aligned with its global impact strategy, Bitget has joined hands with UNICEF to support blockchain education for 1.1 million people by 2027. Bitget currently leads in the tokenized TradFi market, providing the industry's lowest fees and highest liquidity across 150 regions worldwide.


What you'll do


1. Maintain and reconcile core trading analytics frameworks across multiple asset classes (spot, perpetuals, futures, forex), ensuring consistency in data definitions, metric calculations, and reporting standards.


2. Lead technical analysis of trading parameters including funding rate mechanics, mark price methodology, ADL (Auto Deleveraging) trigger patterns, and unified margin model behavior.


3. Review comprehensive technical memos and analytical frameworks on trading operations, market microstructure, and liquidity dynamics; validate assumptions and methodologies.


4. Lead the adoption of new trading products and market structure changes; assess accounting and operational implications for user portfolios and risk calculations.


5. Act as the technical lead in responding to internal and external stakeholder inquiries regarding trading mechanics, fee structures, liquidation rules, and API rate limit impacts on business operations.


What you'll need


1. 5+ years of technical experience in trading analytics, quantitative analysis, or market operations with a verifiable track record of managing complex multi-asset trading data ecosystems.


2. Direct experience analyzing and optimizing trading mechanics across derivatives (perpetuals, futures) and spot markets; demonstrated ability to translate market microstructure into operational insights.


3. Expert-level knowledge of derivatives trading frameworks, particularly perpetual funding rates, mark price methodologies, unified margin models, and liquidation mechanics.


4. Significant tenure within a tier-1 crypto exchange, quantitative trading firm, market-making desk, or institutional trading operation; or equivalent experience at a traditional derivatives exchange or brokerage.


5. Proven experience as a key technical contributor to cross-functional trading operations projects, including liquidity provider optimization, risk analytics, or product mechanics analysis.


6. Advanced understanding of the technical and operational implications of on-chain trading mechanics, including gas fees, slippage dynamics, and blockchain-specific settlement considerations.


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!


If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!



For more information regarding candidates' personal data processing, please refer to Bitget Candidate Privacy Notice.

About us


Bitget is the world's largest Universal Exchange (UEX), serving over 125 million users and offering access to over 2M crypto tokens, 100+ tokenized stocks, ETFs, commodities, FX, and precious metals such as gold.
