jobs.title: Spot Trading Operations Manager 现货交易运营经理
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is the world's largest Universal Exchange (UEX), serving over 125 million users and offering access to over 2M crypto tokens, 100+ tokenized stocks, ETFs, commodities, FX, and precious metals such as gold. The ecosystem is committed to helping users trade smarter with its AI agent, which co-pilots trade execution.


Bitget is driving crypto adoption through strategic partnerships with LALIGA and MotoGP™. Aligned with its global impact strategy, Bitget has joined hands with UNICEF to support blockchain education for 1.1 million people by 2027. Bitget currently leads in the tokenized TradFi market, providing the industry's lowest fees and highest liquidity across 150 regions worldwide.


What you'll do


  • Responsible for formulating and implementing spot trading business growth strategies, continuously optimizing core metrics such as user activity, trading frequency, trading depth, and retention.
  • Conduct in-depth research on user trading behavior and market changes, identify user needs and pain points, and drive continuous iteration of trading experience and operational mechanisms.
  • Responsible for the operation of trading scenarios, including the construction of modules such as trading activities, strategy zones, trading tools, and signal ecosystem, to improve user engagement and trading conversion.
  • Based on user segmentation and trading data analysis, design differentiated operational strategies to promote the growth and conversion of users from novice to experienced traders.
  • Establish a trading operation indicator system, continuously monitor business health, and drive operational decisions and product optimization through data.
  • Collaborate with the product, marketing, quantitative, and liquidity teams to promote the construction of the trading ecosystem and the implementation of key growth projects.
  • Discover and introduce high-quality trading strategies, trading signals, and trading tool resources to enrich the platform's trading ecosystem.
  • Track industry dynamics and competitor changes, and output market insights and operational optimization solutions.


What you'll need


Basic Requirements:

  • Bachelor's degree or above, preferably in finance, economics, mathematics, statistics, computer science, or related fields. Minimum 3 years of experience in the cryptocurrency industry, with background in exchanges, quantitative trading teams, or professional trading platforms.
  • Deep understanding of the cryptocurrency market, real trading experience, and familiarity with spot, futures, and mainstream trading strategies.
  • Sensitive to market changes and able to quickly understand user trading behavior and market sentiment shifts.

Core Competencies

  • Deep understanding of trading user needs, able to identify problems and design solutions from the trader's perspective.
  • Mature growth operation experience, with case studies of cold start projects or business growth from scratch.
  • Strong data analysis skills, able to identify problems, verify hypotheses, and drive business growth through data.
  • Ability to independently design and build operational systems, not just at the event execution level.
  • Understanding of the fundamental logic of quantitative trading, including mainstream strategy frameworks such as CTA, arbitrage, market making, grid trading, and trend-following strategies.
  • Possesses excellent cross-team collaboration skills, capable of driving product, technology, and operational resources to achieve common goals.


Preferred Candidates:

  • Experience in quantitative strategy operation, strategy product operation, or strategy ecosystem development.
  • Participation in the development of strategy markets, signal markets, copy trading, etc.
  • Familiarity with TradingView, quantitative platforms, API trading ecosystems, and professional trading tools.
  • Previous experience working for professional trading platforms or institutions, including: FTX, Deribit, dYdX，Or relevant experience with leading quantitative funds, quantitative market makers, or Prop Trading teams.


岗位职责：

  • 负责现货交易业务增长策略制定与落地，围绕用户活跃度、交易频次、交易深度及留存等核心指标持续优化。
  • 深入研究用户交易行为及市场变化，识别用户需求和痛点，推动交易体验和运营机制持续迭代。
  • 负责交易场景运营，包括交易活动、策略专区、交易工具、信号生态等模块建设，提升用户参与度和交易转化。
  • 基于用户分层及交易数据分析，设计差异化运营策略，推动用户从新手到成熟交易者的成长转化。
  • 建立交易运营指标体系，持续监控业务健康度，通过数据驱动运营决策和产品优化。
  • 与产品、市场、量化团队、流动性团队协同，推动交易生态建设及重点增长项目落地。
  • 挖掘并引入优质交易策略、交易信号及交易工具资源，丰富平台交易生态。
  • 跟踪行业动态及竞品变化，输出市场洞察及运营优化方案。


任职要求：

基本要求

  • 本科及以上学历，金融、经济、数学、统计、计算机等相关专业优先，3年以上加密货币行业从业经验，具备交易所、量化团队或专业交易平台工作背景。
  • 对加密市场具有较深理解，具备真实交易经验，熟悉现货、合约及主流交易策略逻辑。
  • 对市场变化敏感，能够快速理解用户交易行为及市场情绪变化。

核心能力

  • 深刻理解交易用户需求，能够从交易者视角发现问题并设计解决方案。
  • 具备成熟的增长运营经验，有从0到1冷启动项目或业务增长案例。
  • 具备较强的数据分析能力，能够通过数据发现问题、验证假设并推动业务增长。
  • 能独立设计并搭建运营体系，而不仅限于活动执行层面。
  • 理解量化交易基础逻辑，包括CTA、套利、做市、网格、趋势策略等主流策略框架。
  • 具备优秀的跨团队协作能力，能够推动产品、技术及运营资源共同达成目标。

优先考虑

  • 有量化策略运营、策略产品运营或策略生态建设经验。
  • 参与过策略市场（Strategy Marketplace）、信号市场（Signal Marketplace）、跟单交易（Copy Trading）等业务建设。
  • 熟悉 TradingView、量化平台、API交易生态及专业交易工具。
  • 曾就职于专业交易平台或机构，包括：FTX、Deribit、dYdX或具备头部量化基金、量化做市商、Prop Trading团队相关经验。


Why Bitget?

  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!


If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


For more information regarding candidates' personal data processing, please refer to Bitget Candidate Privacy Notice.

与产品、市场、量化团队、流动性团队协同，推动交易生态建设及重点增长项目落地。
挖掘并引入优质交易策略、交易信号及交易工具资源，丰富平台交易生态。
跟踪行业动态及竞品变化，输出市场洞察及运营优化方案。

任职要求：
基本要求
本科及以上学历，金融、经济、数学、统计、计算机等相关专业优先，3年以上加密货币行业从业经验，具备交易所、量化团队或专业交易平台工作背景。
对加密市场具有较深理解，具备真实交易经验，熟悉现货、合约及主流交易策略逻辑。
对市场变化敏感，能够快速理解用户交易行为及市场情绪变化。
核心能力
深刻理解交易用户需求，能够从交易者视角发现问题并设计解决方案。
具备成熟的增长运营经验，有从0到1冷启动项目或业务增长案例。
具备较强的数据分析能力，能够通过数据发现问题、验证假设并推动业务增长。
能独立设计并搭建运营体系，而不仅限于活动执行层面。
理解量化交易基础逻辑，包括CTA、套利、做市、网格、趋势策略等主流策略框架。
具备优秀的跨团队协作能力，能够推动产品、技术及运营资源共同达成目标。
优先考虑
有量化策略运营、策略产品运营或策略生态建设经验。
参与过策略市场（Strategy Marketplace）、信号市场（Signal Marketplace）、跟单交易（Copy Trading）等业务建设。
熟悉 TradingView、量化平台、API交易生态及专业交易工具。
曾就职于专业交易平台或机构，包括：FTX、Deribit、dYdX或具备头部量化基金、量化做市商、Prop Trading团队相关经验。

Why Bitget?
Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
We offer competitive salaries and benefits
Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!

If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!

For more information regarding candidates' personal data processing, please refer to Bitget Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: CTO/ CISO, US
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is the world's largest Universal Exchange (UEX), serving over 125 million users and offering access to over 2M crypto tokens, 100+ tokenized stocks, ETFs, commodities, FX, and precious metals such as gold. The ecosystem is committed to helping users trade smarter with its AI agent, which co-pilots trade execution.


Bitget is driving crypto adoption through strategic partnerships with LALIGA and MotoGP™. Aligned with its global impact strategy, Bitget has joined hands with UNICEF to support blockchain education for 1.1 million people by 2027. Bitget currently leads in the tokenized TradFi market, providing the industry's lowest fees and highest liquidity across 150 regions worldwide.


What you'll do


This is a combined role that will take up both the information security and technology management functions.


The primary areas of responsibility of the CISO will be:

  • promoting security awareness;
  • creating and maintaining information security policies and escalation procedures, monitoring and analysing security alerts and access to restricted areas and confidential; data;
  • ensuring that disaster recovery and business continuity plans are in place and tested;
  • maintaining a current understanding of the IT threat landscape for the industry, including applicable regulations;
  • scheduling and performing periodic security audits; briefing the executive team on status and risks.


The primary responsibilities of the CTO will include:

  • designing and implementing IT architecture that supports BTGT US's electronic money and payment services;
  • leading the development and integration of APIs and other technological solutions for service delivery and compliance with local requirements;
  • ensuring security technology against cyber threats by implementing advanced cybersecurity protocols;
  • overseeing system audits, IT infrastructure upgrades, and disaster recovery processes to minimise operational risks;
  • managing relationships with third-party technology providers and ensuring their services align with BTGT US's requirements and regulatory standards;
  • staying updated on technological advancements and trends in the fintech and electronic money industries to innovate and enhance BTGT US's services continuously.


What you'll need


Education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Security, or a related technical field. A Master's degree is a plus. Relevant certifications are highly desirable.

Experience:

  • Minimum of 7-10 years of progressive experience in technology leadership roles, including at least 3-5 years specifically in information security and 3-5 years in a CTO or similar role.
  • Proven track record of successfully building and managing technology teams and implementing robust security programs, ideally within the fintech or financial services industry.
  • Experience in designing and implementing IT architecture for electronic money or payment services is essential.
  • Demonstrated expertise in API development and integration, particularly in compliance with regulatory requirements.
  • Experience with Web3 technologies, including wallet development, integration, and security best practices, is required.
  • Experience working with cloud-based infrastructure and security.
  • Experience reporting to and collaborating with remote teams, including technical and non-technical stakeholders.
  • Experience managing budgets and vendors.

Skills:

  • Deep understanding of information security principles, best practices, and relevant technologies (e.g., firewalls, intrusion detection systems, vulnerability management tools, cryptography, SIEM).
  • Strong knowledge of cybersecurity frameworks and regulations (e.g., ISO 27001, NIST, GDPR, PSD2).
  • Expertise in software development, systems architecture, and IT infrastructure management.
  • Excellent leadership, communication, and interpersonal skills, particularly in cross-cultural settings.
  • Ability to translate complex technical concepts into clear and concise language for non-technical audiences.
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities.
  • Ability to work independently and manage multiple projects effectively.
  • Good command of both Chinese & English.
  • Proficiency in relevant software and technology platforms.

Other:

  • Willingness to stay up-to-date with evolving technologies and security threats, as well as regulatory changes.
  • Strong interest in cryptocurrency and blockchain space.
  • Ability to work independently and as part of a geographically dispersed team.
  • Available to work flexible hours to accommodate communication with the Asia-based team.



Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!


If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!



For more information regarding candidates' personal data processing, please refer to Bitget Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Market Researcher-Spanish/Portuguese-speaking
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


1.Market Research and User Insights

  • Conduct in-depth research on local users, including user profiles, behavior patterns, pain points, needs, decision-making processes, and consumption habits.
  • Collect first-hand insights through interviews, surveys, field visits, community observation, and other research methods.
  • Continuously track local industry trends, competitor movements, channel changes, and user feedback.

2.Channel and Ecosystem Research

  • Map local online and offline channel structures, including distributors, agents, KOLs/KOCs, communities, retail stores, platforms, and other ecosystem players.
  • Identify key channel resources, partnership opportunities, and potential risks.
  • Help build local market channel maps, resource databases, and ecosystem insights.

3.User Experience and Local Knowledge System Building

  • Build a structured understanding of local UEX/User Experience in the target market.
  • Analyze how different user groups perceive products, make purchase decisions, use products, and respond to pricing, campaigns, and channels.
  • Deliver structured research reports, market maps, user insight documents, and strategic recommendations.

4.Campaign and Growth Recommendations

  • Provide localized recommendations for marketing campaigns, user growth initiatives, channel cooperation, and brand communication.
  • Support business teams in designing market strategies that better fit local user needs.
  • Track campaign results, collect user feedback, and continuously refine recommendations.

5.Frequent Travel and Field Visits

  • Conduct frequent local travel, user interviews, channel visits, and field research based on project needs.
  • Engage deeply with local user groups and channel partners to obtain authentic feedback and market insights.


What you'll need


  • Bachelor’s degree or above from a top-tier university in the local or target market; master’s degree preferred.
  • Fresh graduates or early-career candidates with up to 2 years of experience are preferred.
  • Strong learning ability, sharp thinking, clear logic, and ability to quickly understand complex business topics.
  • Open-minded and willing to build judgments from first-hand facts rather than relying on fixed frameworks or past experience.
  • Strong curiosity for new things and willingness to work on ambiguous, 0-to-1 projects.
  • Strong information-gathering, interviewing, analytical, and structured communication skills.
  • Ability to extract key insights from large amounts of fragmented information and turn them into clear conclusions.
  • Highly self-driven and able to push tasks forward independently.
  • Strong execution capability, hardworking attitude, and willingness to handle frequent travel, intensive field visits, and hands-on research.
  • Excellent communication skills with users, channels, partners, and internal teams


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Localization Project Manager 本地化翻译项目经理(PMO)
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • Coordinate and execute day-to-day translation projects, promptly identify and resolve online translation issues, and take ownership of task assignment, resource allocation, progress tracking, and delivery acceptance.
  • Maintain and manage core translation assets, including terminology databases and style guides.
  • Work closely with Product, Development, QA, and other cross-functional teams; be familiar with product release processes to ensure localization timelines align with product launch schedules.
  • Utilize data analysis tools (e.g. Excel pivot tables) to support decision-making with data-driven insights.
  • Support daily departmental operations and team management by optimizing workflows and improving delivery efficiency.
  • Respond promptly to urgent or ad-hoc requests, coordinate expedited tasks, and ensure smooth team collaboration.


What you'll need


  • Minimum of 3 years’ experience in translation or localization project management; experience in Web3 or the translation/localization industry is a plus; experience in AI tool development or application is a strong advantage.
  • Native Chinese speaker with excellent English listening, speaking, reading, and writing skills, able to communicate effectively with overseas stakeholders; background in localization, project management, or related fields is preferred.
  • Solid foundational technical understanding, familiarity with cross-functional collaboration, and knowledge of software development and release workflows.
  • Proficient in office and data analysis tools (e.g. Excel pivot tables) with basic data analysis capabilities; familiar with CAT tools such as Phrase.
  • Strong logical thinking and problem-solving skills; able to work under pressure; detail-oriented, thorough, responsible, and results-driven.
  • Excellent communication, coordination, and teamwork skills, with the ability to drive cross-department collaboration and resource alignment.
  • Fast learner with the ability to adapt to a fast-paced work environment, willing to take on challenges and continuously improve.


岗位职责：

1. 统筹与执行日常翻译/本地化项目，负责任务分配、资源调配、进度跟进与交付验收；

2. 把控翻译质量与交付标准，制定并推动质量改进措施（包括术语管理、风格指南、QA 流程等）；

3. 与产品、开发及其他跨部门团队对接，熟悉产品上线/发布流程，确保本地化工作与产品节奏同步；

4. 运用数据分析/AI工具进行数据分析，为决策提供数据支持；

5. 协助部门日常运营与团队管理，优化工作流程，提升交付效率；

6. 能及时响应突发需求，协调加急任务并保证团队协作顺畅。


岗位要求：

1. 3 年及以上翻译或本地化项目管理相关工作经验；有软件/互联网行业经验者优先；

2. 英语听说读写能力优秀，能够与海外/英语团队无障碍沟通；本地化及相关专业优先；

3. 具备基础技术理解能力，熟悉跨部门协作逻辑，了解软件开发/上线流程；

4.熟练运用AI工具赋能日常工作，有效提升个人及团队工作效率

5. 熟悉 CAT 工具（Phrase）或本地化平台者优先；

6. 逻辑性强、善于分析与解决问题，具备较强的抗压能力和责任心；

7. 沟通协调与团队协作能力突出，能有效推动跨部门沟通与资源对接；

8. 学习能力强、适应快节奏工作环境，愿接受挑战并持续改进流程。

﻿Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Head of Institutional Department
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


Role Overview

We are not looking for a traditional relationship manager or institutional sales executive. We need a battle-tested trading insider—someone who comes directly from a top-tier proprietary trading firm, HFT desk, or market maker.

As the Head of Institutional Department, you will view our exchange through the lens of a sophisticated trader. You will reverse-engineer our product offerings, fee models, and infrastructure to eliminate friction for HFT/prop desks, optimize liquidity, and aggressively scale Bitget’s institutional market share.


What you'll do


  • Product & Infrastructure Optimization: Drive the evolution of Bitget's institutional product suite (Derivatives, Perpetuals, Options, FIX/API interfaces, co-location, low-latency infrastructure, and custom liquidity solutions) ensuring absolute alignment with HFT demands.
  • HFT-Optimized Fee Structuring: Design and implement sophisticated, data-driven fee models. This includes aggressive maker rebates (including negative fees), competitive taker structures, dynamic volume-based tiers, and capital efficiency mechanisms to maximize maker volume and platform net revenue.
  • Strategic Alignment: Bridge the gap between trading reality and exchange product development. Translate complex trading friction points (latency, capital efficiency, risk limits, order book dynamics) into actionable technical specifications for our product and engineering teams.
  • Institutional Growth & Ecosystem Building: Attract, onboard, and retain global top-tier quant funds, HFT firms, and market makers by providing unparalleled trading conditions and bespoke liquidity incentives.
  • Market Intelligence: Monitor global market structures, competitor liquidity strategies, and evolving regulatory landscapes to ensure Bitget remains the preferred venue for institutional flow.


What you'll need


1.Hard Experience & Background

  • 3+ years (5+ preferred) of hands-on experience in quantitative trading, market making, or trading strategy optimization at a top-tier HFT/Prop firm (e.g., Tower Research, Jump Trading, Citadel, Jane Street, Optiver, HRT) OR as a Market Structure/Liquidity Specialist at a major traditional exchange (e.g., Nasdaq, NYSE).
  • Proven track record of directly executing HFT strategies, negotiating exchange fee models, or optimizing liquidity provision with measurable volume/efficiency gains.
  • Deep comprehension of both Crypto and Traditional Finance (TradFi) market structures, preferably with cross-exchange arbitrage or crypto market-making experience.


2.Technical & Core Competencies

  • Traders' Perspective: Ability to reverse-engineer exchange products, API structures, and incentive mechanisms from a practitioner’s point of view.
  • Data-Driven Strategy: Exceptional analytical skills to dissect order book data, evaluate turnover velocity, and design dynamic tier structures.
  • Deep Market Domain Knowledge: Profound insight into latency optimization, order book dynamics, capital efficiency, and risk management limits.
  • Education: Bachelor’s degree or higher in a quantitative discipline (Finance, Mathematics, Computer Science, Physics, or engineering) from a top-tier global university.


3.Soft Skills & Language

  • Bilingual Fluency: Professional proficiency in both English and Mandarin (written and spoken) is required to seamlessly collaborate with our global team and international institutional clients.
  • Network: An established, high-quality network within the global quant and HFT community.
  • Entrepreneurial Mindset: A hands-on leader who thrives in a fast-paced, high-execution crypto environment.


Preferred Pluses

  • Direct crypto HFT/market-making experience.
  • Familiarity with regulatory frameworks in Asia and the Middle East.



Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Chief Technology Officer, Brazil
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • Responsible for technology infrastructure, cybersecurity, operational continuity, and custody/safekeeping of virtual assets.
  • This officer fulfills two governance purposes:
  • (a) it prevents the accumulation of incompatible functions in a single individual; and
  • (b) it directly addresses Article 2(IV) of Resolution 519 (“compatibility of the information technology infrastructure with the complexity and risks of the business”) by placing a specifically designated and technically qualified officer in charge of IT infrastructure.
  • Given the nature of Bitget's operations as a digital asset exchange, this function will likely receive focused attention from the BCB during pre-operational inspection (Art. 25 of Resolution 519).


What you'll need


  • Education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Security, or a related technical field. A Master's degree is a plus. Relevant certifications are highly desirable.
  • Minimum of 7-10 years of progressive experience in technology leadership roles, including at least 3-5 years specifically in information security and 3-5 years in a CTO or similar role.
  • Deep understanding of information security principles, best practices, and relevant technologies (e.g., firewalls, intrusion detection systems, vulnerability management tools, cryptography, SIEM).
  • Expertise in software development, systems architecture, and IT infrastructure management.
  • Excellent leadership, communication, and interpersonal skills, particularly in cross-cultural settings.
  • Availability to work flexible hours to accommodate communication with the Asia-based team.


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey

jobs.title: Finance Manager (EU)
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!



The Finance Manager will oversee all financial, accounting, and tax-related activities for the company’s EU entity. This role ensures compliance with local statutory requirements, supports business operations, and provides accurate financial reporting to regional and global management. The Finance Manager will act as the primary point of contact for external auditors, tax authorities, and internal stakeholders regarding financial matters.


What you'll do


1. Financial Accounting & Reporting


  • Lead and manage the monthly, quarterly, and yearly financial closing processes for the EU entity.
  • Ensure timely and accurate preparation of financial statements in accordance with IFRS/local GAAP.
  • Review journal entries, account reconciliations, accruals, and adjustments.
  • Maintain the general ledger and ensure data accuracy and completeness.
  • Prepare management reports, variance analyses, and financial KPIs.
  • Coordinate with group finance on consolidation and intercompany transactions.


2. Tax Compliance & Planning


  • Ensure full compliance with EU and local country corporate tax, VAT/GST, payroll tax, and other statutory requirements.
  • Liaise with external tax advisors and authorities on tax filings, audits, and queries.
  • Monitor changes in EU tax regulations and assess financial implications.
  • Support tax planning, transfer pricing documentation, and compliance with BEPS requirements.
  • Review VAT treatment for cross-border transactions and ensure correct reporting.


3. Audit & Internal Controls


  • Manage statutory audits, liaising with external auditors to ensure timely completion.
  • Strengthen internal controls and ensure adherence to company policies and financial regulations.
  • Conduct financial risk assessments and implement mitigation measures.
  • Ensure proper documentation and record-keeping in compliance with regulatory rules.


4. Business Support


  • Provide financial insights to support business decisions and strategic planning.
  • Partner with operations, sales, and HQ finance teams on budgeting and forecasting.
  • Support finance-related projects, system improvements, and process automation.


5. Regulatory & Statutory Compliance


  • Ensure compliance with EU company law, accounting standards, and reporting obligations.
  • Coordinate statutory filings, annual returns, and corporate secretarial matters (if needed).



What you'll need


Qualifications


  • Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field; CPA/ACCA/CIMA or equivalent preferred.
  • Minimum 5–8 years of experience in accounting and tax, ideally within an EU jurisdiction.
  • Strong knowledge of IFRS and/or local GAAP
  • Solid understanding of EU VAT, corporate income tax, and cross-border tax regulations.


Skills & Competencies


  • Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities.
  • Excellent communication skills with the ability to work with stakeholders across regions.
  • High level of integrity, accuracy, and attention to detail.
  • Ability to work independently with minimal supervision.
  • Strong organizational skills and the ability to meet tight deadlines.


Preferred Experience


  • Experience working in a multinational or cross-border environment.
  • Prior involvement in EU statutory audits and tax inspections.
  • Experience with transfer pricing documentation or BEPS compliance.



Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Institutional Business Development Manager
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • Target market and customer identification: Focus on identifying and contacting potential market makers, brokers and other customer groups who use API as their main trading tool, understand their business needs, and establish and maintain long-term cooperative relationships.
  • Business negotiation and cooperation promotion: Lead the business negotiation process to ensure that cooperation terms are fair and reasonable, effectively promote the conclusion of cooperation agreements, and enhance customer satisfaction and loyalty.
  • Market insights and strategy formulation: Continuously track and analyze the dynamics of the API trading market, competitor strategies and changes in customer needs, and provide data support and suggestions for the company's product iterations and market strategies.
  • Customer support and relationship maintenance: Provide technical support and business consultation to customers in the process of using APIs, solve customer problems, enhance customer stickiness, and promote continued business growth.
  • Performance achievement and team contribution: Set and achieve personal and team business development goals, including but not limited to key performance indicators such as the number of new customers and API transaction volume growth.


What you'll need


  • Educational background: Bachelor degree or above, finance, computer, information technology, marketing and other related majors are preferred.
  • Work experience: At least 3 years of relevant work experience in BD/sales in financial institutions, Internet companies or blockchain industries. Applicants with successful cases of connecting with API customers such as market makers and brokers will be given priority.
  • Professional knowledge: Familiar with the cryptocurrency market, understand basic concepts such as API trading systems, high-frequency trading, quantitative trading, etc., and have a certain understanding of blockchain technology. jobs.title: Localization Product Manager | Translation Platform Direction 本地化产品经理｜翻译平台方向
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • Responsible for product planning, requirements analysis, feature design, and iterative optimization of the AI translation platform
  • Deep understanding of translation and localization workflows; leverage business pain points to enhance platform capabilities and improve translation efficiency and quality
  • Collaborate with AI/algorithm teams to continuously improve AI translation capabilities, including translation quality, terminology consistency, language style, upper/lower context comprehension, and multilingual adaptation
  • Work closely with the R&D team on requirements review, development scheduling, launch acceptance, and issue resolution to ensure high-quality project delivery
  • Establish and refine user feedback mechanisms to drive continuous optimization of translation quality
  • Produce PRDs, flowcharts, prototypes, and other product documentation to ensure alignment between business requirements, product solutions, and technical implementation


What you'll need


  • 3+ years of product management experience; candidates with AI product or translation platform experience preferred; fluent in English with no communication barriers
  • Familiarity with translation, localization, and AI; proficiency in localization workflows, terminology management, translation memory, machine translation, large language models, and Prompt-related concepts
  • Excellent cross-team communication, project coordination, and conflict resolution skills; ability to coordinate multilingual, R&D, and algorithm teams for efficient collaboration
  • Strong product owner mindset and independent decision-making ability; capable of driving decisions based on business value, user experience, and technical feasibility


岗位职责：


  • 负责 AI 翻译平台的产品规划、需求分析、功能设计及迭代优化
  • 深入理解翻译及本地化流程，结合业务痛点设计平台能力，提升翻译效率与质量
  • 协同 AI / 算法团队持续提升 AI 翻译能力，包括翻译质量、术语一致性、语气风格、上下文理解及多语言适配
  • 与研发、AI团队紧密协作，推动需求评审、开发排期、上线验收及问题闭环，确保项目高质量交付
  • 建立 AI 翻译效果评估及反馈机制，推动翻译质量持续优化
  • 输出 PRD、流程图、原型图等产品文档，确保业务需求、产品方案与技术实现准确对齐


任职要求：


  • 3 年以上产品经理经验，有 AI 产品、翻译平台经验者优先；能无障碍英文交流
  • 懂翻译、懂产品、懂 AI，熟悉本地化流程、术语库、翻译记忆库、机器翻译、大模型及 Prompt 等相关概念
  • 具备优秀的跨团队沟通、项目推动和冲突化解能力，能够协调多语言、研发、AI / 算法等团队高效合作
  • 具备较强的产品 owner 意识和独立判断能力，能够基于业务价值、用户体验和技术可行性推动决策

jobs.title: 量化研究员-Alpha挖掘方向
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • As a core quantitative researcher, you will directly participate in the entire lifecycle of the team's high-frequency trading system's strategy development, using data to extract the alpha (Alpha) of the market.
  • High-frequency factor mining: Conduct in-depth analysis of market data at massive levels (such as Level-2, Tick-level, or order book-intensive order streams), and apply statistical and machine learning methods for high-frequency feature engineering and factor mining.
  • Statistical modeling and strategy development: For specific long-tail assets, mainstream digital assets, or micro-market structures, build, test, and optimize high-frequency market-making (Market Making), statistical arbitrage (Stat Arb), or momentum/mean reversion trading strategies.
  • Backtesting system and model validation: Write high-quality, rigorous high-frequency strategy backtesting scripts, conduct scientific validity tests, multicollinearity tests, and survival analyses on factors to ensure that the strategies are less prone to overfitting in live trading.
  • Inventory and risk management: Optimize the dynamic inventory control (Inventory Management), slippage assessment, and micro-hedging mechanisms of the strategies in live trading.


What you'll need


  • The first degree must be a bachelor's degree or above from a domestic 985 university (or an equivalent top-notch overseas university).
  • Professional background: Hardcore science and engineering majors such as mathematics, physics, statistics, computer science, engineering, etc., with strong mathematical and logical reasoning skills, as well as a solid foundation in probability theory and mathematical statistics.
  • High-frequency market-making strategy or domestic spot/futures Tick-level quantitative trading practical experience or research experience (mandatory).
  • Python expert: Proficiently using Python for data science work, proficiently mastering Polars (or Pandas), Numpy, Statsmodels, Scikit-learn, etc., and capable of efficiently processing and manipulating large-scale high-frequency time series data.
  • Factor and modeling experience: Familiar with the factor mining process, with a deep understanding or research interest in order book imbalance (OBI), realized volatility (Realized Volatility), or microstructure (Microstructure).
  • English proficiency: Possessing good academic literature reading skills in English, able to quickly convert cutting-edge quantitative papers (such as A-S market-making model variants, machine learning prediction, etc.) into code and conduct real trading tests.
  • Bonus points (not mandatory but have priority): Achieving excellent results in Kaggle, mathematical modeling competitions (MCM/ICM), top-level hackathons, or various algorithm/programming competitions (such as ICPC/CCPC).


岗位职责：


  • 作为核心量化研究员，你将直接参与团队高频交易系统的策略研发全生命周期，用数据挖掘市场的阿尔法（Alpha）。
  • 高频因子挖掘： 深入分析海量级别（如 Level-2、Tick 级、Orderbook 密集的订单流）的市场数据，运用统计学、机器学习方法进行高频特征工程与因子挖掘。
  • 统计建模与策略研发： 针对特定的长尾资产、主流数字资产或微观市场结构，构建、测试并优化高频做市（Market Making）、统计套利（Stat Arb）或动量/均值回归交易策略。
  • 回测系统与模型验证： 编写高质量、严谨的高频策略回测脚本，对因子进行科学的有效性检验、多重共线性测试及生存分析，确保策略在实盘中不易过拟合。
  • 存货与风险管理： 优化策略在实盘中的动态存货控制（Inventory Management）、滑点评估及微观对冲机制。


任职要求：


  • 第一学历须为国内 985 院校（或海外同等档次顶尖名校）本科及以上学历。
  • 专业背景： 数学、物理、统计学、计算机科学、工程等硬核理工科专业，具备极强的数理逻辑、概率论与数理统计功底。
  • 拥有高频做市策略，或国内期现货 Tick 级量化交易实盘/研究经验者（必须）。
  • Python 高手： 极其熟练地使用 Python 进行数据科学工作，熟练掌握 Polars（或 Pandas）、Numpy、Statsmodels、Scikit-learn 等工具，能高效处理和操纵大规模高频时间序列数据。
  • 因子与建模经验： 熟悉因子挖掘流程，对订单簿不平衡度（OBI）、实现波动率（Realized Volatility）或微观市场结构（Microstructure）有深刻理解或研究兴趣。
  • 英文能力： 具备良好的英文学术文献阅读能力，能够快速将前沿量化论文（如 A-S 做市模型变体、机器学习预测等）转化为代码并进行实盘测试。
  • 加分项（非硬性，但有优先权）：在 Kaggle、数学建模竞赛（MCM/ICM）、Top 级黑客松或各类算法/编程竞赛（如 ICPC/CCPC）中获得过优异成绩者。


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe

jobs.descriptionText:
About us

Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.

Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.

We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!

What you'll do

As a core quantitative researcher, you will directly participate in the entire lifecycle of the team's high-frequency trading system's strategy development, using data to extract the alpha (Alpha) of the market.
High-frequency factor mining: Conduct in-depth analysis of market data at massive levels (such as Level-2, Tick-level, or order book-intensive order streams), and apply statistical and machine learning methods for high-frequency feature engineering and factor mining.
Statistical modeling and strategy development: For specific long-tail assets, mainstream digital assets, or micro-market structures, build, test, and optimize high-frequency market-making (Market Making), statistical arbitrage (Stat Arb), or momentum/mean reversion trading strategies.
Backtesting system and model validation: Write high-quality, rigorous high-frequency strategy backtesting scripts, conduct scientific validity tests, multicollinearity tests, and survival analyses on factors to ensure that the strategies are less prone to overfitting in live trading.
Inventory and risk management: Optimize the dynamic inventory control (Inventory Management), slippage assessment, and micro-hedging mechanisms of the strategies in live trading.

What you'll need

The first degree must be a bachelor's degree or above from a domestic 985 university (or an equivalent top-notch overseas university).
Professional background: Hardcore science and engineering majors such as mathematics, physics, statistics, computer science, engineering, etc., with strong mathematical and logical reasoning skills, as well as a solid foundation in probability theory and mathematical statistics.
High-frequency market-making strategy or domestic spot/futures Tick-level quantitative trading practical experience or research experience (mandatory).
Python expert: Proficiently using Python for data science work, proficiently mastering Polars (or Pandas), Numpy, Statsmodels, Scikit-learn, etc., and capable of efficiently processing and manipulating large-scale high-frequency time series data.
Factor and modeling experience: Familiar with the factor mining process, with a deep understanding or research interest in order book imbalance (OBI), realized volatility (Realized Volatility), or microstructure (Microstructure).
English proficiency: Possessing good academic literature reading skills in English, able to quickly convert cutting-edge quantitative papers (such as A-S market-making model variants, machine learning prediction, etc.) into code and conduct real trading tests.
Bonus points (not mandatory but have priority): Achieving excellent results in Kaggle, mathematical modeling competitions (MCM/ICM), top-level hackathons, or various algorithm/programming competitions (such as ICPC/CCPC).

岗位职责：

作为核心量化研究员，你将直接参与团队高频交易系统的策略研发全生命周期，用数据挖掘市场的阿尔法（Alpha）。
高频因子挖掘： 深入分析海量级别（如 Level-2、Tick 级、Orderbook 密集的订单流）的市场数据，运用统计学、机器学习方法进行高频特征工程与因子挖掘。
统计建模与策略研发： 针对特定的长尾资产、主流数字资产或微观市场结构，构建、测试并优化高频做市（Market Making）、统计套利（Stat Arb）或动量/均值回归交易策略。
回测系统与模型验证： 编写高质量、严谨的高频策略回测脚本，对因子进行科学的有效性检验、多重共线性测试及生存分析，确保策略在实盘中不易过拟合。
存货与风险管理： 优化策略在实盘中的动态存货控制（Inventory Management）、滑点评估及微观对冲机制。

任职要求：

第一学历须为国内 985 院校（或海外同等档次顶尖名校）本科及以上学历。
专业背景： 数学、物理、统计学、计算机科学、工程等硬核理工科专业，具备极强的数理逻辑、概率论与数理统计功底。
拥有高频做市策略，或国内期现货 Tick 级量化交易实盘/研究经验者（必须）。
Python 高手： 极其熟练地使用 Python 进行数据科学工作，熟练掌握 Polars（或 Pandas）、Numpy、Statsmodels、Scikit-learn 等工具，能高效处理和操纵大规模高频时间序列数据。
因子与建模经验： 熟悉因子挖掘流程，对订单簿不平衡度（OBI）、实现波动率（Realized Volatility）或微观市场结构（Microstructure）有深刻理解或研究兴趣。
英文能力： 具备良好的英文学术文献阅读能力，能够快速将前沿量化论文（如 A-S 做市模型变体、机器学习预测等）转化为代码并进行实盘测试。
加分项（非硬性，但有优先权）：在 Kaggle、数学建模竞赛（MCM/ICM）、Top 级黑客松或各类算法/编程竞赛（如 ICPC/CCPC）中获得过优异成绩者。

Why Bitget?

Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
We offer competitive salaries and benefits
Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!

If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!

jobs.title: Managing Director (MiFID, EU)
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


Regulatory & Governance

  • Act as primary regulatory owner of Bitget EU's MiFID II investment services
  • Ensure full compliance with MiFID II conduct of business rules, including best execution, suitability, appropriateness, and product governance obligations
  • Lead ongoing engagement with the FMA on matters relating to investment services, market conduct, and front office activities
  • Maintain fit & proper standards on an ongoing basis as required by FMA and ESMA guidelines

Commercial & Business Development

  • Define and execute Bitget EU's commercial strategy for MiFID II products across European markets
  • Drive client acquisition and relationship management across retail, professional, and institutional client segments
  • Lead the development and launch of MiCAR crypto asset services and MiFID II regulated products including crypto derivatives
  • Build and manage strategic partnerships with institutional counterparties, liquidity providers, banks, and distribution partners
  • Represent Bitget EU externally with clients, media, industry bodies, and regulators

Compliance & Conduct

  • Work closely with Legal and Compliance to ensure front office activities meet all regulatory obligations
  • Lead the implementation of product governance policies
  • Ensure conflicts of interest are identified, managed, and disclosed appropriately across front office activities
  • Support preparation for and management of FMA supervisory inspections relating to investment services



What you'll need


  • Experience with derivative products (been commercially or operationally responsible for derivatives products)
  • Deep understanding of financial market infrastructure, including custody, settlement, clearing, and order management systems
  • Track record of working in a regulated environment (e.g., banks / investment firms / other licensed institutions) - min. 3 years of experience



Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges

jobs.title: Senior Legal Counsel, Regulatory & Licensing (US)
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


We are looking for an experienced US Senior Regulatory Counsel to support the exchange’s strategic expansion into the United States. The role will focus on regulatory structuring, licensing strategy, acquisitions, organic license applications, joint ventures, and product analysis across spot trading, derivatives, and real-world asset products.

The ideal candidate should have strong experience with US financial services regulation, digital assets, broker-dealer / exchange / derivatives frameworks, and regulatory engagement with US federal and state regulators.


US Market Entry and Licensing Strategy

  • Advise on the exchange’s US expansion strategy across spot crypto, derivatives, tokenized assets, and RWA products.
  • Assess available regulatory pathways, including acquisitions, joint ventures, partnerships, and organic license applications.
  • Support analysis of licensing requirements involving CFTC, SEC, FinCEN, NFA, state money transmission regulators, NYDFS, and other relevant regulators.
  • Prepare internal legal and regulatory roadmaps for US market.
  • Advise on entity structuring, governance, permissible activities, and regulatory perimeter issues.


Strategic Transactions

  • Assist in legal and regulatory due diligence for potential US corporate transactions, including licensed entities such as DCMs, DCOs, FCMs, broker-dealers, ATSs, RIAs, MSBs, money transmitters, trust companies, or other regulated businesses.
  • Identify licensing gaps, regulatory risks, change-of-control requirements, enforcement history, operational limitations, and post-acquisition remediation needs.
  • Work with corporate, tax, finance, compliance, and external counsel on transaction structuring and execution.
  • Prepare regulatory risk assessments and board / management briefing materials for potential transactions.
  • Support structuring and negotiation of US joint ventures, white-label arrangements, referral models, liquidity partnerships, custody arrangements, broker relationships, clearing arrangements, and technology partnerships.
  • Review partnership contracts and advise on regulatory responsibility allocation.


Organic Applications and Regulatory Filings

  • Support preparation and submission of US regulatory license applications.
  • Coordinate with internal stakeholders on business plans, compliance manuals, governance documents, financial projections, operational policies, cybersecurity materials, AML/KYC frameworks, and product descriptions - in conjunction with the Compliance team
  • Manage regulatory filing workstreams and liaise with external counsel, consultants, and internal teams.
  • Track application timelines, regulator questions, information requests, and remediation actions.


Product Regulatory Analysis

  • Advise on US regulatory treatment of spot crypto, derivatives, futures, swaps, margin, lending, staking, tokenized securities, stablecoins, and RWA products.
  • Review proposed product launches and assess whether activities may trigger SEC, CFTC, FinCEN, state licensing, broker-dealer, exchange, clearing, custody, or investment adviser requirements.
  • Provide practical guidance on product design, customer access, geo-restrictions, disclosures, risk warnings, and operational controls.
  • Work closely with product, compliance, risk, operations, and business teams to design compliant US-facing or US-excluded product models.


Regulatory Engagement and External Counsel Management

  • Support communications with US regulators, self-regulatory organizations, and licensing authorities.
  • Prepare regulator-facing submissions, responses, presentations, and meeting materials.
  • Manage external US counsel and consultants, including scope of work, budget, deliverables, and timelines.
  • Translate complex regulatory advice into clear, practical recommendations for senior management.


Internal Governance and Risk Management

  • Develop internal policies, playbooks, and decision frameworks for US regulatory matters.
  • Maintain trackers for US licensing initiatives, regulatory obligations, acquisition targets, and product approvals.
  • Support internal training on US regulatory requirements and product restrictions.
  • Coordinate with global legal and compliance teams to ensure consistency across jurisdictions.


What you'll need


  • Qualified U.S. Lawyer with at least 8 years of legal experience
  • Strong experience in US financial services, fintech, crypto, securities, commodities, derivatives, broker-dealer, exchange, payments, or banking regulation.
  • Prior financial regulatory experience at a leading U.S. law firm, regulator, crypto exchange, broker-dealer, derivatives platform, fintech company, financial institution, or regulated trading venue.
  • Familiarity with US regulatory frameworks involving the SEC, CFTC, FinCEN, NFA, state money transmission regimes, and NYDFS.
  • Experience with licensing applications, regulatory filings, acquisitions, or regulated entity diligence.
  • Ability to analyze complex regulatory issues and provide practical, business-oriented advice.
  • Strong drafting, project management, and stakeholder coordination skills.
  • Comfortable working in a fast-paced, cross-border environment.
  • Ability to live and work in the U.S.



Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Technical Accounting Manager
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • Work closely with the Senior Manager to research, analyze, and document technical accounting conclusions under IFRS, US GAAP and other applicable local GAAP. 
  • Prepare high-quality technical accounting memos and position papers on complex topics, including but not limited to revenue recognition, financial instruments, consolidation, share-based compensation, and digital assets. 
  • Support the development, implementation, and maintenance of accounting policies and procedures across different reporting frameworks. 
  • Assist in monitoring new accounting standards and regulatory developments, and support implementation efforts across the organization. 
  • Support month-end, quarter-end, and year-end close processes for areas involving complex accounting judgments and estimates. 
  • Liaise with external auditors and advisors on technical accounting matters, audit requests, and accounting conclusions.
  • Partner with the broader reporting teams to support periodic reporting activities, such as financial statement preparation, disclosure support, audit deliverables, and reporting packages 
  • Support ad hoc technical accounting projects, including market expansion, new entity setup, M&A activity, restructuring, or other strategic initiatives.


What you'll need


  • Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related discipline. 
  • CPA, HKICPA, ACCA, or equivalent professional qualification preferred. 
  • 5+ years of relevant experience in public accounting and/or industry. 
  • Big 4 audit or advisory experience strongly preferred. 
  • Strong technical accounting foundation, with experience in IFRS and/or US GAAP. 
  • Experience in FinTech, digital assets, or technology companies is preferred but not required. 
  • Strong analytical skills with the ability to research complex accounting issues and develop well-supported conclusions. 
  • Excellent business communication skills (both written and verbal), strong interpersonal skills and ability to work effectively with teams across different functions, seniority levels, and geographic locations. 
  • Comfortable working in a fast-paced, evolving environment with changing priorities and ambiguity. 
  • High attention to detail, strong ownership mindset, and ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously.


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey

Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.

Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.

We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!

What you'll do

Work closely with the Senior Manager to research, analyze, and document technical accounting conclusions under IFRS, US GAAP and other applicable local GAAP. 
Prepare high-quality technical accounting memos and position papers on complex topics, including but not limited to revenue recognition, financial instruments, consolidation, share-based compensation, and digital assets. 
Support the development, implementation, and maintenance of accounting policies and procedures across different reporting frameworks. 
Assist in monitoring new accounting standards and regulatory developments, and support implementation efforts across the organization. 
Support month-end, quarter-end, and year-end close processes for areas involving complex accounting judgments and estimates. 
Liaise with external auditors and advisors on technical accounting matters, audit requests, and accounting conclusions.
Partner with the broader reporting teams to support periodic reporting activities, such as financial statement preparation, disclosure support, audit deliverables, and reporting packages 
Support ad hoc technical accounting projects, including market expansion, new entity setup, M&A activity, restructuring, or other strategic initiatives.

What you'll need

Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related discipline. 
CPA, HKICPA, ACCA, or equivalent professional qualification preferred. 
5+ years of relevant experience in public accounting and/or industry. 
Big 4 audit or advisory experience strongly preferred. 
Strong technical accounting foundation, with experience in IFRS and/or US GAAP. 
Experience in FinTech, digital assets, or technology companies is preferred but not required. 
Strong analytical skills with the ability to research complex accounting issues and develop well-supported conclusions. 
Excellent business communication skills (both written and verbal), strong interpersonal skills and ability to work effectively with teams across different functions, seniority levels, and geographic locations. 
Comfortable working in a fast-paced, evolving environment with changing priorities and ambiguity. 
High attention to detail, strong ownership mindset, and ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously.

Why Bitget?

Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions 
We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
We offer competitive salaries and benefits
Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!

If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!

By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: English Copy Editor
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • Own the end-to-end processing of English content across the platform and its sub-sites, including translation, editing, contextual optimization, and localization adaptation, with a daily proofreading/editing volume of approximately 8,000 words(unweighted word count).
  • Handle a wide range of content types, including website localization (SEO-focused), in-app/UI copy, product and technical documentation, marketing materials, help center content, and legal/compliance documents.
  • Conduct language quality monitoring and copy optimization across all business lines to ensure high-quality English localization for both web and app content, with zero language-related complaints.
  • Maintain and customize terminology databases in line with industry standards, covering cryptocurrency and financial domains.
  • Collaborate with the team to develop and maintain multi-scenario style guides, ensuring consistent and user-friendly language across push notifications, marketing campaigns, product launches, and promotional materials.
  • Build, maintain, and optimize translation memory (TM) assets.
  • Act as a language and localization expert, partnering with Product, Operations, and Legal teams to provide localization strategies, especially for culturally sensitive content (e.g. regional or cultural differences).
  • Implement and optimize CAT tools (Phrase) and machine translation engines (DeepL / Google MT), providing ongoing feedback and recommendations based on practical usage.
  • Produce regular language quality analysis reports, including error typologies, improvement suggestions, and best-practice examples.


What you'll need


  • Chinese nationals with multi-year overseas living experience in native English-speaking countries and native-equivalent English proficiency; or native English speakers with proficient Chinese language skills (listening, speaking, reading, and writing).
  • Minimum 3 years of experience in the cryptocurrency industry, with deep insights and strong expertise in the field.; entry-level or non-crypto backgrounds will not be considered.
  • Proficient in AI applications, with a proven track record of leveraging AI to improve efficiency, empower teams, and boost overall productivity.
  • Prior experience in English translation and proofreading, with knowledge of CAT tools; proficiency in at least one CAT tool is preferred (this requirement may be flexible).
  • Candidates should be based in a time zone close to UTC+8, or be willing to work flexible hours between 10:00 and 23:00 (UTC+8), completing an 8-hour workday within this window (this requirement may be flexible).


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!


If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!

jobs.title: GRC Officer, Brazil
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • Statutory Accountability: Serve as a statutory director and the responsible executive for AML/CFT before the BCB and COAF, overseeing all regulatory reporting and examinations.
  • Risk Architecture: Design and maintain the Enterprise Risk Management (ERM) framework, covering crypto-specific liquidity, cybersecurity (private key governance), and operational risks.
  • Compliance Oversight: Lead the KYC/KYT and Travel Rule programs, ensuring separation of client assets from corporate funds.
  • Structural Independence: Maintain a firm "Chinese Wall" between compliance and business teams, reporting directly to the [Board and Bitget's global compliance function] to ensure unbiased oversight.
  • VASP Licensing: Lead the firm through the ongoing BCB licensing cycles, renewals, examinations, change approvals, ensuring all governance standards are met.
  • Periodic Reporting: Ensuring all regulatory filings are made in a timely manner including monthly reports to RFB per IN RFB 1.888/2019


What you'll need


  • Regulatory Standing: You must meet the BCB’s "fit and proper" criteria to serve as a Statutory Director (resident in Brazil (or willing to relocate) with a clean professional record).
  • Industry Expertise: [8+ years] in GRC or Internal Controls within the Brazilian Financial System (SFN), ideally with direct experience in a VASP or Fintech.
  • Technical Knowledge: Deep fluency in BCB Resolution 3978/2020, the LGPD and regulations governing VASPs (BCB 519, 520, 521).
  • Certifications: Professional designations such as CAMS, CPC-A, or ANBIMA (CGA/CGE) are highly preferred.
  • Principled Leadership: The ability to operate independently of revenue-generating functions and provide objective anaysis on high-risk initiatives.



Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
