jobs.title: AI Application Testing Engineer (Agent Direction) AI应用测试工程师（Agent方向）
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • Conduct functional testing for AI products, including testing LLM, RAG, Agent and other AI-based products, and be responsible for building an automated testing system.
  • Agent capability testing: Design Agent test cases, covering multi-turn dialogue, Tool Use, context management, and Agent behavior consistency testing.
  • AI testing tools: Utilize LLM to assist in generating test cases and automating defect analysis, building an Agent autonomous testing system.
  • MCP ecosystem testing: Conduct MCP service and Skill integration testing, ensuring consistency between services, with particular focus on cross-service interaction issues.
  • Security and compliance testing: Design Prompt Injection, adversarial input security assessment plans, output compliance and risk control.


What you'll need


  • 3+ years of testing experience, solid computer science background, familiar with Python/TypeScript/Java, with automation development capabilities.
  • Experience with LLM application testing, familiar with RAG, Agent workflows (LangChain/LangGraph), and AI application testing methodologies.
  • Familiar with interface testing, CI/CD and pytest/Playwright testing frameworks; familiar with Linux and performance testing.
  • Familiar with MCP protocol and Skill integration testing; familiar with automation testing tools (such as AI-assisted test generation) — preferred.
  • Experience evaluating Ragas/DeepEval for LLM performance testing; familiar with Agent framework (AutoGen/MetaGPT) testing practices; familiar with computing/GPU performance testing and optimization — preferred.


岗位职责：


  • AI应用质量保障：负责LLM、RAG、Agent及多模态产品的全链路测试，建立非确定性系统的质量评估标准。
  • Agent测试体系：设计Agent测试框架，覆盖意图识别、Tool Use、记忆管理、多Agent协同的自动化验证。
  • AI辅助测试：利用LLM驱动用例生成与边界发散，构建Agent自主测试闭环，实现智能巡检。
  • MCP生态测试：负责MCP服务及Skill集的接口、集成与兼容性测试，评估外部工具链稳定性。
  • 对抗安全测试：设计Prompt Injection、越权调用等攻击用例，保障数据隐私与合规。


任职要求：


  • 3年以上测开经验，本科及以上学历，精通Python/TypeScript/Java，能独立开发自动化测试框架。
  • 深入理解LLM应用架构，具备RAG、Agent工作流（LangChain/LangGraph）、向量数据库实操经验。
  • 熟悉接口测试、CI/CD及pytest/Playwright等工具链；熟悉Linux与性能排查。
  • 熟悉MCP协议或Skill封装测试优先；具备非确定性系统测试思维（幻觉率、一致性评估）。
  • 有Ragas/DeepEval等LLM评估工具落地经验；多Agent系统（AutoGen/MetaGPT）测试实践；云原生/GPU推理性能测试经验优先。


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: KOL BD Manager -Turkey
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • Drive Trading Volume & FTT Growth: Identify, recruit, and manage KOLs, affiliates, trading groups, and communities across Turkey that can deliver measurable trading activity (FTTs, 100FTTs, trading volume) rather than only content creation.
  • Performance-Oriented Partnerships: Build and negotiate partnerships with KOLs, affiliates, and institutional partners based on volume-driven KPIs, ensuring accountability and sustainable ROI.
  • Campaign Execution & Monitoring: Execute trading-focused campaigns (e.g., signals, copy trading, trading contests, affiliate pushes, trading education sessions) designed to maximize active user trading and volume growth.
  • Performance Tracking & Optimization: Monitor and analyze performance metrics (FTT, trading volume, ROI per partner) and continuously optimize strategies to ensure consistent achievement of business targets.
  • Market Intelligence: Stay informed about industry developments, competitor strategies, and user trading behaviors across Israel to design effective, compliance-aligned, volume-driven initiatives.
  • Retention & Community Building: Work with KOLs, affiliates, and trading leaders to establish sustainable trading communities (VIP groups, copy trading channels, institutional partnerships) that drive long-term engagement and recurring volume.


What you'll need


  • Proven track record in business development, affiliate/KOL management, or institutional partnerships in the Crypto/Fintech/Trading industry.
  • Existing network of trading KOLs, communities, affiliates, and institutional contacts across Israel is highly desirable.
  • Familiarity with both crypto and traditional finance markets, with the ability to bridge relationships between institutional players and retail trading communities.
  • Strong understanding of crypto trading funnels (sign-up → KYC → FTT → 100FTT → retention) and what drives real trading volume.
  • Excellent negotiation, interpersonal, and relationship management skills.
  • Analytical and data-driven mindset; able to measure, report, and optimize partner performance against volume targets.
  • Strong written and verbal communication skills in English.
  • Passion for crypto trading and financial markets, with the ability to engage, influence, and build trust with both retail and institutional stakeholders.
  • Ability to perform under pressure with clear performance-based targets tied directly to trading metrics.



Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!


If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!

jobs.title: Talent Acquisition (Part-time)
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget Wallet is the non-custodial crypto wallet designed to make crypto simple and secure for everyone. With over 80 million users, we bring together a full suite of crypto services, including swaps, market insights, staking, rewards, DApp exploration, and payment solutions. Supporting 130+ blockchains and millions of tokens, Bitget Wallet enables seamless multi-chain trading across hundreds of DEXs and cross-chain bridges. Backed by a $300+ million user protection fund, it ensures the highest level of security for users' assets.


What you'll do


  • Source and identify BD part-time candidates across target regions (KOLs, affiliates, community leaders)
  • Build and maintain a strong candidate pipeline aligned with regional needs
  • Conduct initial screening and coordinate interviews with regional managers
  • Manage candidate funnel (sourcing → outreach → screening → hiring)
  • Explore and optimize sourcing channels (Telegram, X, Discord, referrals)
  • Support and coordinate with external recruitment agencies when needed


What you'll need


  • Experience in recruiting, BD, or affiliate/community growth (Web3 preferred)
  • Strong understanding of crypto ecosystem and local communities
  • Familiar with X, Telegram, Discord, etc.
  • Strong communication and coordination skills
  • Self-driven, able to manage multiple roles across regions



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: CFD Sales & Channel Operations
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • Sales enablement: Translate stage goals, product USPs, pricing/rebate/fee policies and campaign mechanics into executable sales/channel playbooks (SOPs, scripts, cadence, KPIs, collateral). Track execution quality and run post‑mortems.
  • Channel and sales liaison: Partner with IB and BD teams, run regular check‑ins and feedback loops, drive growth on priority channels and capture frontline needs.
  • Competitive intelligence: Analyze competitors from a channel/commercial perspective (rebates, CPA/Rev‑Share/Hybrid, promos, policies, agent structure) and deliver quantitative/qualitative insights and strategy recommendations.
  • Policy and data optimization: Use metrics such as conversion, activation, retention, net deposits, active traders, volume and ROI to design and iterate channel policies and incentives (tiered rebates, regional pricing, campaigns, A/B tests).
  • Training and enablement: Lead campaign kick‑offs, sales trainings and FAQs; produce pitch decks, talk tracks, comparison sheets and IB recruitment materials to ensure consistent execution.
  • Compliance and risk alignment: Assess policy and campaign compliance; coordinate with Legal/Compliance/Risk to implement approvals and audit trails.
  • Cross‑functional execution: Work with Product, Ops, Marketing, CS, Payments and Finance to land milestones, close the loop and codify best practices.


What you'll need


  • 3+ years in sales, channel operations or channel strategy with 2+ years of hands‑on strategy rollout/project delivery; FX/CFD, FX brokerage, derivatives or crypto brokerage experience is a plus.
  • Strong understanding of brokerage channel ecosystem and IB programs; familiar with incentive models (tiered rebates, CPA, Rev‑Share, Hybrid), campaign mechanics and regional channel tactics.
  • Data‑driven with excellent Excel/Sheets skills; CRM experience (Salesforce/HubSpot). SQL or Python is a plus.
  • Proven ability to convert complex strategies into clear SOPs and sales playbooks; excellent communication and writing skills; fluent in English and Chinese.
  • Solid competitive research and market insight; structured thinking, strong presentation skills; results‑oriented and effective in fast‑paced environments.
  • Compliance awareness and sound risk judgment; willing to travel as needed.
  • Nice to have: Built IB programs or channel policies from scratch; strong industry network (top IBs); experience with A/B testing and incentive performance evaluation.


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Compliance Operations Analyst (KYC/KYB/EDD）Night Shift
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • AML Reviews: Perform reviews (KYC/KYB, EDD, TM, Screening) with a focus on accuracy and timeliness.
  • Screening & Assessment: Conduct name screening (sanctions, PEP, adverse media) and evaluate potential matches according to internal policies.
  • Due Diligence: Assess customer profiles, including Source of Funds (SoF), Source of Wealth (SoW), PoA and periodic review.
  • Alert Investigation: Investigate alerts and cases related to transaction activity or customer risk.
  • Documentation: Prepare clear case files and investigation summaries supporting risk-based decisions.
  • Record Keeping: Maintain accurate, complete records of all activities and findings.
  • Law Enforcement & Regulatory Support: Liaise with law enforcement authorities and respond to regulatory requests, including preparing and submitting reports, transaction records, and supporting ongoing investigations as required.
  • Cross-Functional Support: Gain structured exposure and provide support across KYC, TM, and Name Screening functions.
  • Internal Collaboration: Work with stakeholders to ensure consistent risk evaluation and effective mitigation.
  • Handling Queries: Respond to internal AML-related queries and contribute to team-wide knowledge sharing.


Role Levels & Growth


Compliance Operations Analyst

  • Manage standard reviews with guidance and follow SOPs/established escalation protocols.
  • Build foundational knowledge in AML cases and investigations.

Senior Compliance Operations Analyst 

  • Independently handle complex cases across AML functions.
  • Guide junior staff, support QA, process improvement, and escalation management.
  • Ensure case consistency with regulatory expectations.


What you'll need


Compliance Operations Analyst

  • 1–3 years’ experience in AML, KYC, Transaction Monitoring, or Compliance Operations.
  • Basic knowledge of AML processes (KYC/KYB, EDD, TM, Screening).
  • Strong attention to detail and structured approach.

Senior Compliance Operations Analyst 

  • 3–6 years’ AML/CFT experience with strong exposure to cases and investigations.
  • Deep understanding of AML typologies, risk indicators, and regulatory frameworks.
  • Demonstrated ability to manage complex reviews independently.

For Both Levels

  • Proficient English (Mandarin a plus).
  • Effective workload and time management.
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.


Working Hours & Shift Requirements

  • Must be able to work Morning, Noon, or Night Shift (fixed shifts; this is not a rotating shift arrangement).
  • While shifts are currently fixed, business needs may evolve and shift arrangements may change in the future. Applicants should have the flexibility to adapt to potential shift changes as required by operational demands.


Preferred / Nice to Have

  • Crypto, fintech, or digital asset platform experience.
  • Familiarity with blockchain analytics tools (e.g., Chainalysis, Elliptic).
  • Past exposure to transaction monitoring, KYC (Sumsub) and screening systems (Worldcheck Refinitiv).
  • ACAMS or related AML certification.



Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.descriptionText:
About us

Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.

Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.

We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!

What you'll do

AML Reviews: Perform reviews (KYC/KYB, EDD, TM, Screening) with a focus on accuracy and timeliness.
Screening & Assessment: Conduct name screening (sanctions, PEP, adverse media) and evaluate potential matches according to internal policies.
Due Diligence: Assess customer profiles, including Source of Funds (SoF), Source of Wealth (SoW), PoA and periodic review.
Alert Investigation: Investigate alerts and cases related to transaction activity or customer risk.
Documentation: Prepare clear case files and investigation summaries supporting risk-based decisions.
Record Keeping: Maintain accurate, complete records of all activities and findings.
Law Enforcement & Regulatory Support: Liaise with law enforcement authorities and respond to regulatory requests, including preparing and submitting reports, transaction records, and supporting ongoing investigations as required.
Cross-Functional Support: Gain structured exposure and provide support across KYC, TM, and Name Screening functions.
Internal Collaboration: Work with stakeholders to ensure consistent risk evaluation and effective mitigation.
Handling Queries: Respond to internal AML-related queries and contribute to team-wide knowledge sharing.

Role Levels & Growth

Compliance Operations Analyst
Manage standard reviews with guidance and follow SOPs/established escalation protocols.
Build foundational knowledge in AML cases and investigations.
Senior Compliance Operations Analyst 
Independently handle complex cases across AML functions.
Guide junior staff, support QA, process improvement, and escalation management.
Ensure case consistency with regulatory expectations.

What you'll need

Compliance Operations Analyst
1–3 years’ experience in AML, KYC, Transaction Monitoring, or Compliance Operations.
Basic knowledge of AML processes (KYC/KYB, EDD, TM, Screening).
Strong attention to detail and structured approach.
Senior Compliance Operations Analyst 
3–6 years’ AML/CFT experience with strong exposure to cases and investigations.
Deep understanding of AML typologies, risk indicators, and regulatory frameworks.
Demonstrated ability to manage complex reviews independently.
For Both Levels
Proficient English (Mandarin a plus).
Effective workload and time management.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

Working Hours & Shift Requirements
Must be able to work Morning, Noon, or Night Shift (fixed shifts; this is not a rotating shift arrangement).
While shifts are currently fixed, business needs may evolve and shift arrangements may change in the future. Applicants should have the flexibility to adapt to potential shift changes as required by operational demands.

Preferred / Nice to Have
Crypto, fintech, or digital asset platform experience.
Familiarity with blockchain analytics tools (e.g., Chainalysis, Elliptic).
Past exposure to transaction monitoring, KYC (Sumsub) and screening systems (Worldcheck Refinitiv).
ACAMS or related AML certification.

Why Bitget?

Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
We offer competitive salaries and benefits

If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!

jobs.title: 现货增长运营  Spot Growth Operations
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • Develop Spot Market Growth Strategies for Panorama Exchange: Design strategies for user growth, trading volume, and asset accumulation enhancement from the perspective of spot market business; be responsible for core indicators of spot market growth and continuously optimize the core position of the spot market segment within the Panorama Exchange ecosystem.
  • Operate Trading Activities: Independently plan and implement various trading activity operations; design activity rules, reward mechanisms, and risk control strategies to ensure that activity ROI and user participation meet targets.
  • Spot-related financial product innovation and implementation: Leveraging the characteristics of traditional financial assets (stocks, bonds, etc.), drive the improvement of core metrics (trading volume/capital accumulation) for RWA (Real World Assets) on the spot side.
  • Integrated operation of TradFi and CeFi/DeFi: Deeply understand the logic of traditional financial markets (such as Nasdaq and forex markets), integrate their user habits and asset classes with exchange spot business operations; enrich spot trading categories and achieve user growth through continuous product innovation.


What you'll need


  • Bachelor's degree or above, with over 5 years of operational experience in exchanges, securities firms, futures, forex, or traditional financial institutions (banks, funds, trusts); familiar with the trading rules, market structure, and user behavior of traditional financial assets (stocks, futures, bonds, commodities).
  • Product innovation and implementation capabilities: Experience in innovating and implementing financial products from scratch, having fully participated in the launch of trading pairs, the design of wealth management products, or RWA projects; familiar with the entire lifecycle management of financial products.
  • Event Operation and Planning Capabilities: Proficient in event operation and design, with successful experience in trading competitions, user acquisition programs, airdrops, and community operations; familiar with various incentive models (tiered rewards, game-theoretic mechanisms, referral bonuses), and able to balance user experience and platform costs.
  • Comprehensive Exchange Perspective:Understands the entire exchange ecosystem (spot trading, futures, on-chain trading, TradeFi, payments) and possesses cross-business line collaboration capabilities; able to drive cross-selling through spot trading to boost futures account openings and wealth management fund retention, thereby increasing overall user LTV.
  • High Data Sensitivity: Proficient in using various tools for data extraction and analysis to support business growth.
  • Preferred Qualifications:- Experience in spot trading operations at leading exchanges (Binance, OKX, Coinbase, etc.) or well-known brokerages/futures companies; - Deep involvement in the RWA (Real World Assets) project, familiar with the on-chain processes for real estate, bonds, and stocks; - Successful customer acquisition/retention cases during bear markets, familiar with the operation of complex financial instruments such as options and structured products. - Have some knowledge of trading strategies, such as quantitative trading, arbitrage, multi-asset hedging, market making, etc.


岗位职责：


  • 全景交易所现货增长策略制定：基于现货业务视角，设计用户增长与交易量、资沉提升策略；对现货交易增长核心指标负责，持续优化现货板块在全景交易所生态中的核心地位。
  • 交易活动运营：独立策划并落地各类交易运营活动；设计活动规则、奖励机制及风控策略，确保活动ROI及用户参与度达标。
  • 现货关联金融产品创新及落地：结合传统金融资产（股票、债券等）特性，推动RWA（Real World Assets）在现货侧的核心指标提升（交易额/资沉）
  • TradFi与CeFi/DeFi融合运营：深度理解传统金融市场逻辑（如纳斯达克、 forex市场），将其用户习惯、资产类别与交易所现货业务进行整合运营；丰富现货交易品类，并通过不断的产品创新实现用户增长


任职要求：


  • 本科及以上学历，5年以上交易所、券商、期货、外汇或传统金融机构（银行、基金、信托）运营经验；熟悉传统金融资产（股票、期货、债券、大宗商品）的交易规则、市场结构及用户行为
  • 产品创新与落地能力：具备从0到1的金融产品创新及落地经验，完整参与过交易对上线、理财产品设计或RWA项目；熟悉金融产品全生命周期管理
  • 活动运营与策划能力：精通活动运营与活动设计，有成功的交易赛、用户拉新方案、空投或社区运营案例；熟悉各类激励模型（阶梯奖励、博弈机制、邀请返利），能平衡用户体验与平台成本。
  • 全景交易所视角：理解全景交易所生态（现货、合约、链上交易、TradFi、支付），具备跨业务线协同能力；能通过现货业务带动合约开户、理财资金留存等交叉销售，实现整体用户LTV提升。
  • 数据敏感度高，熟练使用各类工具进行数据提取与分析，辅助业务增长
  • 加分项：-有头部交易所（Binance, OKX, Coinbase等）或知名券商/期货公司现货运营经验；-深度参与过RWA（Real World Assets）项目，熟悉房地产、债券、股票上链流程；-有成功的熊市获客/留存案例，熟悉期权、结构化产品等复杂金融工具运营。- 对交易策略【如量化，套利，多资产对冲，做市等策略】有一定的认知。


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Talent Acquisition Manager / Lead
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget Wallet is the non-custodial crypto wallet designed to make crypto simple and secure for everyone. With over 80 million users, we bring together a full suite of crypto services, including swaps, market insights, staking, rewards, DApp exploration, and payment solutions. Supporting 130+ blockchains and millions of tokens, Bitget Wallet enables seamless multi-chain trading across hundreds of DEXs and cross-chain bridges. Backed by a $300+ million user protection fund, it ensures the highest level of security for users' assets.


Bitget Wallet is experiencing rapid growth, and we are looking for a Talent Acquisition Lead to take full ownership of our talent strategy. This is a unique, high-impact opportunity to be the sole TA lead for the business unit, partnering directly with C-level leadership to define our hiring roadmap and build the world-class team that powers our next phase of expansion.


What you'll do

  • Talent Strategy & Ownership: Define and execute the hiring strategy for Bitget Wallet, aligning talent acquisition with core business objectives across all functions (Tech, Product, Ops, Marketing, and more).
  • C-Level Partnership: Work directly with executive leadership to forecast hiring needs, advise on talent market trends, and ensure our hiring plan supports long-term scalability.
  • End-to-End Execution: Own the full lifecycle of critical hires, from defining role requirements and sourcing strategy to final offers and onboarding. You will be the driving force behind our most important placements.
  • Scaling & Roadmap: Build and maintain a dynamic hiring roadmap. Identify bottlenecks, optimize processes, and ensure we are consistently attracting and securing top-tier talent in a competitive market.
  • Employer Branding: Position Bitget Wallet as an employer of choice in the Web3 space, crafting narratives that attract high-caliber candidates and strengthen our market reputation.


What you'll need


  • Strategic Builder: You have 5+ years of TA experience, ideally in high-growth Tech, Web3, or Crypto environments. You know how to build hiring engines from the ground up.
  • Business-First Mindset: You don't just fill seats; you solve business problems. You understand product, tech, and operations well enough to advise leaders on talent trade-offs.
  • Executive Presence: You are comfortable partnering with C-level stakeholders, influencing decisions with data, and pushing back when necessary to ensure hiring quality.
  • Full-Stack Recruiter: You can strategize at the macro level but also execute at the micro level—sourcing, engaging, closing, and negotiating with top talent across diverse functions.
  • Data-Driven: You use metrics to drive efficiency, track pipeline health, and optimize conversion rates throughout the hiring funnel.
  • Global Vision: You have experience hiring across multiple regions and understand the nuances of building an international team.



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Key Account Manager
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • Deep Client Relationship Management & Value Enhancement
  • Maintain strong relationships with key (top-tier) clients, provide 1-on-1 professional support, deeply explore client needs, and continuously identify new collaboration opportunities based on existing partnerships to expand cooperation scope and increase client trading share.
  • SME Client Maintenance
  • Manage and maintain all Telegram groups daily, and handle clients’ business and technical issues on a routine basis.
  • Account Management
  • Set up and maintain client accounts, including fee rates, rate limits, VIP channels, etc.
  • Client Inquiries
  • Handle daily client inquiries, including account issues, trading data queries, product consultations, and platform event inquiries, while keeping clients updated with the platform’s event calendar.
  • Daily Notifications
  • Communicate important updates to clients in a timely manner, such as policy changes and API upgrades, ensuring clients stay informed about the latest platform developments.
  • Complaint Handling
  • Effectively resolve client complaints.


What you'll need


  • Proficiency in both Chinese and English, with strong written and verbal communication skills.
  • Familiarity with the needs of institutional clients on trading platforms/exchanges.
  • Strong customer service mindset, problem-solving skills, and communication abilities; capable of delivering both emotional value and business value, and quickly identifying and meeting client needs.
  • Basic understanding of finance, trading, or related fields, with the ability to provide professional advice and support to clients.
  • Candidates with a technical background or experience using exchange APIs are preferred.
  • Strong team spirit, able to collaborate closely with team members to solve client issues.
  • Excellent communication skills, able to build effective communication channels with clients from diverse backgrounds and ensure accurate information delivery.
  • Bachelor’s degree or above (any major), with preference given to backgrounds in finance, computer science, or related fields.
  • Relevant experience in customer service or technical support is preferred, but candidates with strong potential and willingness to learn are also welcome.


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe

If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!

Strong customer service mindset, problem-solving skills, and communication abilities; capable of delivering both emotional value and business value, and quickly identifying and meeting client needs.
Basic understanding of finance, trading, or related fields, with the ability to provide professional advice and support to clients.
Candidates with a technical background or experience using exchange APIs are preferred.
Strong team spirit, able to collaborate closely with team members to solve client issues.
Excellent communication skills, able to build effective communication channels with clients from diverse backgrounds and ensure accurate information delivery.
Bachelor’s degree or above (any major), with preference given to backgrounds in finance, computer science, or related fields.
Relevant experience in customer service or technical support is preferred, but candidates with strong potential and willingness to learn are also welcome.

Why Bitget?

Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
We offer competitive salaries and benefits
Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!

If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!

By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Talent Acquisition Manager/Leader（UK）
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world’s leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of crypto currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you’ll do


  • Team Management: Recruit, onboard, and mentor a team of recruiters; Set individual KPIs, conduct weekly 1:1s, and support professional development. Distribute requisition load and monitor team capacity.
  • Candidate Sourcing: Leverage your network and the company's existing database to identify and attract top-tier talent with industry-leading skills and experience.
  • Interviewing and Assessment: Participate in the interview process to ensure alignment with our company culture and strategic direction.
  • Talent Pool/Mapping: Build and maintain a robust database of high-potential candidates to ensure a steady pipeline of qualified talent. Conduct in-depth industry research and talent mapping to identify key talent within competitors.
  • Problem Solving: Foster strong relationships with hiring managers, the senior management team, and the HRBP team to collaboratively address recruitment challenges and resolve issues promptly.
  • Recruitment Strategy: Develop and execute innovative talent acquisition strategies aligned with market trends and company growth objectives to attract top talent globally.


What you’ll need


  • Education: Bachelor’s degree or higher in Business Administration, Human Resources, Finance, or a related field.
  • Experience: Minimum 5 years of recruitment experience, either in an agency or in-house environment, preferably within the Web3 and top-tier tech industries. Less experienced candidates will be considered Specialists.
  • Sourcing Skills: Proven ability to build robust talent pools and conduct in-depth talent mapping in a niche area, demonstrating a keen understanding of industry trends and job requirements.
  • Communication and Negotiation: Excellent interpersonal skills with the ability to build relationships with global candidates and conduct effective negotiations.
  • Results-Oriented: Proven ability to deliver results in a fast-paced environment with tight timelines, driving the recruitment process and ensuring timely filling of critical roles.
  • Language: Fluency in both Mandarin and English is a must.



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Growth Manager - North America
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget Wallet is the non-custodial crypto wallet designed to make crypto simple and secure for everyone. With over 80 million users, we bring together a full suite of crypto services, including swaps, market insights, staking, rewards, DApp exploration, and payment solutions. Supporting 130+ blockchains and millions of tokens, Bitget Wallet enables seamless multi-chain trading across hundreds of DEXs and cross-chain bridges. Backed by a $300+ million user protection fund, it ensures the highest level of security for users' assets.


What we're looking for


  • Drive user growth across USA focusing on downloads, DAU, PayFi activations and trading volumes.
  • Manage local partners — including part-timers, moderators, ambassadors, and community agencies, partners and press — to ensure effective regional execution.
  • Develop and implement localized growth strategies, adapting global campaigns to fit local user behavior.
  • Build partnerships with communities, influencers, and Web3 projects to expand Bitget Wallet’s reach.
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams such as Product, Operations, BD, and Community to align regional initiatives with global goals.
  • Analyze user data and market trends to identify scalable growth opportunities.
  • Recruit and manage affiliates (KOLs, traders, communities) to achieve scalable growth.
  • Drive DAU and transaction volume via referral/rebate funnels.
  • Plan local events, campaigns, and online activations; manage our local moderators to help with executions.
  • Represent the Bitget Wallet product and team at local events and conferences.
  • Promote wallet features (swap, perp, gas tools).
  • Work with our marketing team to host AMAs, meetups, Twitter Spaces.
  • Track performance using on-chain tools and present to management team.


What you'll need

  • Proven experience in user growth, marketing, or operations within Web3 or fintech.
  • Ability to lead distributed local teams and deliver results through remote collaboration.
  • 5–7 years of relevant experience; being Web3-native or active in crypto communities is a plus.
  • Experience in fast growing tech startups and international companies & cross timezone collaboration is a strong advantage.
  • Flexible location — open to remote or hybrid arrangements.
  • Strong DeFi knowledge (swap + perp DEX: GMX, Lyra, Uniswap, etc.)
  • Affiliate experience (operated or joined affiliate programs)
  • Experience with campaign tools and local collaborations



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: AI Architecture AI架构师
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget Wallet is the non-custodial crypto wallet designed to make crypto simple and secure for everyone. With over 80 million users, we bring together a full suite of crypto services, including swaps, market insights, staking, rewards, DApp exploration, and payment solutions. Supporting 130+ blockchains and millions of tokens, Bitget Wallet enables seamless multi-chain trading across hundreds of DEXs and cross-chain bridges. Backed by a $300+ million user protection fund, it ensures the highest level of security for users' assets.


What you'll do


  • Continuously develop and upgrade the Architecture Team’s core services (API gateways, service registration and discovery, load balancing, etc.) to ensure system stability and scalability
  • Provide highly available, high-concurrency, low-latency technical solutions for various company initiatives and business scenarios to support rapid business iteration
  • Continuously build company-wide technical infrastructure, including shared development tools, code toolkits, and middleware, to enhance R&D efficiency
  • Define the technical architecture for the AI application platform, covering LLM integration, agent orchestration, RAG, function calling, and multi-agent collaboration
  • Plan AI middleware (vector databases, model gateways, prompt management, and evaluation and monitoring systems)
  • Drive the implementation of AI to enhance R&D efficiency (code generation, intelligent testing, intelligent operations and maintenance, fault diagnosis, etc.)
  • Lead the API-ization and platformization of AI capabilities to lower the barrier to entry for business teams
  • Establish technical standards and specifications (including AI engineering guidelines) to drive technology implementation and ensure code quality and system performance
  • Drive improvements in R&D efficiency, optimize development processes, and promote cost optimization and resource utilization at the technical level
  • Participate in tackling technical challenges, resolving system bottlenecks, and providing innovative solutions
  • Guide team members in enhancing their technical capabilities, and organize technical knowledge-sharing sessions
  • Establish a continuous learning mechanism for cutting-edge AI technologies to drive the team’s skill development


What you'll need


  • Bachelor’s degree or higher in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field
  • At least 5 years of backend development experience, including at least 3 years of Go development experience; prior experience in a technical lead or architect role
  • Hands-on experience building high-concurrency systems, with a deep understanding and practical experience with microservices architecture
  • Proficiency in distributed system design principles, and familiarity with common system architecture patterns and best practices
  • Extensive practical experience with caching design, database performance optimization, and middleware such as message queues
  • In-depth understanding of the capabilities and engineering practices of mainstream LLMs (GPT, Claude, Llama, Qwen, etc.)
  • Practical experience implementing AI application architectures such as RAG and Agents
  • Strong communication skills and a collaborative spirit, with the ability to drive the comprehensive implementation of technical requirements across teams
  • Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to independently tackle complex technical challenges



岗位职责：


  • 持续开发升级架构组基础服务（API 网关、服务注册发现、负载均衡等），确保系统稳定性和可扩展性
  • 为公司各种活动和业务场景提供高可用、高并发、低延迟的技术方案，支持业务快速迭代
  • 持续建设公司级别技术基建，包括公共开发工具、代码工具包、中间件等，提升研发效率
  • 制定 AI 应用平台技术架构，涵盖 LLM 集成、Agent 编排、RAG、Function Calling、多 Agent 协作等
  • 规划 AI 中间件（向量数据库、模型网关、Prompt 管理、评估与监控体系）
  • 推动 AI 在研发效能方向的落地（代码生成、智能测试、智能运维、故障诊断等）
  • 主导 AI 能力的 API 化与平台化，降低业务团队接入门槛
  • 建立技术标准与规范（含 AI 工程规范），推动技术落地，确保代码质量和系统性能
  • 推动研发效能提升，优化开发流程，推动技术层面的成本优化和资源利用率提升
  • 参与技术难题攻关，解决系统瓶颈问题，提供创新性解决方案
  • 指导团队成员进行技术能力提升，组织技术分享和知识传递
  • 建立 AI 前沿技术的持续学习机制，推动团队能力升级


任职要求：


  • 计算机科学、软件工程或相关领域本科及以上学历
  • 5 年以上后端开发经验，3 年以上 Golang 开发经验，曾担任技术专家或架构师职位
  • 有实际的高并发系统建设经验，对微服务架构有深入的理解和实践
  • 精通分布式系统设计原则，熟悉常见的系统架构模式和最佳实践
  • 对缓存设计、数据库性能优化、消息队列等中间件有丰富的实践经验
  • 深入理解主流 LLM（GPT、Claude、Llama、Qwen 等）的能力边界与工程化实践
  • 有 RAG、Agent 等 AI 应用架构的实际落地经验
  • 具备良好的沟通能力和团队协作精神，能够跨团队推动技术需求的全面落地
  • 具有较强的问题分析和解决能力，能够独立处理复杂技术挑战


加分项

  • 有 Harness Engineering、模型评估体系建设经验
  • 熟悉至少一种主流云平台（AWS / GCP / Azure）的 AI 相关服务
  • 有 Web3 / 金融 / 交易等领域 AI 应用经验
  • AI 开源社区有贡献或技术影响力



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Product Marketing Specialist (Intern)
jobs.descriptionHtml:

What you'll do


  • Assist in developing and executing marketing plans for new product launches.
  • Support analysis of product objectives, target audience profiles, and key value propositions to inform GTM planning.

jobs.title: Compliance Officer, El Salvador
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


Regulatory Compliance

  • Serve as the designated MLRO responsible for AML/CFT compliance obligations under El Salvador's Ley Contra el Lavado de Dinero y de Activos, its implementing regulations, and applicable CNAD requirements under the LEAD framework
  • Act as the primary point of contact with CNAD, the Unidad de Investigación Financiera (UIF), and other relevant regulatory authorities on all AML/CFT matters
  • Ensure the company's AML/CFT programme remains current, effective, and fully aligned with applicable local laws, FATF recommendations, and CNAD regulatory expectations

Project Management

  • Lead and coordinate AML/CFT-related projects in collaboration with internal stakeholders including Legal, Product, Technology, Operations, and Customer Support, ensuring timely and effective delivery
  • Drive the enhancement and ongoing optimisation of AML systems, transaction monitoring tools, and KYC workflows in response to business growth, regulatory changes, and volume demands
  • Manage competing priorities and ad hoc compliance projects strategically, maintaining quality and timeliness during volume spikes or periods of heightened regulatory activity

Investigations and Risk Mitigation

  • Oversee the investigation of suspicious activity alerts and escalations generated by the KYC and Transaction Monitoring teams
  • Review and approve Suspicious Transaction Reports (STRs) and Suspicious Activity Reports (SARs) for submission to the UIF in accordance with applicable reporting obligations
  • Respond promptly and thoroughly to queries from Business and Support Units regarding ongoing investigations, risk assessments, and related mitigation measures

Policies, Training, and Communications

  • Assist in the periodic review, update, and implementation of AML/CFT policies, procedures, and controls to reflect regulatory developments and business changes
  • Produce and distribute compliance publications, internal guidance notes, and regulatory update communications to relevant stakeholders across the organisation
  • Design and maintain compliance-related workflows to support business and operational functions, ensuring AML/CFT controls are embedded effectively across all relevant processes
  • Support the development and delivery of AML/CFT training programmes for staff, ensuring adequate awareness and competency across all functions


What you'll need


  • Nationality of one of the following countries: Belize, Costa Rica, El Salvador, Guatemala, Honduras, Nicaragua, or Panama
  • Minimum 5 years of experience in AML/CFT compliance, with at least 2 years in a senior or designated MLRO/compliance officer role
  • Solid understanding of El Salvador's AML/CFT legal framework, including the Ley Contra el Lavado de Dinero y de Activos and UIF reporting requirements
  • Familiarity with the LEAD framework and CNAD regulatory requirements for Digital Asset Service Providers is highly advantageous
  • Experience in the digital assets, fintech, or financial services industry preferred
  • Strong project management skills with the ability to manage multiple workstreams simultaneously
  • Excellent written and verbal communication skills in Spanish; working proficiency in English is required
  • Relevant professional certifications such as CAMS, ICA Certificate in AML, or equivalent are strongly preferred



Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Perp DEX & On-chain Risk Control Strategy Analyst Perp DEX&链上风控策略分析师
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • Design and iteration of trading risk control strategies: Participate in the construction of trading risk control strategies for DEX contracts, including designing a multi-dimensional risk control indicator system that covers user-level, pair-level, and platform-level risk control parameters, and establishing a dynamic parameter adjustment mechanism.
  • Management of platform ADL risk control mechanism: Participate in the design of DEX contract trading monitoring mechanisms, covering core indicators such as ADL trigger rate and insurance fund level, establish a multi-level early warning mechanism, and formulate gradient-triggered risk control monitoring plans; collaborate with the business product team to promote the implementation of risk control strategies.
  • Strategy backtesting and dashboard setup: Build and maintain a framework for on-chain trading risk control strategy backtesting, support historical market replay and strategy effectiveness evaluation, conduct strategy backtesting based on on-chain data, output quantitative assessment reports, and establish a core indicator dashboard for risk control strategies.
  • Emergency response to unexpected events: Have the ability to promptly respond and troubleshoot DEX trading risk control incidents, covering extreme market conditions/failures, etc., and output improvement measures and promote their implementation.
  • Design specialized defense strategies for on-chain specific risks (MEV, sandwich attacks, lightning loan attacks, significant on-chain price fluctuations or hacker incidents, etc.).
  • Possess on-chain data analysis and tracking capabilities, continuously monitor on-chain abnormal trading patterns, and identify potential risks.


What you'll need


  • More than 5 years of experience in trading risk control, and 3 years of experience in trading risk control related to major exchanges or DeFi protocols. Prior experience in Perp DEX risk control is preferred.
  • Have a deep understanding of the perpetual contract trading mechanism, including core concepts such as funding rate, mark price, liquidation mechanism, ADL, insurance fund, etc.
  • Have practical experience in risk control strategy backtesting, and be able to independently complete strategy modeling, parameter tuning and effect evaluation, as well as dashboard setup.
  • Be familiar with at least one programming/data analysis language (Python/SQL), and be able to independently complete data extraction and analysis.
  • Have experience in handling emergencies, and be able to quickly make judgments and execute decisions under high-pressure environments.
  • Be familiar with the trading structure and risk control differences of mainstream blockchains.
  • Be proficient in using AI tools to assist in strategy research, data analysis and code writing, significantly improving work efficiency.

Bonus points

  • Have extensive experience in handling major incidents related to Perp DEX risk control. ·
  • Have experience in quantitative trading and quantitative risk control, capable of building strategy models based on data and conducting effect evaluation and optimization.

Job Objectives

  • Complete the establishment of the on-chain transaction risk control strategy system for the Perp DEX, covering the design of risk control rules, parameter optimization, strategy backtesting, and emergency response to unexpected events. Establish a full-chain risk control loop covering pre-emptive prevention, in-process interception, and post-event review to ensure the systematic control of transaction risks on the Perp DEX platform.


岗位职责：


  • 交易风控策略设计与迭代：参与 DEX 合约交易风控策略的建设，包括设计多维度风控指标体系，涵盖用户级、币对级、平台级风控参数，并建立动态调参机制。
  • 平台ADL风控机制管理：参与设计 DEX 合约交易监控机制，覆盖 ADL 触发率与保险基金水位等核心指标，建立多级预警机制，制定梯度触发式风控监控方案；协同业务产品团队，推动风控策略落地执行。
  • 策略回测及看板搭建：搭建并维护链上交易风控策略回测框架，支持历史行情重放与策略效果评估，基于链上数据进行策略回测，输出量化评估报告，建立风控策略的核心指标看板。
  • 突发事件应急响应：具备能及时应对及排查DEX 交易风控事故，覆盖极端行情/故障等场景输出改进措施并推动落地。
  • 针对链上特有风险（MEV、三明治攻击、闪电贷攻击、链上价格重大波动或黑客事件等）设计专项防御策略。
  • 具备链上数据分析及追踪能力，持续监控链上异常交易模式，识别潜在风险。


任职要求：


  • 5年以上交易风控经验，3年以上头部交易所或 DeFi 协议交易风控相关经验，有 Perp DEX风控经验优先。
  • 深入理解永续合约交易机制，包括资金费率、标记价格、强平机制、ADL、保险基金等核心概念。
  • 具备风控策略回测实战经验，能独立完成策略建模、参数调优与效果评估、看板搭建。
  • 熟悉至少一种编程/数据分析语言（Python/SQL 为主），能独立完成数据提取与分析。
  • 有突发事件应急处理经验，能在高压环境下快速判断并执行决策。
  • 熟悉主流区块链的交易结构与风控差异。
  • 能熟练使用 AI 工具辅助策略研究、数据分析与代码编写，显著提升工作效率。

加分项

  • 具备Perp DEX风控重大事故响应经验。·
  • 具备量化交易/量化风控经验，能够基于数据构建策略模型并进行效果评估与优化。

岗位目标

  • 完成 Perp DEX链上交易风控策略体系搭建，涵盖风控规则设计、参数调优、策略回测与突发事件应急响应，建立覆盖事前预防、事中拦截、事后复盘的全链路风控闭环，保障Perp DEX平台交易风险的系统性管控。


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

具备风控策略回测实战经验，能独立完成策略建模、参数调优与效果评估、看板搭建。
熟悉至少一种编程/数据分析语言（Python/SQL 为主），能独立完成数据提取与分析。
有突发事件应急处理经验，能在高压环境下快速判断并执行决策。
熟悉主流区块链的交易结构与风控差异。
能熟练使用 AI 工具辅助策略研究、数据分析与代码编写，显著提升工作效率。
		加分项
具备Perp DEX风控重大事故响应经验。·
具备量化交易/量化风控经验，能够基于数据构建策略模型并进行效果评估与优化。
		岗位目标
完成 Perp DEX链上交易风控策略体系搭建，涵盖风控规则设计、参数调优、策略回测与突发事件应急响应，建立覆盖事前预防、事中拦截、事后复盘的全链路风控闭环，保障Perp DEX平台交易风险的系统性管控。

Why Bitget?

Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions 
We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
We offer competitive salaries and benefits
Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!

If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!

jobs.title: CFD Business Development Manager , SEA
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • Responsible for Business Development related to the encryption industry, promoting user growth, transaction volume improvement, and establishing long-term cooperative relationships.
  • Expand and maintain various partner and customer resources, including financial customers, channel partners, etc.
  • Work closely with internal teams such as product, marketing, and operations to support customer entry, activation, and ongoing transactions.
  • Collect market and customer feedback, form an effective communication loop, and assist in promoting product and business optimization.
  • Follow up on business goals and data performance, conduct regular business reviews and reports.


What you'll need


  • Possess background in CFD/foreign exchange/securities industry, with experience in BD, sales or customer development.
  • Familiar with the brokerage system, understand the brokerage business model, trading process, commission or rebate structure.
  • Priority will be given to those who have certain securities firms, IB, trading-related clients or cooperative resources.
  • Interested in or have relevant work experience in the encryption industry, willing to delve into digital assets and trading products.
  • Possess good communication skills, business negotiation skills, and self-motivation, able to independently promote business.
  • Able to adapt to a fast-paced, international work environment.
  • Fluent in English and local language

jobs.title: Data Analyst
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget Wallet is the non-custodial crypto wallet designed to make crypto simple and secure for everyone. With over 80 million users, we bring together a full suite of crypto services, including swaps, market insights, staking, rewards, DApp exploration, and payment solutions. Supporting 130+ blockchains and millions of tokens, Bitget Wallet enables seamless multi-chain trading across hundreds of DEXs and cross-chain bridges. Backed by a $300+ million user protection fund, it ensures the highest level of security for users' assets.


What you'll do


  • Based on business goals and models, build a comprehensive, accurate, and business-reflective metrics system; monitor business performance through this system, promptly identify and locate issues or opportunities, and drive implementation.
  • Develop a data-driven operations framework, and collaborate with relevant teams to build data-driven operational capabilities, including product features and data modeling especially in growth, onchain, and modelling.
  • Conduct in-depth analysis on specific business issues through thematic research, providing data and decision-making support for business decisions such as platform mechanisms, product direction, industry strategies, and resource allocation; generate actionable business recommendations.
  • Perform exploratory data analysis to uncover user search behavior and habits, providing insights and guidance to enhance the user search experience.
  • Familiar with dimensional modeling and has experience in transactional or growth industries.
  • Collaborate with the data warehouse to continuously optimize data governance.
  • Provide data analysis and insights for the business.



What you'll need


  • Bachelor’s degree or above in data mining, statistics, information and computational science, mathematics, or related fields; prior experience in data analysis for internet or wallet-related products is preferred.
  • Proficient in using data analysis tools and skilled in SQL; capable of independently writing and presenting business data analysis reports.
  • Experience in extracting valuable information from massive datasets, conducting aggregation and analysis, and presenting results through data visualization.
  • Strong learning ability, solid logical thinking skills, and effective communication capabilities.
  • At least 2 years of experience in data analysis for exchanges, brokers, or Web3 trading platforms;
  • Solid data engineering skills, familiar with dimensional modeling, tracking data points, indicator systems, and product and growth analysis frameworks;
  • Data visualization experience, familiar with tools such as DataWind and QuickBI;
  • Strong ability to work under pressure.


岗位职责

  • 基于业务目标和模式，构建全面、准确、能真实反映业务的指标体系；通过该体系监控业务表现，及时发现和定位问题或机会，并推动落实。
  • 建立数据驱动的运营框架，并与相关团队协作，构建数据驱动的运营能力，包括产品功能与数据建模。
  • 针对具体业务问题进行深入分析和专题研究，为平台机制、产品方向、行业策略及资源分配等业务决策提供数据与决策支持，并提出可执行的业务建议。
  • 开展探索性数据分析，挖掘用户搜索行为与习惯，提供洞察和指导，优化用户搜索体验。
  • 熟悉维度建模，具备交易型或增长型行业经验。
  • 与数据仓库协作，不断优化数据治理。
  • 为业务提供数据分析和洞察支持。


任职要求

  • 本科及以上学历，数据挖掘、统计学、信息与计算科学、数学或相关专业背景；有互联网或钱包相关产品数据分析经验者优先。
  • 熟练使用数据分析工具，精通 SQL；能够独立撰写并呈现业务数据分析报告。
  • 具备从海量数据中提取有价值信息、进行汇总和分析的能力，并能通过数据可视化展示结果。
  • 学习能力强，逻辑思维扎实，沟通能力良好。
  • 至少 2 年交易所、券商或 Web3 交易平台数据分析经验。
  • 具备扎实的数据工程能力，熟悉维度建模、埋点设计、指标体系以及产品与增长分析框架。
  • 具备数据可视化经验，熟悉 DataWind、QuickBI 等工具。
  • 具备较强的抗压能力。



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Senior Finance Manager / Finance Manager (Capital Markets and Financial Planning)
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • Develop and maintain sophisticated, multi-scenario long-range financial models.
  • Incorporate crypto-specific metrics (e.g., trading volume trends, API integrations, and tokenomics) into institutional-grade forecasts.
  • Establish public-market-ready rolling forecasts and quarterly earnings guidance frameworks.
  • Lead the company’s valuation modeling in alignment with US capital market standards.
  • Provide analytical support for the IPO filing, focusing on the Prospectus Summary and financial disclosures.
  • Conduct sensitivity and stress-test analyses to address crypto-specific risks (e.g., price volatility, regulatory shifts).
  • Partner with the Finance Operations team to extract high-quality data without interfering in daily operational costing workflows.


What you'll need


  • 7+ years experience, with a proven track record of leading US IPO preparations or executing significant capital market transactions.
  • Expert-level proficiency in financial modeling, valuation techniques, and US SEC reporting requirements.
  • Understanding of the crypto/digital asset landscape, including market infrastructure, regulatory nuances, and unique valuation drivers.
  • Ability to translate complex financial and crypto-native data into actionable insights.


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions

Incorporate crypto-specific metrics (e.g., trading volume trends, API integrations, and tokenomics) into institutional-grade forecasts.
Establish public-market-ready rolling forecasts and quarterly earnings guidance frameworks.
Lead the company’s valuation modeling in alignment with US capital market standards.
Provide analytical support for the IPO filing, focusing on the Prospectus Summary and financial disclosures.
Conduct sensitivity and stress-test analyses to address crypto-specific risks (e.g., price volatility, regulatory shifts).
Partner with the Finance Operations team to extract high-quality data without interfering in daily operational costing workflows.

What you'll need

7+ years experience, with a proven track record of leading US IPO preparations or executing significant capital market transactions.
Expert-level proficiency in financial modeling, valuation techniques, and US SEC reporting requirements.
Understanding of the crypto/digital asset landscape, including market infrastructure, regulatory nuances, and unique valuation drivers.
Ability to translate complex financial and crypto-native data into actionable insights.

Why Bitget?

Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions 
We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey

jobs.title: Head of Finance COE and Transformation
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  1. Design and lead the implementation of a global ERP and consolidation suite (e.g., NetSuite, OneStream, Workiva) integrated for IPO reporting.
  2. Architect automated pipelines between blockchain nodes, proprietary exchange matching engines, and financial sub-ledgers.
  3. Develop and maintain "on-chain to off-chain" reconciliation tools to ensure real-time accuracy of global digital asset inventories and revenue.
  4. Partner with the finance control team to implement IT General Controls (ITGC) across all financial systems and proprietary billing engines.
  5. Manage relationships with third-party software vendors and lead cross-functional projects between Finance, Engineering, and Data Science.
  6. Build custom dashboards and automated reporting modules for the Group Consolidation team to accelerate the "Fast Close" cycle. 


What you'll need


  1. 10+ years of experience in Finance IT, Financial Systems, or Fintech Engineering, with a focus on high-volume transactional environments.
  2. Proven success leading a full-cycle ERP implementation and consolidation tools for a multi-national group.
  3. Deep technical understanding of blockchain data, wallet architecture, API integrations, and the challenges of crypto-to-fiat accounting.
  4. Direct experience building financial systems that meet PCAOB requirements for audit trails and data security.
  5. Advanced proficiency in SQL, data warehousing (e.g., Snowflake, BigQuery), and Business Intelligence (BI) tools.
  6. Experience acting as a "translator" between technical engineering teams and accounting/tax stakeholders.


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!

jobs.title: Head of Finance Control
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  1. Review the design and execution of the end-to-end SOX compliance roadmap, ensuring readiness for the first post-IPO audit cycle.
  2. Establish a robust Internal Control over Financial Reporting (ICFR) framework, specifically mapping controls for high-volume crypto exchange transactions.
  3. Partner with engineering teams to implement ITGCs and application controls across proprietary exchange infrastructure and cloud environments.
  4. Conduct annual entity-level and process-level risk assessments to determine the scope of SOX testing based on financial materiality and crypto-specific risks.
  5. Lead the identification, documentation, and remediation of control deficiencies.
  6. Act as the primary liaison with external auditors to align on testing strategies, control reliance, and the interpretation of PCAOB standards.


What you'll need


  1. 10+ years of specialized experience in internal audit, SOX compliance, or risk management within the financial services or fintech sectors.
  2. Proven track record of leading a SOX implementation for a listed public company or during a successful IPO.
  3. Deep understanding of SOX and PCAOB requirements.
  4. Practical experience auditing or designing controls for digital asset custody, blockchain protocols, and automated exchange matching engines.
  5. Minimum of 5 years in a Big 4 Risk Advisory or Internal Audit practice, focusing on public company engagements.


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions

jobs.title: Senior Finance Manager / Finance Manager (Finance Control)
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • Build and refine the SOX 404 compliance framework, specifically tailored for a digital asset exchange environment.
  • Work closely with Engineering and Product teams for automated controls for on-chain transactions, cold/hot wallet management, and automated reconciliation.
  • Perform annual and ongoing risk assessments to identify key financial reporting risks unique to crypto (e.g., private key management, and gas fee accounting).
  • Serve as the point of contact for external auditors in managing walkthroughs, testing, and evidence collection.
  • Partner with business owners to design any remediation plans.


What you'll need


  • 6+ years in Internal Audit / SOX compliance / Public Accounting (Big 4).
  • Understanding of how blockchains work, including wallet architecture, exchange mechanics, and the lifecycle of a digital asset transaction.
  • Experience with SOC 1 / SOC 2 reports and an understanding of IT General Controls (ITGC) in cloud-native (AWS/GCP) environments.
  • CPA, CIA, or CISA preferred.



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.
