jobs.title: Head of Global Tax
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  1. Develop and execute a comprehensive global tax strategy for a multi-jurisdictional crypto exchange, optimizing for both FPI status and IPO readiness.
  2. Design and maintain a robust global transfer pricing framework, specifically addressing intra-group crypto transactions, IP licensing, and cost-sharing arrangements.
  3. Establish tax technical positions on complex digital asset issues.
  4. Lead the preparation of the global income tax provision (ASC 740 / IAS 12) and all tax-related disclosures.
  5. Serve as the primary lead for all global tax audits and inquiries, managing relationships with tax authorities and external advisors.
  6. Partner with product and legal teams to assess the tax implications of new market entries and M&A activity, etc.


What you'll need


  1. 10+ years of international tax experience, with a significant focus on high-growth technology or financial services sectors.
  2. Expert-level knowledge of tax accounting in a public company context.
  3. Proven experience managing the tax workstreams for IPO.
  4. Significant tenure within a Big 4 International Tax practice.
  5. Verifiable experience in complex transfer pricing models for intangible-heavy or digital-native businesses.


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions

jobs.title: Head of Group Treasury Investment
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.

What you'll do


  1. Develop and execute a comprehensive global investment strategy for the group.
  2. Design and maintain a robust investment governance framework, including the drafting and enforcement of the Global Investment Policy.
  3. Lead the strategic allocation of corporate treasury, managing the portfolio across money market instruments, fixed income, etc.
  4. Serve as the primary lead for institutional banking and custodial relationships, managing partnerships with global Tier-1 banks, OTC desks, and prime brokers.
  5. Lead the selection and implementation of a Treasury Management System (TMS).


What you'll need


  1. 12+ years of treasury investment or asset management experience, with a significant focus on global corporate treasury or high-growth fintech environments.
  2. Expert-level knowledge of liquidity management and capital markets, specifically within multi-currency and cross-border structures.
  3. Proven experience in managing treasury workstreams for IPO readiness, including the implementation of SOX-compliant investment controls.
  4. Significant tenure within a Tier-1 Global Bank, with deep experience in fixed-income or alternative investments.
  5. Experience in digital asset treasury operations is an advantage.

jobs.title: VIP Operations Manager
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!



What You’ll Do

﻿

  • Responsible for the operation and maintenance of VIP users and high-value users on the platform, improving Customer Satisfaction Score and long-term retention.
  • Provide users with timely and professional service and support.
  • Continuously track VIP users' trading behavior, active level, and asset situation, develop targeted operational strategies, and improve trading volume and platform active level.
  • Work closely with BD, marketing, product and customer service teams to provide VIP users with customised campaigns, benefits and service solutions.
  • Explore potential high-value users, promote VIP user upgrades and guide conversions.
  • Collect VIP user feedback, output user insights, promote, optimize products and improve user experience.
  • Participate in the planning and execution of VIP exclusive activities, online/offline user operation activities, enhance user stickiness.
  • Ensure that VIP operations comply with internal processes and compliance requirements.



What You’ll Need


  • Bachelor's degree or above, with priority given to those who have studied abroad in Europe or America.
  • 2-5 years experience in user operation, VIP operation or key account management, with experience in Internet, financial technology or encryption industry preferred.
  • Candidates with certain knowledge of cryptocurrency trading or Financial Market are preferred.
  • Excellent communication skills, Customer relationship maintenance and service awareness.
  • Possess strong data analysis skills and be able to develop operational strategies based on user data.
  • Able to adapt to an international and fast-paced work environment.
  • Fluent in Chinese and English



Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges

jobs.title: CFD Liquidity Management Expert CFD流动性管理专家
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • Liquidity Network Building & Management: Handle connections, evaluate and manage international mainstream LP and bridge/gateway services, continuously optimize quotes (Spread/Slippage/Reject Rate).
  • A/B Book Dynamic Routing & Hedging: Participate in hybrid mixed control framework construction, design and optimize A/B Book position allocation strategies, monitor large data flows in real time (such as non-farm payrolls, CPI), and split partial or fully off-load internal/external LP conflicts, controlling platform risk exposure.
  • Exchange System Deep Parameter Tuning: Proficiently operate MT5 Administrator / Manager terminal, perform dynamic adjustment and fine-tuning of positions or special orders, set strong lines (Margin Call/Stop Out), manage position limits/open limits, and configure precise settings for symbols/groups.
  • Toxic Flow Identification & Defense: Use data analysis tools to monitor and identify latency arbitrage, high-frequency scalping, churning, and other abnormal trading behaviors, routing them away from STP/ECN channels.
  • Server Architecture & Trading Environment Optimization: Coordinate with the IT operations team, participate in MT5 primary/backup server full deployment planning, optimize datacenter node and upstream LP cross-connect (Cross Connect), reducing trading latency to millisecond level.



What you'll need


  • 3–5 years of experience at a forex/CFD broker back-office trading desk (Dealing Desk), liquidity management, or risk control core position.
  • Proficient in MT5 Admin & MT5 Manager, familiar with routing configurations for various bridge/gateways (e.g. PrimeXM, Gold-i, OneZero).
  • Hands-on hedging experience at real trading desks. Deep understanding of STP, MM, ECN mechanisms, clear understanding of how to minimize execution slippage at high speed, and how to reject orders.
  • Understand the advantages and access criteria of mainstream liquidity providers, familiar with FIX API protocols and order flow (Order Flow) underlying logic.
  • Familiar with basic MT5 server architecture. Proficient in using SQL or Python for trade log (Journal/Trade Log) underlying data extraction and data mining preferred.


岗位职责：


  • 流动性网络搭建与管理：负责对接、评估及管理国际主流LP及清算桥（Bridge/Gateway），持续优化报价源（Spread/Slippage/Reject Rate）。
  • A/B Book动态路由与敞口对冲：参与Hybrid混合风控架构建设，设计并优化ABbook分层路由策略，在重大数据行情（如非农、CPI）或头寸超限时，果断执行部分或全额敞口向外部LP的对冲，控制平台风险水位。
  • 交易系统底层运维与参数调优：熟练操作MT5 Administrator / Manager端。负责日常及特殊行情下的动态杠杆调整、强平线（Margin Call/Stop Out）设置、持仓上限/开仓限制及品种组（Symbols/Groups）的精细化配置。
  • 有毒交易（Toxic Flow）识别与防御：利用数据分析工具，监控并识别延迟套利（Latency Arbitrage）、高频剥头皮、打盘等异常交易行为，并将其无缝路由至STP/ECN通道。
  • 服务器架构与交易环境优化：配合IT运维团队，参与MT5主/备服务器的全球化部署规划，优化Datacenter节点与上游LP的交叉连接（Cross Connect），将交易延迟降至毫秒级。


任职要求：


  • 3-5年一线券商（Forex/CFD）后台交易台（Dealing Desk）、流动性管理或风控核心岗位经验。
  • 精通MT5 Admin 及 MT5 Manager。熟悉各类清算桥（如PrimeXM, Gold-i, OneZero等）的路由规则与配置。
  • 真实的敞口对冲（Hedging）实操经验。深刻理解STP、MM、ECN机制，清楚如何在快速波动的行情中处理滑点、拒单。
  • 了解全球主流流动性提供商的优劣势及接入标准，熟悉FIX API协议及订单流（Order Flow）底层逻辑。
  • 了解MT5服务器的基础部署架构；熟练使用SQL或Python进行交易日志（Journal/Trade Log）的底层数据提取与数据挖掘者优先。


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Senior Social Media Manager
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.

Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.

We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do

  • Build, execute, and scale social campaigns across all our social media channels – including but not limited to: Twitter, YouTube, Tiktok, Facebook, LinkedIn, Instagram, and continuously innovate on opportunities for platform expansion to further reach various crypto audiences in the globe.
  • Create a campaign calendar, and input creative ideas aligned to meet the platform's growth objectives.
  • Develop and execute comprehensive sports sponsorship campaigns, and maximize cross-industrial audience reach to improve brand awareness.
  • Work cross-functionally across broader cross-department teams to execute campaigns, driving excitement for key products & activities of Bitget and building brand awareness.
  • Work closely with the global social media team to develop creative copywrite on crypto related contents and brand messages
  • Explore daily X trends, festivals & events to build up trending content.
  • Assist social media post requests where necessary
  • Use social media analytic tools or third-party tools to track the performance and target of campaigns, and make analytical reports on a regular basis


What you'll need

  • Bachelor’s degree in marketing, communications, or related degree.
  • A minimum of 2 years of experience in social media campaigns with in-depth knowledge of the digital media landscape.
  • Working knowledge of defining social media calender, strategies, and executing paid social activations. Needs to be organized and self-motivated.
  • Superior communication and social media copywrite skills, such as the ability to translate longer-form messages and insights into compelling, digestible, engaging and brand-consistent social content that drives impression & engagement.
  • Passionate about social media, and keeps researching the content to create an innovative, resonating, and authentic brand campaign experience.
  • Familiar with sports like football, car racing is preferred.
  • Demonstrated experience using social media management tools to monitor, report and engage (Meltwater, Sprinklr, Similarweb, Twitter Analytics, etc).
  • Experience within the crypto industry & being a crypto enthusiast is a must
  • Near-native in both spoken & written English is a must, and speaking Mandarin is preferred.



Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey

jobs.title: Senior Social Media Manager
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • Build, execute, and scale social campaigns across all our social media channels — including but not limited to X (Twitter), YouTube, TikTok, Facebook, LinkedIn, and Instagram — while continuously innovating and exploring platform expansion opportunities to reach diverse global crypto audiences.
  • Create campaign calendars and contribute creative ideas to achieve platform growth objectives.
  • Develop and execute comprehensive sports sponsorship campaigns to maximize cross-industry audience reach and enhance brand awareness.
  • Collaborate cross-departmentally and cross-functionally to execute campaigns, drive excitement around Bitget’s key products and initiatives, and build brand awareness.
  • Work closely with the global social media team to develop creative copy for crypto-related content and brand messaging.
  • Monitor daily trends on X, holidays, and events to create timely, trending content.
  • Assist with social media posting requests when needed.
  • Track campaign performance and objectives using social media analytics tools or third-party platforms, and produce regular performance reports.


What you'll need


  • Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, or a related field.
  • At least 2 years of experience in social media campaigns, with a strong understanding of the digital media landscape.
  • Working knowledge of defining social media calendars, strategies, and executing paid social campaigns. Highly organized and self-motivated.
  • Excellent communication and social media copywriting skills, with the ability to transform long-form information and insights into engaging, digestible, compelling, and on-brand social content that drives impressions and engagement.
  • Passionate about social media, with a continuous interest in researching content to create innovative, resonant, and authentic brand campaign experiences.
  • Familiarity with sports such as football (soccer) and motorsports is a plus.
  • Proven experience using social media management tools for monitoring, reporting, and engagement (e.g., Meltwater, Sprinklr, Similarweb, Twitter Analytics, etc.).
  • Crypto industry experience and a strong interest in crypto are required.
  • Near-native proficiency in spoken and written English is required; Mandarin is preferred.

Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.

Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.

We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!

What you'll do

Build, execute, and scale social campaigns across all our social media channels — including but not limited to X (Twitter), YouTube, TikTok, Facebook, LinkedIn, and Instagram — while continuously innovating and exploring platform expansion opportunities to reach diverse global crypto audiences.
Create campaign calendars and contribute creative ideas to achieve platform growth objectives.
Develop and execute comprehensive sports sponsorship campaigns to maximize cross-industry audience reach and enhance brand awareness.
Collaborate cross-departmentally and cross-functionally to execute campaigns, drive excitement around Bitget’s key products and initiatives, and build brand awareness.
Work closely with the global social media team to develop creative copy for crypto-related content and brand messaging.
Monitor daily trends on X, holidays, and events to create timely, trending content.
Assist with social media posting requests when needed.
Track campaign performance and objectives using social media analytics tools or third-party platforms, and produce regular performance reports.

What you'll need

Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, or a related field.
At least 2 years of experience in social media campaigns, with a strong understanding of the digital media landscape.
Working knowledge of defining social media calendars, strategies, and executing paid social campaigns. Highly organized and self-motivated.
Excellent communication and social media copywriting skills, with the ability to transform long-form information and insights into engaging, digestible, compelling, and on-brand social content that drives impressions and engagement.
Passionate about social media, with a continuous interest in researching content to create innovative, resonant, and authentic brand campaign experiences.
Familiarity with sports such as football (soccer) and motorsports is a plus.
Proven experience using social media management tools for monitoring, reporting, and engagement (e.g., Meltwater, Sprinklr, Similarweb, Twitter Analytics, etc.).
Crypto industry experience and a strong interest in crypto are required.
Near-native proficiency in spoken and written English is required; Mandarin is preferred.

Why Bitget?

Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions 
We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
We offer competitive salaries and benefits
Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!

If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!

By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Senior KYC Specialist (Bitget EU)
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is a global digital asset platform providing spot and derivatives trading and related products to retail and institutional clients. Bitget EU is committed to operating to high regulatory and compliance standards across Europe and to delivering a secure, fair, and transparent trading experience. We continuously strengthen our controls to prevent misuse of our platform and support a safe crypto ecosystem.


What you'll do


We are looking for an experienced Senior Due Diligence Specialist to join Bitget EU's Anti-Financial Crime (AFC) / Compliance team in Vienna. In this senior contributor role, you will perform and oversee complex KYC/EDD reviews for retail customers.

You will ensure all onboarding and periodic review processes are fully aligned with Austrian FM-GwG, WiEReG, EU AML/CFT requirements, sanctions expectations, and Transfer of Funds Regulation / Travel Rule considerations. This role is ideal for professionals with hands-on experience in KYC/EDD from crypto, fintech/EMI, or banking, who can apply a risk-based approach and produce high-quality audit-ready documentation.


Location: Vienna; Relocation from other EU countries possible



KYC / Retail Due Diligence

  • Conduct risk-based KYC/CDD/EDD/ODD reviews for EU retail customers in accordance with internal policies, FM-GwG requirements and group standards
  • Assess and document customer risk factors (jurisdiction, occupation, product usage, behavioural indicators, adverse information), including defining and applying EDD triggers and review frequencies
  • Perform verification and reasonableness checks for Source of Funds (SoF) and Source of Wealth (SoW), ensuring consistency with customer profile and expected activity
  • Review and resolve screening hits (sanctions, PEPs, adverse media) and determine appropriate risk outcomes and escalations
  • Support investigations by providing KYC context and documentation to Transaction Monitoring/KYT, Fraud and other AFC stakeholders

Quality Assurance & Continuous Improvement

  • Maintain high standards of case notes and evidence collection to ensure all files are audit-ready and meet internal QA expectations
  • Conduct quality controls over KYC/EDD/ODD casework: sample reviews, documentation completeness, screening hit handling consistency, SoF/SoW rationale checks
  • Contribute to the Quality Assessment framework: help define evaluation metrics, conduct calibration sessions, track defects and provide structured feedback to improve consistency
  • Contribute to KYC training materials and help build awareness of onboarding risks and red flags across the business

Vendor Management & Tooling

  • Own/coordinate vendor management for KYC-related solutions: IDV/eKYC providers, screening/adverse media platforms, case management systems
  • Monitor vendor performance, manage operational issues, support UAT/release validation and track SLA/KPI adherence
  • Work cross-functionally with Product/Engineering to define requirements for automation, workflow optimisation and control enhancements

Cross-functional & Regulatory Support

  • Act as subject matter expert on retail onboarding and policy interpretation for internal stakeholders (Compliance, Risk, Ops, Support, Sales/BD)
  • Support internal/external audits, regulatory requests and periodic compliance reporting related to onboarding and due diligence controls
  • Keep up to date with evolving EU AML/CFT expectations and crypto-specific typologies that impact customer due diligence


What you'll need


  • 5+ years of hands-on experience in KYC/CDD/EDD/ODD and/or KYB/corporate onboarding/AML-CFT roles, ideally in crypto, fintech/EMI, or banking
  • Solid working knowledge of Austrian FM-GwG and WiEReG, and familiarity with broader EU AML/CFT requirements and Transfer of Funds Regulation / Travel Rule considerations
  • Proven ability to assess SoF/SoW, analyse complex ownership structures and document clear, defensible rationales for approvals, restrictions and escalations
  • Experience with KYC tooling and data sources: ID&V solutions, commercial registries, beneficial ownership registers, screening systems, adverse media providers and case management platforms
  • Strong investigative writing and documentation skills; comfortable producing clear, audit-ready KYC rationales and escalation notes
  • Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal); German is a strong advantage for Vienna-based work
  • Highly detail-oriented, structured, independent and proactive, with the ability to manage multiple complex reviews under deadlines in a fast-paced environment
  • Willingness to work in an on-site or hybrid setup in Vienna (depending on business needs) and to complete a background check where required



Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Senior KYT Specialist (EU)
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


We are seeking a Senior KYT (Know Your Transaction) Specialist to join Bitget EU’s Anti-Financial Crime / Compliance team. In this individual contributor role, you will handle complex transaction monitoring investigations across on-chain, off-chain activity, support fraud-related reviews, and contribute to strengthening our monitoring and investigation frameworks. You will be a key subject-matter resource across broader AML topics, partnering closely with AML, KYC/CDD, Fraud, Risk, Legal, and Operations.

Location: Vienna; Relocation from other EU countries possible

Job Responsibilities

  • Conduct end-to-end KYT investigations on escalated alerts, including wallet attribution, fund flow tracing, and behavioral analysis across on-chain and internal platform data.
  • Triage and resolve transaction monitoring alerts within agreed SLAs, ensuring clear, consistent, audit-ready case documentation.
  • Review and escalate cases involving high-risk jurisdictions, fraud/scam typologies, darknet exposure, mixers/tumblers, ransomware, and other illicit finance red flags.
  • Contribute to SAR/STR preparation by drafting strong narratives, compiling supporting evidence, and escalating cases for filing decisions in line with internal policies.
  • Use blockchain analytics tools (e.g., Chainalysis) to identify typologies, patterns, and linkages; produce actionable investigative conclusions.
  • Partner with KYC/CDD/EDD and Ongoing Due Diligence teams to align customer risk assessments with transaction behaviors and investigation outcomes.
  • Provide subject-matter input to improve monitoring rules, detection logic, typology libraries, investigation playbooks, and escalation thresholds.
  • Support Quality Assurance efforts by incorporating feedback, improving investigation standards, and contributing to process and control enhancements.
  • Stay current on EU AML/CFT expectations and emerging crypto risks (including DeFi/CEX interaction risks, cross-chain exposure, and new laundering typologies).
  • Perform quality controls across KYT alert handling and investigations (sampling reviews, completeness checks, decision consistency), ensuring adherence to internal policies, regulatory expectations, and SLAs.
  • Support the QA framework for KYT (define/maintain rubrics and metrics, run calibrations, provide structured feedback, and drive continuous improvement).
  • Conduct root-cause analysis on investigation errors, false positives/negatives, and recurring typologies; propose enhancements to rules, workflows, and training.
  • Own/coordinate vendor management for blockchain analytics / monitoring tooling (e.g., Chainalysis): manage operational topics such as access, performance issues, data quality, feature gaps, release testing/UAT input, and SLA/KPI monitoring in coordination with stakeholders.


What you'll need


  • University degree in Law, Finance, Economics, Compliance, or a related discipline (or equivalent professional experience).
  • 5+ years of experience in AML/AFC, transaction monitoring, investigations, or financial crime compliance; at least 2 years with strong exposure to crypto transaction monitoring/KYT.
  • Strong understanding of EU AML/CFT frameworks, sanctions compliance expectations, and crypto-specific typologies and risk indicators.
  • Hands-on experience with blockchain analytics tools (Chainalysis, TRM Labs, Elliptic or equivalent) and strong investigative writing skills.
  • Experience supporting SAR/STR escalation and drafting in a regulated environment.
  • Familiarity with case management systems, transaction monitoring tools, and maintaining audit-ready documentation.
  • Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal); German is a strong plus for Vienna-based work; other EU languages are an advantage.
  • Strong analytical skills, sound judgment, and ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.



Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Talent Acquisition Manager/Leader（SG）
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world’s leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of crypto currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you’ll do


  • Team Management: Recruit, onboard, and mentor a team of recruiters; Set individual KPIs, conduct weekly 1:1s, and support professional development. Distribute requisition load and monitor team capacity.
  • Candidate Sourcing: Leverage your network and the company's existing database to identify and attract top-tier talent with industry-leading skills and experience.
  • Interviewing and Assessment: Participate in the interview process to ensure alignment with our company culture and strategic direction.
  • Talent Pool/Mapping: Build and maintain a robust database of high-potential candidates to ensure a steady pipeline of qualified talent. Conduct in-depth industry research and talent mapping to identify key talent within competitors.
  • Problem Solving: Foster strong relationships with hiring managers, the senior management team, and the HRBP team to collaboratively address recruitment challenges and resolve issues promptly.
  • Recruitment Strategy: Develop and execute innovative talent acquisition strategies aligned with market trends and company growth objectives to attract top talent globally.


What you’ll need


  • Education: Bachelor’s degree or higher in Business Administration, Human Resources, Finance, or a related field.
  • Experience: Minimum 5 years of recruitment experience, either in an agency or in-house environment, preferably within the Web3 and top-tier tech industries. Less experienced candidates will be considered Specialists.
  • Sourcing Skills: Proven ability to build robust talent pools and conduct in-depth talent mapping in a niche area, demonstrating a keen understanding of industry trends and job requirements.
  • Communication and Negotiation: Excellent interpersonal skills with the ability to build relationships with global candidates and conduct effective negotiations.
  • Results-Oriented: Proven ability to deliver results in a fast-paced environment with tight timelines, driving the recruitment process and ensuring timely filling of critical roles.
  • Language: Fluency in both Mandarin and English is a must.



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


1. Performance Management & Target Achievement

  • Fully responsible for achieving the team’s overall performance metrics (e.g., trading volume/value, number of new clients, commission revenue, customer satisfaction, etc.)
  • Monitor key business data, conduct in-depth analysis, promptly identify issues, and develop improvement measures
  • Optimize business processes and sales strategies to enhance per capita productivity and operational efficiency

2. Strategic Planning & Business Development

  • Develop and execute the broker team’s mid- to long-term business strategy, quarterly business plans, and OKR breakdowns, ensuring alignment with the company’s overall strategy
  • Conduct in-depth analysis of market dynamics, industry trends, and competitors to identify opportunities and expand new business channels and client resources
  • Drive the implementation of innovative business models and products/services to strengthen the team’s market competitiveness

3. Client Relationship & Service Quality

  • Ensure the delivery of professional, efficient, and compliant customer service to improve customer satisfaction and loyalty
  • Handle major client complaints and complex issues to maintain the company’s brand reputation

4. Cross-Department Collaboration

  • Work closely with product, risk control, compliance, spot/derivatives business, technology, and marketing teams to ensure smooth business operations and drive cross-functional project execution
  • Effectively coordinate resources and resolve obstacles encountered during business development


What you'll need


  • Strong sense of responsibility and professional ethics; honest, trustworthy, and aligned with company values
  • Results-driven with a strong sense of goals and ability to perform under pressure
  • Proactive, with innovative thinking and strong problem-solving skills
  • Strong learning ability and adaptability to respond quickly to market changes
  • Excellent communication, interpersonal, and conflict resolution skills
  • Sharp market insight, strong business negotiation skills, and business development capabilities
  • Bachelor’s degree or above; majors in finance, economics, management, marketing, or related fields preferred
  • Fluent in both Chinese and English; additional languages are a plus
  • Solid understanding with at least 3+ years of experience in institutional operations at an exchange



Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: MT5 Risk Control Strategy Operation MT5 风控策略运营
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • Be responsible for monitoring trading risks based on the MT5 platform, tracking the overall risk exposure of the platform and the trading situations of customers.
  • Participate in formulating and optimizing the customer diversion strategies for A-book/B-book, and analyze and classify customer trading behaviors.
  • Monitor abnormal trading behaviors, such as arbitrage trading and high-frequency abnormal trading, and propose corresponding risk control strategies.
  • Cooperate with the trading floor to manage risks, monitor market fluctuations caused by major market events (such as the release of US non-farm employment data).
  • Conduct analysis based on trading data, and continuously optimize trading risk control strategies and risk monitoring indicators.


What you'll need


  • Familiar with the foreign exchange or derivatives trading market, and having experience with MT5 or MetaTrader 4 is preferred.
  • Understand the A-book/B-book model and the basic logic of foreign exchange OTC trading.
  • Have basic data analysis skills (such as Excel/SQL).
  • Have clear logic, strong risk awareness, and excellent communication and collaboration skills.
  • Candidates with experience in foreign exchange brokers, CFD platforms or digital asset exchanges are preferred.


Job Objectives

  • Through analyzing customer transactions and conducting risk monitoring, optimize the MT5 trading risk control strategy to ensure that the platform's trading risks are under control.


岗位职责：


  •  负责基于MT5平台的交易风险监控，跟踪平台整体风险敞口及客户交易情况。
  • 参与制定和优化 A-book / B-book 客户分流策略，对客户交易行为进行分析与分类。
  • 监控异常交易行为，如套利交易、高频异常交易等，并提出相应风控策略。
  • 配合交易盘房进行风险管理，监控重大行情事件（如 美国非农就业数据发布）带来的市场波动风险。
  • 基于交易数据进行分析，持续优化交易风控策略与风险监控指标。


任职要求：


  • 熟悉外汇或衍生品交易市场，有 MT5 或 MetaTrader 4 相关经验优先。
  • 了解 A-book / B-book 模式及外汇 OTC 交易基本逻辑。
  • 具备基本的数据分析能力（Excel / SQL 等）。
  • 逻辑清晰，风险意识强，具备良好的沟通与协作能力。
  • 有外汇经纪商、CFD 平台或数字资产交易所经验者优先。


岗位目标

  • 通过客户交易分析与风险监控，优化 MT5 交易风控策略，确保平台交易风险可控。


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Growth Marketing Lead
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About Us

Bitget Wallet is the non-custodial crypto wallet designed to make crypto simple and secure for everyone. With over 80 million users, we bring together a full suite of crypto services, including swaps, market insights, staking, rewards, DApp exploration, and payment solutions. Supporting 130+ blockchains and millions of tokens, Bitget Wallet enables seamless multi-chain trading across hundreds of DEXs and cross-chain bridges. Backed by a $300+ million user protection fund, it ensures the highest level of security for users' assets.


What we're looking for

We are hiring a Growth Marketing Lead to own and scale Bitget Wallet's growth globally across organic, paid, and partnership channels.


You will act as the overall head of growth for Bitget Wallet, responsible for building the acquisition and monetization engine end-to-end. You will manage a growing team, source and manage external agencies and vendors, and own the growth budget. Working closely with the CMO, regional teams, PMMs, and cross-functional partners, you will drive measurable improvements in user growth, revenue, and profitability through rigorous experimentation and channel scaling.


What you'll do

1.Organic Growth

  • Own and scale organic acquisition across Search (SEO/ASO), AI engine visibility (LLM platforms, AI-powered content), and owned media (content, community, social, email/push).
  • Build compounding organic systems, not just campaign-driven spikes.


2.Paid Growth

  • Build and run paid acquisition across display, banner, and performance marketing ads across all funnels.
  • Own channel mix, budget allocation, and efficiency targets; make scale-up or pause decisions based on data.
  • Source, onboard, and manage agencies and vendors.


3.Partnership & Affiliate Growth

  • Consolidate and scale partnership marketing: affiliates, creators, KOLs, ambassadors.
  • Design partnership structures with clear attribution and measurement frameworks.
  • Collaborate with regional BD and operations teams to drive growth outcomes from these channels.


4.Experimentation

  • Run structured experiments across emerging growth levers (outbound, referral, product-led hooks, and others).
  • Maintain a testing backlog, run short-cycle sprints (test → measure → scale or kill), and systematize what works.


5.Growth Infrastructure & Playbooks

  • Build attribution dashboards and funnel analytics that enable fast, accurate decision-making.
  • Run retrospectives to identify effective channels and key bottlenecks, and drive optimization.
  • Consolidate learnings into reusable playbooks to support cross-regional scaling.


What we need

  • 5–10+ years of experience in growth marketing, user acquisition, or performance marketing, with at least 2+ years in a leadership role owning budget, team, and outcomes.
  • Proven track record growing a B2C fintech or Web3 product from early traction through scale, with accountability for measurable results (users, conversion, cost, revenue, quality).
  • Proven experience driving growth across global markets.
  • Strong data and analytics capability: thinks in funnels, cohorts, LTV/CAC, and attribution; able to build hypotheses from data and make fast investment decisions.
  • Strong execution and project management skills: able to align cross-functional teams, manage vendors, and drive initiatives forward on schedule.
  • High English proficiency as working language; Chinese proficiency is a plus.


If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Brazil Country Manager
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!



What You’ll Do


  • Own Bitget Brazil's commercial performance end-to-end — user acquisition, trading volume, revenue, and VIP growth — with full accountability for market outcomes.
  • Lead and support the local team across BD, marketing, VIP, and operations, setting market direction and holding the team to clear execution standards.
  • Shape the company's positioning in Brazil, especially around UEX (crypto, MT5, stocks, RWA), Bitget's evolving product strategy, and local market demands.
  • Define and execute Brazil's market strategy, including channel mix, partnership priorities, and go-to-market approach, in alignment with regional and global leadership.
  • Represent Bitget in Brazil at industry events, in media, and in formal dealings with regulators and government bodies
  • Oversee the full user funnel from acquisition to retention, using data to drive conversion, engagement, and lifetime value improvements.
  • Monitor the competitive landscape and regulatory developments in Brazil, translating market intelligence into strategic recommendations for regional leadership.
  • Ensure all commercial activities align with local regulatory requirements, and support the buildout of Bitget's local legal entity as the business scales.


What You’ll Need


  • Fluency in English and Portuguese
  • 6+ years of experience in a senior commercial or market leadership role within crypto, fintech, brokerage, or financial services — with at least 2 years directly managing a team.
  • Demonstrated track record of driving growth and revenue in the Brazilian market.

jobs.title: Web3 Product Manager Web3 产品经理
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget Wallet is the non-custodial crypto wallet designed to make crypto simple and secure for everyone. With over 80 million users, we bring together a full suite of crypto services, including swaps, market insights, staking, rewards, DApp exploration, and payment solutions. Supporting 130+ blockchains and millions of tokens, Bitget Wallet enables seamless multi-chain trading across hundreds of DEXs and cross-chain bridges. Backed by a $300+ million user protection fund, it ensures the highest level of security for users' assets.


About the role


We are looking for an experienced Product Manager to lead the design of wallet features for Bitget Wallet. You will be responsible for defining the product roadmap within the team, driving product launches, user growth, and feature promotions.


What you'll do


  • Product Design & Planning: Design and implement functional plans for Web3 wallet products, and drive product iteration.
  • User Needs Analysis: Gain deep insights into user needs, develop product strategies to address pain points, and optimize user experience.
  • Cross-Team Coordination: Work closely with technical, design, and marketing teams to ensure that product development is completed on time and meets quality standards.
  • Project Management: Manage the entire product lifecycle, from concept to launch, ensuring projects are completed within budget and timeline.
  • Market Research: Monitor industry trends and competitors, propose improvement suggestions, and ensure the product remains competitive.


What you'll need


  • At least 3 years of experience in product-related roles and a bachelor’s degree or above. Experience with blockchain products and a solid understanding of basic blockchain concepts are required. Practical or user experience with on-chain transactions (swap), DeFi, airdrops, or meme trading is a strong plus.
  • Strong market insight, with the ability to respond quickly to industry changes and formulate corresponding strategies.
  • Excellent communication and collaboration skills, able to coordinate and drive projects to implementation.
  • Good English communication and writing skills are preferred.
  • Passionate about the blockchain industry, willing to learn new knowledge about the industry, strong execution and ability to work under pressure.


岗位职责


  • 产品设计和规划：设计Web3钱包产品的功能规划和落地，推进产品迭代。
  • 用户需求分析：深入了解用户需求，制定产品策略以解决痛点，优化用户体验。
  • 跨团队协调：与技术、设计、市场等团队紧密协作，确保产品开发按时完成并符合质量要求。
  • 项目管理：管理产品生命周期，从概念到发布，确保项目在预算和时间范围内完成。
  • 市场调研：跟踪行业趋势和竞争对手，提出改进建议，确保产品保持竞争力。


任职要求


  • 至少3年产品相关经验，本科及以上学历，有区块链产品经验，了解区块链基本知识。有丰富的链上交易（swap），defi，空投，冲meme等工作经验或使用经验的优先。
  • 具备敏锐的市场洞察力，能快速响应行业变化并制定相应策略。
  • 出色的沟通和协作能力，能够协调推动项目落地。
  • 英语沟通及读写能力佳者优先；
  • 对区块链行业有热情，愿意了解行业的新知识，执行力强，抗压能力强



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!

jobs.title: Head of Group Consolidation and Reporting
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  1. Review monthly financial reporting packages submitted by local entities to ensure compliance with Group accounting policies and US GAAP/IFRS.
  2. Lead the end-to-end consolidation process for a complex multi-entity structure, including the elimination of intercompany crypto/fiat balances and transactions.
  3. Oversee the bridge between local statutory books and group reporting standards (IFRS/US GAAP).
  4. Manage the translation of international subsidiary financials, including the calculation of CTA (Cumulative Translation Adjustment) and FX gain/loss analysis.
  5. Review and aggregate global digital asset holdings across all entity wallets and cold storage, ensuring group-wide valuation accuracy.
  6. Support the filing process by managing the aggregation of historical financial data and preparing consolidated footnotes for authorities review.


What you'll need


  1. 10+ years of progressive experience in financial reporting or audit role.
  2. Proven track record in reviewing and validating financial reports with diverse geographical regions.
  3. Expert-level knowledge of consolidation accounting (ASC 810 / IFRS 10). 
  4. Direct experience preparing or reviewing consolidated financial statements for IPO.
  5. Strong technical ability to review books prepared under both IFRS and US GAAP to ensure group-level consistency.
  6. Proficiency in consolidation systems (e.g., OneStream, Oracle FCCS) and advanced Excel for complex reconciliations.


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!

jobs.title: Finance Manager  (Group Consolidation & Reporting team)
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual consolidated financial statements for a complex, multi-currency, and multi-jurisdictional corporate structure.
  • Review financial reporting packages from regional finance teams to ensure compliance with group accounting policies.
  • Identify and quantify the differences of the group's financials in IFRS and US GAAP, and prepare the GAAP bridge documentation accordingly.
  • Liasie with group external auditor in managing the annual audit process.
  • Collaborate closely with legal counsel, business and regional finance teams.
  • Work together with the system team to design, implement, and optimize an automated group consolidation system and reporting frameworks to improve efficiency.
  • Support management in ad hoc strategic initiatives (e.g., capital structuring, fundraising).


What you'll need


  • Qualified accountant (CPA, AICPA, ACA, or equivalent) is preferred.
  • 5+ years of work experience in financial accounting (Big 4 or US-listed companies experience is highly beneficial).
  • Solid knowledge of IFRS is required (understanding of US GAAP is a big plus).
  • Proven ability to manage group consolidation and financial reporting.
  • Experience and knowledge of fintech, Web3, digital assets, start-up, SEC reporting, audit, ERP systems (e.g., NetSuite, Oracle, SAP) are advantageous.
  • Proactive, energetic and hands-on problem solver who can work both independently and in a team.
  • Good command of written and spoken English.


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges

jobs.title: Head of Technical Accounting
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  1. Maintain and reconcile the global accounting policy manual under both IFRS and US GAAP.
  2. Lead the technical conversion of historical IFRS financials into US GAAP.
  3. Review comprehensive technical memos on accounting treatments.
  4. Lead the adoption of new standards and guidance under FASB and IASB.
  5. Act as the technical lead in responding to authorities' inquiries regarding accounting interpretations and disclosures.


What you'll need


  1. 10+ years of technical accounting experience with a verifiable track record of managing IFRS to US GAAPconversions.
  2. Direct experience navigating the IPO reporting accommodations, including specific disclosure exemptions and requirements.
  3. Expert-level knowledge of US GAAP and IFRS frameworks, particularly regarding financial instruments and fair value.
  4. Significant tenure within a Big 4 National Office or Technical Accounting Advisory group.
  5. Proven experience as a key technical contributor to registration statements for a high-growth technology or fintech firm.
  6. Advanced understanding of the accounting implications for on-chain transactions, including gas fees, airdrops, etc.


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges

jobs.title: Business Development Manager, Malaysia
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • Drive Trading Volume & FTT Growth: Identify, recruit, and manage KOLs, affiliates, trading groups, and communities across East Asia that can deliver measurable trading activity (FTTs, 100FTTs, trading volume) rather than only content creation.
  • Performance-Oriented Partnerships: Build and negotiate partnerships with KOLs, affiliates, and institutional partners based on volume-driven KPIs, ensuring accountability and sustainable ROI.
  • Campaign Execution & Monitoring: Execute trading-focused campaigns (e.g., signals, copy trading, trading contests, affiliate pushes, trading education sessions) designed to maximize active user trading and volume growth.
  • Performance Tracking & Optimization: Monitor and analyze performance metrics (FTT, trading volume, ROI per partner) and continuously optimize strategies to ensure consistent achievement of business targets.
  • Market Intelligence: Stay informed about industry developments, competitor strategies, and user trading behaviors across East Asia to design effective, compliance-aligned, volume-driven initiatives.
  • Retention & Community Building: Work with KOLs, affiliates, and trading leaders to establish sustainable trading communities (VIP groups, copy trading channels, institutional partnerships) that drive long-term engagement and recurring volume.


What you'll need


  • Proven track record in business development, affiliate/KOL management, or institutional partnerships in the Crypto/Fintech/Trading industry.
  • Existing network of trading KOLs, communities, affiliates, and institutional contacts across East Asia is highly desirable.
  • Familiarity with both crypto and traditional finance markets, with the ability to bridge relationships between institutional players and retail trading communities.
  • Strong understanding of crypto trading funnels (sign-up → KYC → FTT → 100FTT → retention) and what drives real trading volume.
  • Excellent negotiation, interpersonal, and relationship management skills.
  • Analytical and data-driven mindset; able to measure, report, and optimize partner performance against volume targets.
  • Strong written and verbal communication skills in English and Korean.
  • Passion for crypto trading and financial markets, with the ability to engage, influence, and build trust with both retail and institutional stakeholders.
  • Ability to perform under pressure with clear performance-based targets tied directly to trading metrics.



Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges

Drive Trading Volume & FTT Growth: Identify, recruit, and manage KOLs, affiliates, trading groups, and communities across East Asia that can deliver measurable trading activity (FTTs, 100FTTs, trading volume) rather than only content creation.
Performance-Oriented Partnerships: Build and negotiate partnerships with KOLs, affiliates, and institutional partners based on volume-driven KPIs, ensuring accountability and sustainable ROI.
Campaign Execution & Monitoring: Execute trading-focused campaigns (e.g., signals, copy trading, trading contests, affiliate pushes, trading education sessions) designed to maximize active user trading and volume growth.
Performance Tracking & Optimization: Monitor and analyze performance metrics (FTT, trading volume, ROI per partner) and continuously optimize strategies to ensure consistent achievement of business targets.
Market Intelligence: Stay informed about industry developments, competitor strategies, and user trading behaviors across East Asia to design effective, compliance-aligned, volume-driven initiatives.
Retention & Community Building: Work with KOLs, affiliates, and trading leaders to establish sustainable trading communities (VIP groups, copy trading channels, institutional partnerships) that drive long-term engagement and recurring volume.

What you'll need

Proven track record in business development, affiliate/KOL management, or institutional partnerships in the Crypto/Fintech/Trading industry.
Existing network of trading KOLs, communities, affiliates, and institutional contacts across East Asia is highly desirable.
Familiarity with both crypto and traditional finance markets, with the ability to bridge relationships between institutional players and retail trading communities.
Strong understanding of crypto trading funnels (sign-up → KYC → FTT → 100FTT → retention) and what drives real trading volume.
Excellent negotiation, interpersonal, and relationship management skills.
Analytical and data-driven mindset; able to measure, report, and optimize partner performance against volume targets.
Strong written and verbal communication skills in English and Korean.
Passion for crypto trading and financial markets, with the ability to engage, influence, and build trust with both retail and institutional stakeholders.
Ability to perform under pressure with clear performance-based targets tied directly to trading metrics.

Why Bitget?

Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey

jobs.title: Senior Treasury Specialist / Treasury Specialist（SG）
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


Payments & Settlement

  • Oversee the accurate and timely processing, settlement, and reconciliation of payments.
  • Act as the primary liaison with banking partners to resolve day-to-day operational matters.


Cash & Liquidity Management

  • Develop short-term cash flow forecasts and oversee daily cash management within the Group's liquidity framework.
  • Facilitate the management of intercompany loans, settlements, and accrued interest.


Bank Account Management

  • Drive the end-to-end onboarding of new bank accounts, including the administration of online banking platforms and maintenance of authorized signatories.
  • Uphold bank mandates and proactively monitor covenant compliance.
  • Own and manage the full lifecycle of the bank account opening process, including the preparation, compilation, and submission of required documentation such as KYC/KYB packages and corporate credentials.
  • Partner with Legal, Compliance, and Finance teams to ensure all banking onboarding requirements are fulfilled accurately and within established timelines.
  • Serve as the key point of contact for banking institutions throughout the account opening and onboarding journey.
  • Maintain comprehensive and up-to-date records of all bank account applications, approvals, and related correspondence.
  • Support the periodic review, renewal, and optimization of banking relationships and associated documentation.


What you'll need


  • Bachelor's degree in Finance, Accounting, or a related discipline.
  • 2–5 years of hands-on experience in treasury or liquidity management within a corporate or financial institution.
  • Proven track record in managing bank account opening processes across multiple jurisdictions is a strong advantage.
  • Proficient in English & Mandarin to communicate with Chinese speaking stakeholders
  • Job Location: Fully onsite, open for local / PR only


Technical Skills

  • Solid understanding of international fiat payment rails and local payment schemes (e.g., Faster Payments, SEPA).
  • Working knowledge of wire transfers, payment processing, and cash and liquidity management principles.
  • Experience with Treasury Management Systems (TMS); familiarity with EMI or payment products is highly desirable.
  • Knowledge of Crypto and Blockchain ecosystems is an added advantage.


Soft Skills & Other Requirements

  • Proven ability to perform and adapt in a fast-paced, multicultural fintech environment.
  • Excellent verbal and written communication skills in both English and Chinese for effective stakeholder engagement.
  • Flexibility to occasionally work within the UTC+2~3 timezone to facilitate banking transactions.
  • Exceptional attention to detail with strong organizational and documentation capabilities.
  • Self-motivated and proactive, with the ability to manage multiple bank onboarding initiatives concurrently.


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Senior Data Scientist
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • Responsible for the construction of risk control models in various risk domains, including but not limited to:
  1. Responsible for the construction of trading risk domain algorithms: constructing risk control models for trading behavior, covering multiple categories of trading scenarios such as spot, contract, and leverage. Real-time identification and warning of violations such as high-frequency trading, abnormal orders, market manipulation, spoofing, knock-on, and fake traffic.
  2. Responsible for the construction of risk domain algorithm models for financial products: constructing a user credit and risk scoring system, designing dynamic risk scoring models based on multidimensional behavioral data, asset data, and transaction data, supporting financial product access, quota management, and risk pricing.
  • Push the risk control AI automation whole process to land quickly:
  1. Design and implement AI automated risk control process, integrate large language model (LLM), AI agent and graph algorithm, realize end-to-end automated closed loop of risk identification → rule generation → policy issuance;
  2. Build an AI Agent-driven risk control operation system to achieve automatic attribution of abnormal events, automatic generation of risk reports, and automatic recommendation of strategy optimization, greatly reducing manual intervention and improving the response speed and coverage breadth of risk control.
  3. Promote the construction of a model automation system, establish an automated pipeline for Model Training, Evaluation, Online, and Monitoring, and support rapid iteration and continuous optimization of models in multiple risk domains.
  • Cross-team collaboration
  1. Work closely with product, strategy, data, compliance and other teams to deeply understand business needs and promote the efficient implementation of risk control algorithms.
  2. Establish risk control effect evaluation and review mechanism, continuously track model performance, and drive closed-loop optimization of strategies and algorithms.



What you'll need


  • Master's degree or above, majoring in computer science, statistics, mathematics, financial engineering, data science, etc., with a doctorate preferred;​
  • AI Automation Capability: Familiar with LLM application development, Prompt Engineering, AI Agent framework, able to integrate AI capabilities into multi-domain risk control decision-making process; with MLOps experience, able to build model full lifecycle automation closed loop;​
  • Business understanding ability: Have a deep understanding of risk control, anti-fraud, blockchain analysis and other businesses, and be able to design appropriate algorithm model solutions in combination with business scenarios;​
  • Trading and financial product awareness: Have a certain understanding of the core business of cryptocurrency exchanges, including:​
  1. Trading business: Familiar with the operation mechanism of spot, contract, leverage and other trading categories, understand the basic concepts of order matching, liquidity management, market depth, etc., able to design targeted risk control models in combination with trading scenarios;​
  2. Exchange financial product business: Understand the business logic and risk characteristics of financial products such as wealth management, lending, pledge, structured products, etc., and be able to identify abnormal behavior and latent risks during the use of financial products.​
  • Project implementation ability: with experience in project implementation from 0 to 1, able to independently lead the whole process of requirement sorting, scheme design, model development, system docking and online deployment of risk control algorithm projects, and have practical experience in promoting project implementation from scratch in complex business environments;​
  • Data Analysis Ability: High sensitivity to data, strong analytical and reasoning abilities, able to quickly locate key problems and drive optimization;​
  • Collaboration ability: Strong cross-team communication and collaboration ability, able to promote the rapid closure of algorithm solutions on the business side.



Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.
