jobs.title: AIGC Designer
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget Wallet is the non-custodial crypto wallet designed to make crypto simple and secure for everyone. With over 80 million users, we bring together a full suite of crypto services, including swaps, market insights, staking, rewards, DApp exploration, and payment solutions. Supporting 130+ blockchains and millions of tokens, Bitget Wallet enables seamless multi-chain trading across hundreds of DEXs and cross-chain bridges. Backed by a $300+ million user protection fund, it ensures the highest level of security for users' assets.


What you'll do


  • Visual Asset Design: Proficient in mainstream AI workflows such as SD+ControlNet+LoRA or Midjourney, with experience in custom model training to produce high-quality images that seamlessly integrate creativity with visual impact.
  • Utilize AI tools to prepare visual assets, perform layout/compositing in tools like Photoshop, and efficiently produce batches of content. (This is crucial—must possess custom model training capabilities)
  • AI Video Production: Generate premium video content using AIGC tools, with proficiency in video editing and color grading.
  • Traditional Design Workflow Optimization: Identify AI-driven solutions for traditional design processes based on application scenarios, proposing corresponding framework solutions.
  • Develop Stable Diffusion LoRA model libraries and train brand-specific design models.


What you'll need


  • Bachelor's degree or higher in design, art, or related fields, with a solid foundation in design theory and creative thinking. (Exceptionally talented candidates may be exempt from this requirement.)
  • Excellent visual design skills with the ability to independently complete design tasks. Demonstrated experience in the full AIGC workflow, from concept to project implementation.
  • Demonstrate full-cycle AIGC proficiency, mastering AI tools like Midjourney/ComfyUI/Runway to optimize end-to-end workflows.
  • Expertise in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, After Effects, Premiere, etc.).
  • Proactively explore cutting-edge AI technologies, experiment with diverse AI tools, plugins, and models to enhance productivity. (Candidates with proven case studies or portfolio pieces will be prioritized).


岗位职责：


  • 视觉物料设计:精通SD+ControlNet+LoRA或midjourney等主流AI工作流，有自定义模型训练经验并制作高质量的图片，确保创意与视觉效果的结合。
  • 使用AI工具完成视觉物料资产准备，在PS等合成工具中进行排版/合成，并可高效批量产出。（这点很重要，要有自定义模型的能力）
  • AI视频制作:使用AIGC视频工具生成优质的视频内容，具备视频剪辑、调色能力。
  • 传统设计流程优化:从应用场景出发，思考传统设计工作流的AI化路径，并提出相应的框架解决方案。
  • 开发Stable Diffusion LoRA模型库，训练品牌专属设计模型。


任职要求：


  • 设计类、艺术类相关专业本科及以上学历，具有扎实的设计理论基础和创意思维。（特别有优秀者这点可以忽略）
  • 具备优秀的视觉设计能力，能够独立完成设计任务。有完整的AIGC工作流程，从创意到落地项目经验。
  • 具备全流程AIGC能力，精通mid-journey/comfyui/runway等AI工具对全流程进行优化。
  • 熟练掌握Adobe Creative Suite(如Photoshop、lllustrator、After Effects、Premiere等)。
  • 钻研最新的AI技术，尝试不同的AI工具、插件、模型，来提升工作效率。（有成功案例及作品者优先）



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Senior Growth Manager, Argentina
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!



What You’ll Do


  • Drive user growth strategies in Argentina by planning, executing, and monitoring initiatives targeting new users, active users, and trading volume.
  • Localize and shape the company's positioning in Argentina, especially around UEX (crypto, MT5, stocks, RWA) and Bitget's evolving product strategy.
  • Strategic Marketing Execution: Plan and execute high-impact marketing and growth initiatives (online and offline) across our distribution channels, including brand sponsorships, community, and strategic events.
  • Affiliate Expansion and Management: Identify, support, and build strategic affiliate partnerships, including KOLs, VIPs, trading communities, and institutional contacts.
  • Data Analysis: Oversee the full user journey from the top funnel to the bottom funnel. Analyze user behavior, segment users effectively, and optimize conversion, engagement, and lifetime value through data-driven decisions.
  • Market Intelligence: Monitor industry trends, competitor strategies, and regulatory developments in Argentina. Provide strategic insights and actionable recommendations to regional leadership.
  • Compliance Alignment: Ensure all growth efforts are aligned with local regulatory requirements and standards.


What You’ll Need


  • Fluency in English and Spanish.
  • Bachelor’s degree or higher; 3+ years of experience in growth, marketing, commercial operations, or related roles within fintech, brokerage, crypto, or financial services.
  • Strong understanding of Argentina's local market landscape and regulatory environment.
  • Excellent stakeholder management, communication, and coordination skills with strong ownership, accountability, and execution ability.
  • Strong analytical and data-driven decision-making skills.



Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Compliance Operations Lead (Transaction Monitoring, Noon Shift)
jobs.descriptionHtml:
Job Responsibilities


  • Investigate the alert-triggered cases from transaction monitoring rules
  • Perform on-chain investigation with the use of Chainalysis/Elliptic
  • Prepare the Suspicious Transaction Reports when needed
  • Maintain accurate and complete records of all investigations and findings
  • Ensure the quality, accuracy and timeliness of each investigation and task and achieve the productivity target
  • Able to handle volume spikes and prioritize work and projects to meet business demands in a timely manner
  • Be responsive to queries about the investigations and related risk mitigation measures raised by Business and Support Units


Job Requirements


  • Bachelor’s Degree in any discipline
  • 1-3 years of experience in a similar role in a financial institution (For Lead role, at least 5 years of experience)
  • Candidates with more experience but open to work shift are also welcome.
  • Strong attention to detail and research/investigative skills
  • A self-starter with passion for combating financial crimes and ensuring regulatory compliance
  • Ability to interact effectively with Business Units, global colleagues and build effective working relationships
  • Ability to work independently and as part of a team
  • Open to work on a roster basis
  • Proficient in both English and Mandarin is a must
  • Proficient in MS Office applications and Chinese Word Processing
  • Willingly to work on morning shift (7am-4pm)

jobs.title: AI Agent Developer 开发工程师
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget Wallet is the non-custodial crypto wallet designed to make crypto simple and secure for everyone. With over 80 million users, we bring together a full suite of crypto services, including swaps, market insights, staking, rewards, DApp exploration, and payment solutions. Supporting 130+ blockchains and millions of tokens, Bitget Wallet enables seamless multi-chain trading across hundreds of DEXs and cross-chain bridges. Backed by a $300+ million user protection fund, it ensures the highest level of security for users' assets.



岗位职责：

  • 设计和实现基于 LLM 的 AI Agent 架构，包括 Planning、Memory、Tool Use 等核心模块
  • 开发多 Agent 协作系统与 RAG 系统，优化 Prompt Engineering
  • 开发区块链交互模块，实现链上数据分析、DeFi 协议交互等功能
  • 从0到1利用先进技术栈和 AI 工具提升研发效率，解决业务中的技术挑战


任职要求：

  • 精通 Golang，3年以上开发经验，熟悉 Node.js / Python
  • 熟悉主流 LLM API 及 Agent 框架（LangChain、CrewAI 等）
  • 深入理解 Transformer 架构、Attention 机制、Token 化原理
  • 具备 Fine-tuning、LoRA、模型量化等模型优化经验
  • 熟悉 Embedding 模型与向量检索原理，有 RAG 系统调优经验
  • 理解区块链原理、钱包机制、DeFi / NFT 等核心概念
  • 熟悉云服务，有积极使用 AI 编程工具的经验


加分项：

  • 有 AI Agent 产品落地经验
  • 熟悉 Solidity / Rust 智能合约开发
  • 有 EVM 兼容链开发经验，了解 MEV、链上数据分析
  • 有模型推理优化、本地模型部署经验
  • 热衷技术创新，对 AI 与 Web3 结合有热情和独到见解



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: CS Specialist (German)
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • Provide high-quality customer support to EU and German-speaking customers through multiple channels, including email and live chat.
  • Handle customer inquiries, complaints, and complex cases, conducting thorough investigations using internal systems and tools, and ensuring all outcomes are accurately documented in designated platforms.
  • Support customers on product, account, and transaction-related issues while adhering to EU regulatory and compliance standards.
  • Collaborate closely with internal teams (e.g. Product, Compliance, Risk, Operations) and external partners to resolve customer issues and improve overall service quality for the EU market.
  • Maintain strong awareness of EU customer expectations, cultural nuances, and service standards to deliver a professional and customer-centric experience.
  • Stay up to date with the company’s products, services, and EU market / industry trends to provide accurate and timely support.
  • Escalate high-risk, sensitive, or unresolved cases in line with established procedures and the operational escalation matrix.


What you'll need


  • Diploma or Bachelor’s Degree in any related field.
  • Minimum 1 year of customer service experience, preferably supporting EU customers in banking, financial services, fintech, crypto, or other regulated industries.
  • Native or fluent German (spoken and written) — mandatory, with strong customer-facing communication skills.
  • Good working proficiency in English (spoken and written) for internal communication and documentation.
  • Familiarity with EU compliance-driven environments (e.g. KYC, AML, GDPR) is a strong advantage.
  • Willingness to work on a rotational schedule to support 24x7 operations, including public holidays as required.
  • Strong interpersonal and communication skills, with the ability to handle escalations and challenging customer interactions calmly and professionally.
  • Solution-oriented mindset with sound judgment and cost-aware decision-making.
  • Excellent time management and multitasking skills in a fast-paced, high-volume support environment.
  • Quick learner who adapts well to change and acts on feedback constructively.


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: CFD BD (CN)
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • Lead business development initiatives within the crypto industry, driving user growth, trading volume expansion, and the establishment of long-term strategic partnerships.
  • Identify, expand, and maintain relationships with various partners and clients, with core KPIs focused on trading volume and user growth.
  • Collaborate closely with internal teams including Product, Marketing, and Operations to support client onboarding, activation, and sustained trading activity.
  • Collect market and client feedback, establish effective communication loops, and contribute to product and business optimization.
  • Track business objectives and performance metrics, and conduct regular reviews and reporting.


What you'll need


  • Background in CFD, FX, or brokerage-related industries, with experience in business development, sales, or client acquisition.
  • Strong familiarity with brokerage systems, including business models, trading processes, commission and rebate structures. Candidates with existing resources or networks among brokers, IBs, or trading-related clients are highly preferred.
  • Strong interest in the crypto industry or relevant professional experience, with a willingness to deeply understand digital assets and trading products.
  • Excellent communication and negotiation skills, strong self-motivation, and the ability to independently drive business initiatives.
  • Ability to thrive in a fast-paced, international working environment.

jobs.title: CFD Business Development Manager, Malaysia
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.

What you'll do


  • Responsible for Business Development related to the encryption industry, promoting user growth, transaction volume improvement, and establishing long-term cooperative relationships.
  • Expand and maintain various partner and customer resources, including financial customers, channel partners, etc.
  • Work closely with internal teams such as product, marketing, and operations to support customer entry, activation, and ongoing transactions.
  • Collect market and customer feedback, form an effective communication loop, and assist in promoting product and business optimization.
  • Follow up on business goals and data performance, conduct regular business reviews and reports.


What you'll need


  • Possess background in CFD/foreign exchange/securities industry, with experience in BD, sales or customer development.
  • Familiar with the brokerage system, understand the brokerage business model, trading process, commission or rebate structure.
  • Priority will be given to those who have certain securities firms, IB, trading-related clients or cooperative resources.
  • Interested in or have relevant work experience in the encryption industry, willing to delve into digital assets and trading products.
  • Possess good communication skills, business negotiation skills, and self-motivation, able to independently promote business.
  • Able to adapt to a fast-paced, international work environment.
  • Fluent in English and local language

jobs.title: CS Specialist (Japanese)
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • Attend to all inquiries/issues from global customers through multiple supported channels, e.g.: email, LiveChat, etc.
  • Handle customer's complaints and conduct comprehensive investigations using various tools. Accountable for each research/investigation outcome is documented and store in the designated location.
  • Liaise with both internal & external team to handle complaints and feedback related to our products and services, e.g.: website, platforms, etc.
  • Maintain up-to-date knowledge about the company's latest products & services as well as the industry’s trends to better support customers.
  • Escalate any queries or unresolved matters that are unable to complete within the agreed procedure to line manager or higher, as per the operational escalation matrix.


What you'll need


  • Diploma or Degree in any related field.
  • Minimum 1 year of experience related to customer service experience in the banking, financial and/or fintech sector.
  • Excellent verbal and written in Japanese and English language. Multilingual in writing and speaking would be a plus.
  • Willing to work according to schedule to support 24x7 operations.
  • Strong people skills: Ability to navigate difficult situations and stay calm when under pressure.
  • Solution mindset: Passionate in finding right solution(s) for the customer, and resolve the issue by overcoming obstacles; good cost-efficient decision making.
  • Excellent time management: Ability to multi-task to solve customer's issues/queries, while able to deliver the assigned task in a timely manner.
  • Quick learner: Ability to ramp up quickly and act on feedback constructively.


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey

jobs.title: Broker Operations Manager
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • Analyze broker data to understand enduser behavior and needs, and develop user operations strategies.
  • Plan and execute a variety of broker campaigns to grow the users and trading volume.
  • Monitor broker and enduser feedback to continuously optimise their experience.
  • Manage event budgets and evaluate campaign performance
  • Collaborate closely with the broker BD to grow the existing brokers
  • Collect broker's feedback to continuously optimize event planning and execution processes.
  • Collect and analyze broker data to gain insights into user behavior and needs
  • Track the performance of key performance indicators (KPIs) and make recommendations for improvement.


What you'll need


  • Solid experience in a role focusing in user operations or event operations
  • Prior experience in crypto exchange, trading platform, brokerage is preferred
  • Great passion for crypto or digital assets with strong knowledge of brokerage, liquidity
  • Strong communication and relationship building capabilities with clients
  • Strong data analysis and event planning skills.
  • Proficiency in various user operations and event operations tools.
  • Fluency in English and Chinese for business communication

jobs.title: KOL Business Development (Europe)
jobs.descriptionHtml:
What You’ll Do:

  • Identify and build relationships with local KOLs, influencers, communities, projects, and other potential partners to promote Bitget in the local market and achieve user and trading volume growth.
  • As a representative of Bitget, maintain strong relationships with KOLs and marketing channels to ensure long-term collaboration.
  • Manage and track the execution and performance of KOL marketing strategies, making adjustments to ensure optimal performance and maximum ROI.
  • Stay informed on local industry trends, developments, and competitor activities, and adapt strategies accordingly.
  • Organize and participate in offline events, including meetups, community gatherings, and industry activities, to support KOL collaboration and drive trading growth.


What You’ll Need:

  • Bachelor’s degree or above.
  • Good understanding of the European KOL ecosystem.
  • Professional working proficiency in English. Native or fluent German proficiency and experience in German-speaking markets (DACH) are a strong plus.
  • 2-5 years of experience in KOL business development, affiliate marketing, trading growth, or related roles (experience in Crypto, Fintech, or Traditional Finance is beneficial).
  • Hands-on experience with crypto trading (spot, derivatives, or copy trading), with a solid understanding of how crypto exchanges function.
  • Proven ability to drive real trading volume via KOLs or growth partnerships.
  • Results-driven mindset with the ability to work towards clear, volume-based performance targets.

jobs.title: Institutional Business Development Manager（Europe)
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • Target market and customer identification: Focus on identifying and contacting potential market makers, brokers and other customer groups who use API as their main trading tool, understand their business needs, and establish and maintain long-term cooperative relationships.
  • Business negotiation and cooperation promotion: Lead the business negotiation process to ensure that cooperation terms are fair and reasonable, effectively promote the conclusion of cooperation agreements, and enhance customer satisfaction and loyalty.
  • Market insights and strategy formulation: Continuously track and analyze the dynamics of the API trading market, competitor strategies and changes in customer needs, and provide data support and suggestions for the company's product iterations and market strategies.
  • Customer support and relationship maintenance: Provide technical support and business consultation to customers in the process of using APIs, solve customer problems, enhance customer stickiness, and promote continued business growth.
  • Performance achievement and team contribution: Set and achieve personal and team business development goals, including but not limited to key performance indicators such as the number of new customers and API transaction volume growth.


What you'll need


  • Educational background: Bachelor degree or above, finance, computer, information technology, marketing and other related majors are preferred.
  • Work experience: At least 3 years of relevant work experience in BD/sales in financial institutions, Internet companies or blockchain industries. Applicants with successful cases of connecting with API customers such as market makers and brokers will be given priority.
  • Professional knowledge: Familiar with the cryptocurrency market, understand basic concepts such as API trading systems, high-frequency trading, quantitative trading, etc., and have a certain understanding of blockchain technology. Have basic IT knowledge and be able to understand technical details such as API interfaces and data transmission to facilitate effective communication with customers.
  • Communication skills: Have excellent business negotiation and interpersonal skills, and be able to accurately grasp customer needs and provide solutions that meet their business needs.
  • Market acumen: Highly sensitive to market trends and industry dynamics, able to quickly adapt to market changes and formulate effective market strategies.
  • Teamwork and leadership: Have a strong sense of responsibility and teamwork spirit, be able to work efficiently in a fast-paced, high-pressure environment, and have certain team leadership skills.
  • Language ability: Fluent communication skills in English, able to communicate with international partners without barriers. Bonus points for those with other language skills.


If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Institutional Business Development Manager (Japanese speaker)
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About Us

Bitget is one of the world's leading digital asset ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, we provide a comprehensive suite of blockchain products and services via bitget.com.

Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry, which we believe represents the future of finance. We empower the future of finance by enabling secure, efficient, and intelligent digital transactions.

We are among the fastest-growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, opportunities to grow your career among industry experts, and believe in the potential of digital assets, Bitget is the place for you.


What You’ll Do

  • Identify, onboard, and grow institutional clients trading via APIs, including exchanges, brokers, market makers, and HFT firms.
  • Own end-to-end business development and partnership negotiations, driving mutually beneficial cooperation and long-term relationships.
  • Drive key performance metrics such as new institutional client acquisition, API trading volume, and revenue growth.
  • Work closely with institutional clients to understand trading strategies, infrastructure needs, and execution requirements.
  • Provide ongoing business and coordination support for API clients, working with internal product and technical teams to resolve issues and improve client experience.
  • Monitor API trading market trends, competitor offerings, and client feedback to support market strategy and product optimization.
  • Contribute to team targets and regional growth objectives in a fast-paced, performance-driven environment.


What You’ll Need

  • Bachelor’s degree or above.
  • 3+ years of experience in business development, sales, or institutional coverage within crypto exchanges, financial institutions, trading firms, or fintech companies.
  • Proven experience working with institutional or professional trading clients (e.g. HFTs, brokers, market makers, quant funds, or API-based traders).
  • Solid understanding of crypto markets, API trading workflows, and institutional trading concepts; ability to communicate effectively with technical and trading teams.
  • Strong negotiation, relationship management, and problem-solving skills.
  • Results-driven mindset with the ability to work independently and manage multiple client relationships.
  • Professional working proficiency in English; Japanese is a strong plus. Additional languages are an advantage.


If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!

By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: PR Manager
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • Draft and distribute press releases on corporate updates, token listings, CSR initiatives, and partnerships
  • Develop and pitch daily market commentary and analysis to financial and crypto media
  • Coordinate with journalists and media outlets to manage inbound requests and arrange interviews
  • Support the execution of corporate announcements and manage media briefings
  • Create impactful presentations and slides for global events and executive appearances
  • Drive visibility for Bitget’s Blockchain4Youth and Blockchain4Her campaigns through targeted PR strategies


What you'll need

  • 5+ years of experience in public relations, with at least 1 year in a crypto exchange or Web3 company
  • Strong writing, pitching, and storytelling skills with a track record of media placements
  • Deep understanding of the crypto and blockchain media landscape
  • Ability to work cross-functionally and under tight deadlines
  • Proficiency in English; additional languages are a plus



Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe

jobs.title: Head of Custody (RI), Dubai
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


The Head of Custody will lead and oversee all aspects of the virtual asset custody function for a VARA‑licensed exchange in Dubai. The Head of Custody is responsible for the safekeeping of client assets, design and operation of wallet and key‑management frameworks, and ensuring full compliance with VARA Custody‑related Rulebooks and other applicable UAE regulations.


  • Define and maintain the overall virtual asset custody model, policies and procedures in line with VARA requirements.
  • Design and oversee secure wallet and key‑management frameworks (hot/warm/cold, multi‑sig/MPC, withdrawals and approvals).
  • Ensure custody operations comply with all relevant VARA Rulebooks and UAE laws, working closely with Compliance, MLRO and Legal.
  • Identify, assess and manage custody‑related risks, and maintain strong internal controls and reconciliations for client assets.
  • Oversee information security and operational resilience for custody infrastructure, including incident response and recovery plans.
  • Manage day‑to‑day custody operations (deposits, withdrawals, transfers, sweeping and treasury movements) in line with agreed SLAs.
  • Coordinate with Trading, Treasury, Risk, Finance and Customer Support to ensure accurate, timely and secure asset flows.
  • Manage relationships with external custodians and wallet/key‑management vendors, including due diligence and ongoing oversight.
  • Lead audits, assurance activities and internal reporting on custody KPIs, incidents, reconciliations and control effectiveness.
  • Build and lead the custody team, promoting a strong control culture and providing training on custody processes and risks.


What you'll need


  • University degree in Law, Finance, Risk, Computer Science, or related disciplines.
  • Minimum 5 years of experience in crypto custody, risk management, cybersecurity, or financial safeguarding roles.
  • Strong understanding of blockchain infrastructure, wallet technology, and asset segregation principles.
  • Familiarity with VARA requirements for safeguarding and asset protection.
  • Strong communication skills and ability to collaborate across departments.
  • Fluency in English; Arabic is a plus



Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: UI Designer UI 设计师
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget Wallet is the non-custodial crypto wallet designed to make crypto simple and secure for everyone. With over 80 million users, we bring together a full suite of crypto services, including swaps, market insights, staking, rewards, DApp exploration, and payment solutions. Supporting 130+ blockchains and millions of tokens, Bitget Wallet enables seamless multi-chain trading across hundreds of DEXs and cross-chain bridges. Backed by a $300+ million user protection fund, it ensures the highest level of security for users' assets.


﻿What you'll do


  • Responsible for the internationalisation of the product mobile and desktop product user interface design;
  • Responsible for the creative process, tracking the product effect, put forward the design improvement program, benchmarking the industry's first-line products in Europe and the United States;
  • Propose reasonable design solutions for product design, transform conceptual ideas into visually appealing, user-centered interfaces, and dock with the product manager to promote the implementation of the program;
  • Combined with user feedback and usability testing results, independently complete the product interface design and dynamic interaction Demo production and other work;
  • Follow up the data feedback, combined with data feedback to give quantitative and qualitative-oriented design, proposal, program output;
  • Ownership, collaborate with the design team, upstream and downstream departments, to promote the program landing.


What you'll need


  • More than 3 years experience in UI design, art, visual communication, computer or other related majors;
  • Familiar with iOS, Android, Web design specifications, with mature design theories and techniques, the pursuit of design;
  • Have forward-looking design concepts, actively pay attention to domestic and international industry development, design trends;
  • Have a clear concept and understanding of domestic/international Internet product design process;
  • With strong initiative, good at collaborative communication, process of reasonable expression, positive design thinking;
  • Web3 experience, overseas product design or top product design in the same industry is preferred; excellent video skills are preferred.


工作内容

  • 负责产品移动端与桌面端的界面设计国际化工作；
  • 负责创意流程，跟踪产品效果，提出设计改进方案，并对标欧美一线产品；
  • 为产品设计提出合理的设计解决方案，将概念性想法转化为具备视觉吸引力、以用户为中心的界面，并与产品经理对接推动方案落地；
  • 结合用户反馈与可用性测试结果，独立完成产品界面设计及动态交互 Demo 制作等工作；
  • 跟进数据反馈，基于数据给出定量与定性导向的设计建议与方案输出；
  • 拥有主人翁意识，与设计团队及上下游部门协作，推动方案落地实施。


岗位要求

  • 3 年以上 UI 设计经验，美术、视觉传达、计算机或相关专业背景；
  • 熟悉 iOS、Android、Web 设计规范，具备成熟的设计理论与方法，追求卓越设计；
  • 具备前瞻性的设计理念，积极关注国内外行业发展与设计趋势；
  • 对国内/国际互联网产品设计流程有清晰理解与认识；
  • 主动性强，善于协作沟通，能够合理表达流程，具备积极的设计思维；
  • 有 Web3 经验、海外产品设计经验或行业顶尖产品设计经验者优先；具备优秀视频技能者优先。


If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Graphic Motion Designer 动效设计师
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget Wallet is the non-custodial crypto wallet designed to make crypto simple and secure for everyone. With over 80 million users, we bring together a full suite of crypto services, including swaps, market insights, staking, rewards, DApp exploration, and payment solutions. Supporting 130+ blockchains and millions of tokens, Bitget Wallet enables seamless multi-chain trading across hundreds of DEXs and cross-chain bridges. Backed by a $300+ million user protection fund, it ensures the highest level of security for users' assets.


What you'll do


  • Design and produce localized advertising materials (with a focus on video motion graphics) based on product highlights and promotional needs.
  • Keep up with creative advertising trends and visual expressions in the financial industry, ensuring diversity and freshness in ad concepts while iterating and optimizing materials.
  • Continuously refine advertising creatives to improve click-through and conversion rates, while developing and documenting design methodologies.
  • Independently complete video design, motion graphics, and interactive animation demos.
  • Pursue excellence in visual aesthetics and motion effects, while exploring innovative design languages and motion expression styles.
  • Collaborate closely with the design team and cross-functional teams to ensure smooth execution and delivery of design solutions.
  • Responsible for designing a series of videos for BG Wallet, including brand promotional videos and product feature videos.
  • Responsible for motion design for BG Wallet products to enhance the product experience.


What you'll need


  • Proven experience in motion design, with a strong portfolio showcasing video and animation projects.
  • Strong sense of visual aesthetics, typography, and motion dynamics.
  • Proficiency in motion design and video tools (e.g., After Effects, Premiere, Cinema 4D, Photoshop, Illustrator, Figma).
  • Ability to adapt to a fast-paced and evolving creative environment.
  • Passion for exploring new trends in design and motion graphics.
  • Strong English communication skills are preferred.
  • Over 5 years of experience in video or product motion design.
  • Possess an international aesthetic sense and a good understanding of overseas cultures.
  • Experience in major overseas companies or international projects is preferred.


工作内容

  • 根据产品亮点和推广需求，设计并制作本地化广告素材（重点为产品动效设计）。
  • 紧跟金融行业的创意广告趋势与视觉表现方式，确保广告概念的多样性与新鲜感，同时不断迭代与优化素材。
  • 持续优化广告创意，提高点击率和转化率，并总结和沉淀设计方法论。
  • 独立完成视频设计、动效设计和交互动画演示。
  • 在追求视觉美感和动效表现的同时，探索创新的设计语言与动效表现风格。
  • 与设计团队及跨职能团队紧密协作，确保设计方案的顺利执行与交付。
  • 负责 BG Wallet 的视频系列设计，包括品牌宣传片和产品功能视频。
  • 负责 BG Wallet 产品的动效设计，提升产品体验。


岗位要求

  • 拥有丰富的动效设计经验，并具备优秀的视频与动画作品集。
  • 具备出色的视觉审美、排版能力及动效节奏感。
  • 熟练掌握动效与视频相关工具（如 After Effects、Premiere、Cinema 4D、Photoshop、Illustrator、Figma）。
  • 能适应快节奏且不断变化的创意环境。
  • 对设计与动效的新趋势保持高度热情与探索精神。

About us

Bitget Wallet is the non-custodial crypto wallet designed to make crypto simple and secure for everyone. With over 80 million users, we bring together a full suite of crypto services, including swaps, market insights, staking, rewards, DApp exploration, and payment solutions. Supporting 130+ blockchains and millions of tokens, Bitget Wallet enables seamless multi-chain trading across hundreds of DEXs and cross-chain bridges. Backed by a $300+ million user protection fund, it ensures the highest level of security for users' assets.

What you'll do

Design and produce localized advertising materials (with a focus on video motion graphics) based on product highlights and promotional needs.
Keep up with creative advertising trends and visual expressions in the financial industry, ensuring diversity and freshness in ad concepts while iterating and optimizing materials.
Continuously refine advertising creatives to improve click-through and conversion rates, while developing and documenting design methodologies.
Independently complete video design, motion graphics, and interactive animation demos.
Pursue excellence in visual aesthetics and motion effects, while exploring innovative design languages and motion expression styles.
Collaborate closely with the design team and cross-functional teams to ensure smooth execution and delivery of design solutions.
Responsible for designing a series of videos for BG Wallet, including brand promotional videos and product feature videos.
Responsible for motion design for BG Wallet products to enhance the product experience.

What you'll need

Proven experience in motion design, with a strong portfolio showcasing video and animation projects.
Strong sense of visual aesthetics, typography, and motion dynamics.
Proficiency in motion design and video tools (e.g., After Effects, Premiere, Cinema 4D, Photoshop, Illustrator, Figma).
Ability to adapt to a fast-paced and evolving creative environment.
Passion for exploring new trends in design and motion graphics.
Strong English communication skills are preferred.
Over 5 years of experience in video or product motion design.
Possess an international aesthetic sense and a good understanding of overseas cultures.
Experience in major overseas companies or international projects is preferred.

工作内容
根据产品亮点和推广需求，设计并制作本地化广告素材（重点为产品动效设计）。
紧跟金融行业的创意广告趋势与视觉表现方式，确保广告概念的多样性与新鲜感，同时不断迭代与优化素材。
持续优化广告创意，提高点击率和转化率，并总结和沉淀设计方法论。
独立完成视频设计、动效设计和交互动画演示。
在追求视觉美感和动效表现的同时，探索创新的设计语言与动效表现风格。
与设计团队及跨职能团队紧密协作，确保设计方案的顺利执行与交付。
负责 BG Wallet 的视频系列设计，包括品牌宣传片和产品功能视频。
负责 BG Wallet 产品的动效设计，提升产品体验。

岗位要求
拥有丰富的动效设计经验，并具备优秀的视频与动画作品集。
具备出色的视觉审美、排版能力及动效节奏感。
熟练掌握动效与视频相关工具（如 After Effects、Premiere、Cinema 4D、Photoshop、Illustrator、Figma）。
能适应快节奏且不断变化的创意环境。
对设计与动效的新趋势保持高度热情与探索精神。
具备较强的英文沟通能力者优先。
5 年以上视频或产品动效设计经验。
拥有国际化审美，并对海外文化有良好理解。

jobs.title: Graphic Designer 平面设计师
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget Wallet is the non-custodial crypto wallet designed to make crypto simple and secure for everyone. With over 80 million users, we bring together a full suite of crypto services, including swaps, market insights, staking, rewards, DApp exploration, and payment solutions. Supporting 130+ blockchains and millions of tokens, Bitget Wallet enables seamless multi-chain trading across hundreds of DEXs and cross-chain bridges. Backed by a $300+ million user protection fund, it ensures the highest level of security for users' assets.


What you'll do


  • Design and develop brand assets, including logos, typography, color systems, and visual guidelines that reinforce a consistent brand identity.
  • Create marketing and communication materials such as banners, social media creatives, pitch decks, infographics, event collateral, and campaign visuals.
  • Collaborate closely with marketing, product, and content teams to deliver design solutions that engage users and align with business objectives.
  • Translate complex ideas—especially within cryptocurrency, Web3, and digital finance—into clear, engaging, and visually appealing graphics.
  • Maintain high standards of visual design and ensure accuracy, consistency, and attention to detail across all creative outputs.
  • Use design tools (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, Figma) to produce high-quality deliverables optimized for both digital and print usage.
  • Research design trends and emerging creative approaches, bringing fresh and innovative ideas into projects.
  • Manage multiple design requests in a fast-moving environment while meeting deadlines.


What you'll need


  • Bachelor’s degree or above in design or related field, with 3+ years of brand design experience;
  • Proficient in design tools such as Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, and Figma;
  • Strong aesthetic sense and excellent color control ability;
  • Able to adapt to a fast-paced and remote team work environment;
  • Passionate about cryptocurrency, Web3, and the future of digital finance.
  • Experience in advertising agencies and strong English skills are preferred.


工作内容

  • 设计和开发品牌资产，包括标志、字体系统、色彩体系和视觉指南，强化一致的品牌形象。
  • 制作营销与传播材料，如横幅、社交媒体创意、路演文稿、信息图表、活动物料及市场活动视觉设计。
  • 与市场、产品和内容团队紧密合作，提供能够吸引用户且符合业务目标的设计方案。
  • 将复杂概念——尤其是加密货币、Web3 和数字金融相关内容——转化为清晰、有吸引力且具视觉感染力的图形。
  • 保持高标准的视觉设计，确保所有创意产出在准确性、一致性和细节上的高水准。
  • 使用设计工具（Photoshop、Illustrator、InDesign、Figma）制作高质量的交付物，优化适配数字与印刷场景。
  • 研究设计趋势与新兴创意方法，为项目带来新颖且创新的想法。
  • 在快节奏的环境下同时管理多个设计需求，并按时完成。


岗位要求

  • 设计或相关专业本科及以上学历，3 年以上品牌设计经验；
  • 熟练掌握 Photoshop、Illustrator、InDesign 和 Figma 等设计工具；
  • 具有较强的审美能力和优秀的色彩把控能力；
  • 能适应快节奏及远程团队的工作环境；
  • 对加密货币、Web3 及数字金融的未来充满热情；
  • 有广告公司经验及较强英文能力者优先。



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Visual Design Specialist
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget Wallet is the non-custodial crypto wallet designed to make crypto simple and secure for everyone. With over 80 million users, we bring together a full suite of crypto services, including swaps, market insights, staking, rewards, DApp exploration, and payment solutions. Supporting 130+ blockchains and millions of tokens, Bitget Wallet enables seamless multi-chain trading across hundreds of DEXs and cross-chain bridges. Backed by a $300+ million user protection fund, it ensures the highest level of security for users' assets.


What you'll do

﻿

  • Brand Development: Oversee the development and consistent application of the brand identity across all platforms, ensuring a cohesive and compelling brand presence.
  • Content Strategy: Guide the creation of video content, animations, and other visual media that enhance the brand story and product offerings, ensuring alignment with the broader creative vision.
  • Stakeholder Collaboration: Collaborate closely with internal stakeholders, including marketing, product, and engineering teams, to ensure that creative initiatives meet business objectives and deadlines.
  • Innovation and Trends: Stay ahead of industry trends, particularly in Web3 and decentralized technologies, and integrate relevant innovations into the creative process.


What you'll need


  • At least 3-5 years of experience as a brand design, with a strong portfolio demonstrating successful projects in branding, and content creation within the tech or blockchain industry.
  • Deep understanding of Web3, blockchain, and decentralized technologies, with the ability to translate complex concepts into accessible and engaging creative outputs.
  • Proven experience leading and developing high-performing creative teams, with a collaborative and inclusive approach.
  • Strategic thinker with a clear understanding of how creative work impacts business outcomes.
  • Excellent verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to effectively articulate creative concepts to non-creative stakeholders.
  • Ability to work in a fast-paced, dynamic environment and adapt quickly to changing priorities and market conditions.
  • Industry Experience: Over 2 years of management experience in a similar industry, with a preference for candidates with Web3, fintech, or blockchain experience.


您的职责


  • 品牌发展：负责品牌标识在所有平台上的开发和统一应用，确保品牌形象的一致性和吸引力。
  • 内容策略：指导视频内容、动画和其他视觉媒体的创作，以增强品牌故事和产品展示，并确保其与整体创意愿景保持一致。
  • 利益相关者协作：与包括市场营销、产品和工程团队在内的内部利益相关者紧密合作，确保创意项目符合业务目标并按时完成。
  • 创新与趋势：密切关注行业趋势，尤其是在 Web3 和去中心化技术领域，并将相关创新融入到创意流程中。


您需要具备的条件：


  • 至少 3-5 年品牌设计经验，并拥有出色的作品集，能够展示在科技或区块链行业品牌推广和内容创作方面的成功案例。
  • 深入理解 Web3、区块链和去中心化技术，并能够将复杂的概念转化为易于理解且引人入胜的创意作品。
  • 拥有领导和发展高效创意团队的经验，并具备协作和包容的工作方式。
  • 具备战略思维，清晰理解创意工作如何影响业务成果。
  • 优秀的口头和书面沟通能力，能够有效地向非创意领域的利益相关者阐述创意概念。
  • 能够在快节奏、高动态的环境中工作，并能快速适应不断变化的工作重点和市场环境。
  • 行业经验：在类似行业拥有 2 年以上的管理经验，优先考虑拥有 Web3、金融科技或区块链经验的候选人。




If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Future Operation Trading Product Operation
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • Product iteration: Benchmarking top contract exchanges, collaborating with product and R & D teams to optimize contract trading products, identifying product shortcomings and promoting implementation to improve user experience and competitiveness.
  • Demand insight: Regularly conduct competing product research and user interviews, output feasible product and operational suggestions, XFN promotes the solution of core pain points.
  • User growth: Operate retail and professional traders in layers, design differentiated incentive and activity plans, and improve contract user engagement rate and transaction scale.
  • Collaborate with the risk control team to assist in designing and optimizing risk control strategies.



What you'll need


  • More than 3 years experience in mainstream exchange operation or product position.
  • Deeply understand the logic of contract trading, be familiar with margin mechanism, funding rate, clearing rules and arbitrage, hedging and other strategies.
  • Familiarize yourself with the portraits and demand points of various contract traders.
  • Have the ability to analyze data, and be able to find problems and drive decisions from transaction data.
  • English can be given priority as a daily working language.



Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.

What you'll do


  • Manage and grow regional communities across platforms such as Telegram and Discord.
  • Plan and execute community campaigns to boost engagement and user growth.
  • Monitor user sentiment and handle community issues or crisis situations promptly.
  • Provide community data analysis and regular performance reports.
  • Collaborate with product, marketing, and other teams to enhance user experience.


What you'll need


  • Proficiency in both Mandarin Chinese and English (required).
  • Experience in community operations within a crypto exchange (required).
  • Proven experience in campaign planning and growth activities.
  • Strong skills in sentiment monitoring and crisis management.
  • Familiar with Web3/crypto community culture and strong communication skills.

Plan and execute community campaigns to boost engagement and user growth.
Monitor user sentiment and handle community issues or crisis situations promptly.
Provide community data analysis and regular performance reports.
Collaborate with product, marketing, and other teams to enhance user experience.

What you'll need

Proficiency in both Mandarin Chinese and English (required).
Experience in community operations within a crypto exchange (required).
Proven experience in campaign planning and growth activities.
Strong skills in sentiment monitoring and crisis management.
Familiar with Web3/crypto community culture and strong communication skills.

Why Bitget?

Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
We offer competitive salaries and benefits
Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!

If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!

jobs.title: Test Engineer  测试工程师
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us

 

Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!

 

What you'll do 


  • Be responsible for the core business testing work of the company;
  • Collaborate with product managers and the R&D team to deliver high-quality products;
  • Improve the mechanism for identifying quality issues during the R&D process and enhance testing efficiency, etc.

  • Proficient in leveraged trading and contract trading related businesses;
  • Possess basic testing skills, including but not limited to:
  • Requirements analysis, use case writing, case execution, bug submission, follow-up on issue fixes, and project progress advancement;

jobs.title: Video Production Manager
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


a. Team Management & Project Coordination

  • Oversee the overall management and daily operations of the video production team.
  • Plan and optimize workflows to ensure high-quality output and timely delivery.
  • Establish and enforce video content standards to maintain consistency with brand identity.

b. Creative Direction & Aesthetic Control

  • Contribute to project ideation, providing strong visual direction.
  • Ensure all content demonstrates high-level aesthetics and creative expression.
  • Propose innovative video storytelling approaches aligned with brand positioning.

c. 3D & AI Integration

  • Lead the team in producing high-quality 3D animation and visual effects.
  • Proficient in 3D animation/VFX pipelines (e.g., Cinema 4D, Blender).
  • Apply AI-powered tools to improve efficiency in design, video generation, and post-production.

d. Production Execution & On-Site Guidance

  • Provide on-set direction across scene setup, lighting, and camera movements.
  • Oversee the entire production process from shooting to final delivery.

e. Quality Control & Delivery

  • Ensure the highest standard of production quality across all deliverables.
  • Optimize video formats and performance across platforms (social media, website, events, etc.).


What you'll need


  • Bachelor’s degree or above in Film Production, Multimedia Design, Visual Communication, or related fields.
  • 5+ years of video production experience, including at least 2 years in team leadership.
  • Deep knowledge of the full video production process.
  • Proficient in After Effects, Cinema 4D, Blender, Premiere Pro, and other professional tools.
  • Strong experience in 3D animation and VFX; capable of leading complex projects.
  • Hands-on experience applying AI tools to video production workflows.
  • Excellent aesthetic sense and strong visual storytelling ability.
  • Strong communication, coordination, and cross-functional collaboration skills.
  • Able to thrive in a fast-paced environment with problem-solving and execution capabilities.


Why Bitget?

jobs.title: BGW Senior Test Engineer 高级测试工程师
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget Wallet is the non-custodial crypto wallet designed to make crypto simple and secure for everyone. With over 80 million users, we bring together a full suite of crypto services, including swaps, market insights, staking, rewards, DApp exploration, and payment solutions. Supporting 130+ blockchains and millions of tokens, Bitget Wallet enables seamless multi-chain trading across hundreds of DEXs and cross-chain bridges. Backed by a $300+ million user protection fund, it ensures the highest level of security for users' assets.


What you'll do


  • Responsible for testing BitgetWallet Swap business, including test plan design, test case writing, and execution.
  • Participate in requirements reviews, collaborate with product and development teams to identify test points, and drive issue localization and resolution.
  • Design and implement automated testing scripts based on product business characteristics to improve testing efficiency and coverage。


What you'll need


  • Bachelor’s degree or above in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related fields.
  • Experience in Web3 Swap testing, having participated in actual testing projects such as DeFi, Swap, cross-chain bridges, etc.
  • Familiar with major blockchain smart contract principles (e.g. Ethereum, BSC, Polygon); ability to understand Solidity contract code is a plus.
  • Familiar with at least one mainstream programming language (such as JavaScript, Python, Go, etc.), with experience in developing automated test scripts.
  • Strong communication and teamwork skills, clear logical thinking, attention to detail, and a strong sense of responsibility.


岗位职责


  • 负责BitgetWallet Swap业务的测试工作，测试方案设计、用例编写和执行；
  • 参与需求评审，协同产品、开发梳理测试点，推动问题定位和解决；
  • 根据产品业务特点，设计和实现自动化测试脚本，提高测试效率与覆盖范围。


任职要求


  • 计算机、软件工程等相关专业本科及以上学历；
  • 有Web3 Swap测试经验，参与过DeFi、Swap、跨链桥等实际项目测试工作；
  • 熟悉主流区块链（如以太坊、BSC、Polygon等）智能合约原理，能理解Solidity合约代码优先；
  • 熟悉至少一种主流编程语言（如JavaScript、Python、Go等），有自动化测试脚本开发经验；
  • 具备良好的沟通表达能力和团队协作能力，逻辑思维清晰，工作细致负责。



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Product Manager (Wallet Infra) 产品经理（钱包基础架构）
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget Wallet is the non-custodial crypto wallet designed to make crypto simple and secure for everyone. With over 80 million users, we bring together a full suite of crypto services, including swaps, market insights, staking, rewards, DApp exploration, and payment solutions. Supporting 130+ blockchains and millions of tokens, Bitget Wallet enables seamless multi-chain trading across hundreds of DEXs and cross-chain bridges. Backed by a $300+ million user protection fund, it ensures the highest level of security for users' assets.


What you'll do


1. Product Planning & Design

  • Responsible for Web3 wallet product planning and feature design, combining industry trends and user needs to develop the product iteration roadmap.
  • Participate in the construction of wallet infrastructure (e.g., asset management, gas fee sponsorship, security and risk control) to improve system stability and scalability.
  • Design and optimize core functions such as transfers, payments, DApp interactions, and risk detection, ensuring a balance between usability and security.

2. Data & Optimization

  • Responsible for tracking and analyzing key business metrics of the wallet (e.g., deposit conversion, asset coverage).
  • Monitor and analyze user feedback and data to drive decisions for future product direction.

3. User Research & Growth

  • Conduct in-depth research on target user groups (beginners, entry-level users, advanced users) to gain insights into their usage scenarios and pain points.

4. Cross-Department Collaboration

  • Work closely with cross-functional teams including engineering, UI/UX design, marketing, customer service, and operations to achieve product goals.


What you'll need


1. Educational Background

  • Bachelor’s degree or above, with preference for majors in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Information Management, Financial Technology, or related fields.

2. Experience Requirements

  • 3+ years of experience as a Product Manager in internet or blockchain-related fields; candidates with experience in wallets, exchanges, payments, or financial products are preferred.
  • Familiar with Web3 products (blockchain, smart contracts, DeFi, DApps, etc.), with a deep understanding of wallet products.

3. Skills & Abilities

  • Solid technical foundation, able to understand underlying blockchain logic (account model, private keys/mnemonics, transaction signatures, gas mechanism, etc.) and communicate effectively with development teams.
  • Familiar with UX/UI principles, capable of delivering excellent user experiences.
  • Strong data analysis skills, able to propose optimization solutions based on data.
  • Excellent project management skills.

4. Bonus Points

  • Experience independently leading a wallet product from 0 to 1.
  • Familiar with cross-chain and multi-chain ecosystems (e.g., ETH, BSC, Solana, Tron).
  • Project experience in gas fee sponsorship and risk control.
  • Fluent in English, with the ability to quickly understand overseas industry news, whitepapers, and technical documentation.


岗位职责


1. 产品规划与设计

  • 负责 Web3 钱包的产品规划与功能设计，结合行业趋势与用户需求，制定产品迭代路线图。
  • 参与钱包底层基础设施建设（如资产管理、Gas 代付、安全风控等），提升系统的稳定性与扩展性。
  • 设计并优化转账、收款、DApp 交互、风险检测等核心功能，确保产品兼顾易用性与安全性。

2. 数据与优化

  • 负责钱包核心业务指标的跟踪与分析（如入金转化率、资产覆盖率等）。
  • 监控并分析用户反馈与数据，推动未来产品方向的决策。

3. 用户研究与增长

  • 深入研究目标用户群体（新手、小白用户、资深用户），洞察其使用场景与痛点。

4. 跨部门协作

  • 与技术、UI/UX 设计、市场营销、客服和运营等跨职能团队紧密合作，共同实现产品目标。


任职要求


1. 教育背景

  • 本科及以上学历，计算机、软件工程、信息管理、金融科技等相关专业优先。

2. 经验要求

  • 3 年以上互联网或区块链相关产品经理经验，有钱包、交易所、支付或金融产品经验者优先。
  • 熟悉 Web3 产品（区块链、智能合约、DeFi、DApp 等），对钱包产品有深入理解。

3. 技能与能力

  • 具备扎实的技术基础，能够理解区块链底层逻辑（账户模型、私钥/助记词、交易签名、Gas 机制等），并能与研发团队高效沟通。
  • 熟悉 UX/UI 原则，能够提供卓越的用户体验。
  • 具备良好的数据分析能力，能够基于数据提出优化方案。
  • 拥有出色的项目管理能力。

4. 加分项

  • 有独立负责 0 到 1 钱包产品建设的经验。
  • 熟悉跨链和多链生态（如 ETH、BSC、Solana、Tron 等）。
  • 有 Gas 代付、风控处置相关项目经验。
  • 英文流利，能够快速理解海外行业资讯、白皮书与技术文档。

jobs.descriptionText:
About us

Bitget Wallet is the non-custodial crypto wallet designed to make crypto simple and secure for everyone. With over 80 million users, we bring together a full suite of crypto services, including swaps, market insights, staking, rewards, DApp exploration, and payment solutions. Supporting 130+ blockchains and millions of tokens, Bitget Wallet enables seamless multi-chain trading across hundreds of DEXs and cross-chain bridges. Backed by a $300+ million user protection fund, it ensures the highest level of security for users' assets.

What you'll do

1. Product Planning & Design
Responsible for Web3 wallet product planning and feature design, combining industry trends and user needs to develop the product iteration roadmap.
Participate in the construction of wallet infrastructure (e.g., asset management, gas fee sponsorship, security and risk control) to improve system stability and scalability.
Design and optimize core functions such as transfers, payments, DApp interactions, and risk detection, ensuring a balance between usability and security.
2. Data & Optimization
Responsible for tracking and analyzing key business metrics of the wallet (e.g., deposit conversion, asset coverage).
Monitor and analyze user feedback and data to drive decisions for future product direction.
3. User Research & Growth
Conduct in-depth research on target user groups (beginners, entry-level users, advanced users) to gain insights into their usage scenarios and pain points.
4. Cross-Department Collaboration
Work closely with cross-functional teams including engineering, UI/UX design, marketing, customer service, and operations to achieve product goals.

What you'll need

1. Educational Background
Bachelor’s degree or above, with preference for majors in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Information Management, Financial Technology, or related fields.
2. Experience Requirements
3+ years of experience as a Product Manager in internet or blockchain-related fields; candidates with experience in wallets, exchanges, payments, or financial products are preferred.
Familiar with Web3 products (blockchain, smart contracts, DeFi, DApps, etc.), with a deep understanding of wallet products.
3. Skills & Abilities
Solid technical foundation, able to understand underlying blockchain logic (account model, private keys/mnemonics, transaction signatures, gas mechanism, etc.) and communicate effectively with development teams.
Familiar with UX/UI principles, capable of delivering excellent user experiences.
Strong data analysis skills, able to propose optimization solutions based on data.
Excellent project management skills.
4. Bonus Points
Experience independently leading a wallet product from 0 to 1.
Familiar with cross-chain and multi-chain ecosystems (e.g., ETH, BSC, Solana, Tron).
Project experience in gas fee sponsorship and risk control.
Fluent in English, with the ability to quickly understand overseas industry news, whitepapers, and technical documentation.

岗位职责

1. 产品规划与设计
负责 Web3 钱包的产品规划与功能设计，结合行业趋势与用户需求，制定产品迭代路线图。
参与钱包底层基础设施建设（如资产管理、Gas 代付、安全风控等），提升系统的稳定性与扩展性。
设计并优化转账、收款、DApp 交互、风险检测等核心功能，确保产品兼顾易用性与安全性。
2. 数据与优化
负责钱包核心业务指标的跟踪与分析（如入金转化率、资产覆盖率等）。
监控并分析用户反馈与数据，推动未来产品方向的决策。
3. 用户研究与增长
深入研究目标用户群体（新手、小白用户、资深用户），洞察其使用场景与痛点。
4. 跨部门协作
与技术、UI/UX 设计、市场营销、客服和运营等跨职能团队紧密合作，共同实现产品目标。

任职要求

1. 教育背景
本科及以上学历，计算机、软件工程、信息管理、金融科技等相关专业优先。
2. 经验要求
3 年以上互联网或区块链相关产品经理经验，有钱包、交易所、支付或金融产品经验者优先。
熟悉 Web3 产品（区块链、智能合约、DeFi、DApp 等），对钱包产品有深入理解。
3. 技能与能力
具备扎实的技术基础，能够理解区块链底层逻辑（账户模型、私钥/助记词、交易签名、Gas 机制等），并能与研发团队高效沟通。
熟悉 UX/UI 原则，能够提供卓越的用户体验。
具备良好的数据分析能力，能够基于数据提出优化方案。
拥有出色的项目管理能力。
4. 加分项
有独立负责 0 到 1 钱包产品建设的经验。
熟悉跨链和多链生态（如 ETH、BSC、Solana、Tron 等）。
有 Gas 代付、风控处置相关项目经验。
英文流利，能够快速理解海外行业资讯、白皮书与技术文档。

jobs.title: Swap Product Manager
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget Wallet is the non-custodial crypto wallet designed to make crypto simple and secure for everyone. With over 80 million users, we bring together a full suite of crypto services, including swaps, market insights, staking, rewards, DApp exploration, and payment solutions. Supporting 130+ blockchains and millions of tokens, Bitget Wallet enables seamless multi-chain trading across hundreds of DEXs and cross-chain bridges. Backed by a $300+ million user protection fund, it ensures the highest level of security for users' assets.


What you'll do


  • Product Planning & Design: Responsible for planning and functional design of on-chain trading products (Swap business line), defining the product roadmap and iteration plans.
  • Requirements Analysis & Management: Deeply analyze market needs, user behavior, and the competitive landscape; identify user pain points and translate them into concrete product requirements.
  • Cross-Departmental Collaboration: Coordinate with R&D, design, QA, and operations teams to ensure timely delivery of product features and drive high-quality product launches.
  • Market Research & Competitor Analysis: Continuously monitor Web3 industry and DeFi market trends, regularly analyze competitor developments, and provide data support for product optimization.
  • User Experience Optimization: Enhance trading experience and performance, optimize trading routes, reduce gas fees, and improve transaction success rates.
  • Compliance & Security Management: Work with legal and security teams to ensure product compliance and safeguard the security of smart contracts and on-chain interactions.
  • Data-Driven Decision Making: Continuously optimize the product based on data analysis and user feedback to boost user activity and trading volume.


What you'll need


  • Experience: Bachelor’s degree or above, 3+ years of relevant experience in internet or blockchain product management; product design experience in Swap or trading platforms is preferred.
  • Industry Knowledge: Deep understanding of blockchain, DeFi, and DEX, and familiarity with AMM, limit orders, liquidity pools, and related mechanisms.
  • Data Analysis Skills: Proficient with common data analysis tools and methods, with a data-driven approach to product decision-making.
  • Communication & Project Management: Excellent communication, organizational, and cross-team collaboration skills, able to efficiently drive project execution.
  • Innovation & Learning: Strong interest and learning ability in the Web3 field, with attention to the latest industry trends and technology; able to deeply study and use relevant products and optimize the user experience from a user perspective.


岗位职责


  • 产品规划与设计：负责链上交易产品（Swap业务线）的规划与功能设计，明确产品路线图和迭代计划；
  • 需求分析与管理：深入分析市场需求、用户行为和竞争环境，挖掘用户痛点并转化为具体产品需求；
  • 跨部门协作：协调研发、设计、测试及运营团队，确保产品功能按时交付，推动产品高质量上线；
  • 市场调研与竞品分析：持续关注Web3行业和DeFi市场趋势，定期分析竞品动态，为产品优化提供数据支持；
  • 用户体验优化：提升交易体验与性能，优化交易路径，降低Gas费用，提高交易成功率；
  • 合规与安全性管理：与法务及安全团队合作，确保产品满足合规要求，同时保障智能合约和链上交互的安全性；
  • 数据驱动决策：基于数据分析和用户反馈，持续优化产品，提升用户活跃度和交易量。


任职要求


  • 经验要求：本科及以上学历，3年以上互联网或区块链相关产品经验，有Swap或交易平台产品设计经验者优先；
  • 行业理解：对区块链、DeFi、DEX等领域有深入理解，熟悉AMM、限价单、流动性池等机制；
  • 数据分析能力：熟悉常用数据分析工具和方法，具备数据驱动的产品决策能力；
  • 沟通与项目管理能力：具备优秀的沟通、组织和跨团队协作能力，能高效推动项目执行；
  • 创新与学习能力：对Web3领域保持强烈的兴趣和学习能力，关注行业最新发展趋势和技术动态；深入研究和使用相关产品，并从用户角度优化体验。



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Marketing Manager
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • Scout brand cooperation opportunities, develop and implement brand coop strategy, including list of potentials and develop network connections in Crypto field;
  • Cooperate with the brand department and write PR releases to enhance local brand influence;
  • Create online and offline marketing activities and collaborate with Brand Communication, Brand Experience for execution to bring user growth;
  • Have good collaboration with influencers, invite them to participate in social activities or produce user educational content;
  • Use local holidays as attractions to assist the operation department in carrying out exclusive activities and increase user registrations.


What you'll need


  • 3-5 years of experience in marketing and at least 2 years of experience in Crypto ;
  • External cooperation resources suitable for work development;
  • Excellent communication skills and strong knowledge of various marketing and analytics tools;
  • Outstanding writing skills, including PR manuscripts and social media copywriting;
  • Keen market insight, hot spot capturing ability, etc.
  • Russian& English Language
  • Willingness to travel.


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.
