jobs.title: Business Development Manager, Latam
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • Represent Bitget in front of influencers and KOLs.
  • Create, grow and maintain channels for different KOLs in different countries.
  • Support local teams in events, marketing activities and webinars.
  • Self Driven to take ownership of his role


What you'll need


  • Bachelor’s degree or higher in Business, or related discipline.
  • Minimum 2years of experience in SALE management - preferably in tech, fintech, or financial services.
  • Familiarity with crypto, blockchain, or virtual asset regulations is a strong advantage.
  • Self-starter with the ability to work independently and take ownership of designated areas.
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to work across all levels of the organization.
  • Adaptable, resourceful, and comfortable navigating ambiguity in a dynamic environment.


Why Bitget?

jobs.title: Institutional Business Development Manager , Asia
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • Target market and customer identification: Focus on identifying and contacting potential market makers, brokers and other customer groups who use API as their main trading tool, understand their business needs, and establish and maintain long-term cooperative relationships.
  • Business negotiation and cooperation promotion: Lead the business negotiation process to ensure that cooperation terms are fair and reasonable, effectively promote the conclusion of cooperation agreements, and enhance customer satisfaction and loyalty.
  • Market insights and strategy formulation: Continuously track and analyze the dynamics of the API trading market, competitor strategies and changes in customer needs, and provide data support and suggestions for the company's product iterations and market strategies.
  • Customer support and relationship maintenance: Provide technical support and business consultation to customers in the process of using APIs, solve customer problems, enhance customer stickiness, and promote continued business growth.
  • Performance achievement and team contribution: Set and achieve personal and team business development goals, including but not limited to key performance indicators such as the number of new customers and API transaction volume growth.


What you'll need


  • Educational background: Bachelor degree or above, finance, computer, information technology, marketing and other related majors are preferred.
  • Work experience: At least 3 years of relevant work experience in BD/sales in financial institutions, Internet companies or blockchain industries. Applicants with successful cases of connecting with API customers such as market makers and brokers will be given priority.
  • Professional knowledge: Familiar with the cryptocurrency market, understand basic concepts such as API trading systems, high-frequency trading, quantitative trading, etc., and have a certain understanding of blockchain technology. Have basic IT knowledge and be able to understand technical details such as API interfaces and data transmission to facilitate effective communication with customers.
  • Communication skills: Have excellent business negotiation and interpersonal skills, and be able to accurately grasp customer needs and provide solutions that meet their business needs.
  • Market acumen: Highly sensitive to market trends and industry dynamics, able to quickly adapt to market changes and formulate effective market strategies.
  • Teamwork and leadership: Have a strong sense of responsibility and teamwork spirit, be able to work efficiently in a fast-paced, high-pressure environment, and have certain team leadership skills.
  • Language ability: Fluent communication skills in Chinese and English, able to communicate with international partners without barriers. Bonus points for those with other language skills.


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: BGW Backend DEX Engineer 资深后端DEX工程师
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget Wallet is the non-custodial crypto wallet designed to make crypto simple and secure for everyone. With over 80 million users, we bring together a full suite of crypto services, including swaps, market insights, staking, rewards, DApp exploration, and payment solutions. Supporting 130+ blockchains and millions of tokens, Bitget Wallet enables seamless multi-chain trading across hundreds of DEXs and cross-chain bridges. Backed by a $300+ million user protection fund, it ensures the highest level of security for users' assets.


What you'll do


  • Design and develop the core backend modules of our DEX, including:• Swap (AMM) matching, single-chain & cross-chain transactions, and limit-order matching engine• In-house aggregator for routing, quotation, and optimal path computation
  • Help architect and implement backend services that meet high-availability, high-concurrency, and high-scalability standards.
  • Integrate deeply with EVM/Solana smart contracts: build on-chain interaction logic, listen to and parse on-chain events, and ensure data consistency between on-chain and off-chain systems.
  • Optimize the performance and security of the trading pipeline; continuously monitor and improve TPS, latency, fault tolerance, and risk-control capability.
  • Collaborate closely with product, frontend, smart-contract, and DevOps teams to drive rapid iteration and deliver high-quality products.
  • Participate in code reviews, technical sharing, documentation, and best-practice development to raise overall team productivity and technical standards.  


What you'll need


  • Bachelor’s degree or above in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field.
  • 3+ years of backend development experience, with 1+ years of hands-on Golang; familiar with Gin, gRPC, Etcd, etc.
  • At least one project involving Dapp or smart-contract interaction on EVM or Solana; deep understanding of contract invocation, transaction lifecycle, nonce & gas mechanisms.
  • Solid knowledge of AMM principles (e.g., Uniswap v2/v3, Curve, Balancer) and common aggregator path-optimization algorithms.
  • Proficient in backend fundamentals such as microservices, message queues, caching, and databases:• Middleware: Redis/Memcache, Kafka/RabbitMQ• Databases: MySQL/PostgreSQL plus at least one NoSQL (MongoDB/ClickHouse, etc.)• Container & DevOps: Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD
  • Strong grasp of data structures, algorithms, and concurrent programming; able to diagnose performance bottlenecks in high-concurrency scenarios independently.
  • Excellent system design, documentation, communication, and self-learning skills.  


岗位职责：


  • 负责 DEX 业务核心功能的后端设计与开发，包括：• Swap（AMM）撮合、单链与跨链交易、限价单撮合引擎• 自研聚合器路由、报价与最优路径计算
  • 参与后台服务架构设计与落地，按高可用、高并发、高扩展的标准实现系统组件。
  • 深度对接 EVM/Solana 链上合约，编写链上交互逻辑、监听与解析链上事件，保证链上链下数据一致性。
  • 负责交易流程的性能与安全优化，持续监控并提升 TPS、延迟、容错与风控能力。
  • 与产品、前端、合约、运维等团队紧密协作，推动需求快速迭代并交付高质量产品。
  • 参与代码评审、技术分享，沉淀文档与规范，提升团队整体研发效率与技术水平。


任职要求：


  • 计算机、软件工程及相关专业，本科及以上学历。
  • 3 年以上后端开发经验，1 年以上 Golang 实战经验；熟悉 Gin、gRPC、Etcd 等生态。
  • 至少 1 项基于 EVM 或 Solana 的 Dapp/合约交互项目经验，对链上合约调用、交易生命周期、Nonce & Gas 机制等有深入理解。
  • 熟悉 AMM 原理（如 Uniswap v2/v3、Curve、Balancer 等）及常见聚合器路径优化算法。
  • 熟练掌握微服务、消息队列、缓存、数据库等后端基础技术：• 中间件：Redis/Memcache、Kafka/RabbitMQ• 数据库：MySQL/PostgreSQL，至少一种 NoSQL （MongoDB/ClickHouse 等）• 容器与 DevOps：Docker、Kubernetes、CI/CD
  • 扎实的数据结构、算法与并发编程能力，能够独立定位高并发场景下的性能瓶颈。
  • 良好的系统设计、文档编写、沟通协作与自驱学习能力。


加分项：


  • 参与过 DEX Swap、聚合器、限价单或跨链桥产品的设计与开发。
  • 了解 LayerZero、Wormhole、Cosmos-IBC 等跨链协议或轻客户端机制。
  • 熟悉 MEV、交易排序策略、Tenderly 模拟器使用经验。
  • 具备 Node.js/TypeScript 实战经验，可维护历史服务或编写工具链。
  • 具备区块链安全或监控报警系统的建设经验。
  • 有过组合数学优化经验，包括不限于图算法、线性规划、整数规划等
  • 有过ACM竞赛经验并且有成绩。



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

Identify and build relationships with local KOLs/influencers/communities, projects and other potential partners to promote Bitget in the local market in order to achieve user growth and trading volume growth.

Be responsible for the execution and performance of KOL marketing strategy, track and analyze channel cooperation results and make adjustments to ensure optimal performance and maximum ROI.
Keep abreast of local industry developments trends and competitor movements and strategize corresponding actions.

What you'll do

University graduate, background in business development or marketing in Crypto/Fintech industry is a must.
Excellent interpersonal and relationship building skills .
In-depth knowledge of affiliate marketing in the industry.
Good verbal and written communication skills .
Passionate about the cryptocurrency industry.
Able to use English or DACH as a work language .
Work well under pressure, strong in execution.
a dynamic environment.

Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges

jobs.title: BGW Backend Architecture Engineer 架构组后端研发工程师
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget Wallet is the non-custodial crypto wallet designed to make crypto simple and secure for everyone. With over 80 million users, we bring together a full suite of crypto services, including swaps, market insights, staking, rewards, DApp exploration, and payment solutions. Supporting 130+ blockchains and millions of tokens, Bitget Wallet enables seamless multi-chain trading across hundreds of DEXs and cross-chain bridges. Backed by a $300+ million user protection fund, it ensures the highest level of security for users' assets.


What you'll do


  • Continuously develop and upgrade core infrastructure services (such as API gateways, service discovery, load balancing, etc.), ensuring system stability and scalability
  • Provide high-availability, high-concurrency, and low-latency technical solutions for various company activities and business scenarios, supporting rapid business iteration
  • Build and maintain company-level technical infrastructure, including common development tools, code libraries, and middleware to improve development efficiency
  • Establish technical standards and specifications, drive technical implementation, and ensure code quality and system performance
  • Promote development efficiency improvements, optimize development processes, and drive cost optimization and resource utilization at the technical level
  • Participate in solving technical challenges, address system bottlenecks, and provide innovative solutions
  • Guide team members in technical skill improvement, organize technical sharing sessions and knowledge transfer


What you'll need


  • Bachelor's degree or above in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related fields
  • At least 5 years of backend development experience, with 3+ years of Golang development experience, having served in technical expert or architect positions
  • Practical experience in building high-concurrency systems and deep understanding of microservice architecture
  • Proficiency in distributed system design principles, familiar with common system architecture patterns and best practices
  • Rich practical experience in cache design, database performance optimization, message queues, and other middleware
  • Excellent communication skills and team collaboration spirit, capable of driving technical requirements across teams
  • Strong problem analysis and solving abilities, capable of independently handling complex technical challenges


岗位职责：


  • 持续开发升级架构组基础服务(例如API网关、服务注册发现、负载均衡等)，确保系统稳定性和可扩展性
  • 为公司各种活动和业务场景提供高可用、高并发、低延迟的技术方案，支持业务快速迭代
  • 持续建设公司级别技术基建，包括公共开发工具、代码工具包、中间件等，提升研发效率
  • 建立技术标准与规范，推动技术落地，确保代码质量和系统性能
  • 推动研发效能提升，优化开发流程，推动技术层面的成本优化和资源利用率提升
  • 参与技术难题攻关，解决系统瓶颈问题，提供创新性解决方案
  • 指导团队成员进行技术能力提升，组织技术分享和知识传递


任职要求：


  • 学士学位及以上学历，专业为计算机科学、软件工程或相关领域
  • 至少5年以上的后端开发经验，3年以上Golang开发经验，曾担任技术专家或架构师职位
  • 有实际的高并发系统建设经验，对微服务架构有深入的理解和实践
  • 精通分布式系统设计原则，熟悉常见的系统架构模式和最佳实践
  • 对缓存设计、数据库性能优化、消息队列等中间件有丰富的实践经验
  • 具备良好的沟通能力和团队协作精神，能够跨团队推动技术需求的全面落地
  • 具有较强的问题分析和解决能力，能够独立处理复杂技术挑战


加分项：


  • 具备Node.js开发经验，能够灵活运用不同技术栈进行协同开发
  • 掌握Web3基础知识，对区块链技术有深入理解，特别是对DeFi和Swap相关知识有实践经验
  • 有大型互联网公司或金融科技公司的工作经验
  • 有开源项目贡献经验或技术社区影响力
  • 熟悉安全开发实践，对系统安全有深刻理解



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Web3 Junior Engineer 技术研发工程师 (Fresh Graduate is Welcome)
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget Wallet is the non-custodial crypto wallet designed to make crypto simple and secure for everyone. With over 80 million users, we bring together a full suite of crypto services, including swaps, market insights, staking, rewards, DApp exploration, and payment solutions. Supporting 130+ blockchains and millions of tokens, Bitget Wallet enables seamless multi-chain trading across hundreds of DEXs and cross-chain bridges. Backed by a $300+ million user protection fund, it ensures the highest level of security for users' assets.


What you'll do


  • Backend: Build on-chain service middleware, such as transaction processing, account management, on-chain data indexing, risk control, etc.
  • Frontend: Responsible for DApp web interface development, implementing user features such as on-chain asset management and trading interactions.
  • App: Develop multi-chain mobile wallet applications, supporting capabilities like account management, transactions, and push notifications.
  • Smart Contract: Design and develop smart contracts in Solidity / Move / Rust, covering core logic such as authorization, swap, and payment, ensuring contract security and upgradability.
  • Support mainstream blockchain ecosystems (such as Ethereum, Solana, Polygon, BSC, etc.)
  • Drive the implementation of multi-chain wallets in key scenarios such as on-chain trading, asset security, and gas optimization
  • Collaborate with teams including Product, Design, Security, and On-chain Infrastructure to continuously iterate and optimize products


What you'll need


  • Bachelor’s degree or above in Computer Science or related fields; degrees from 985/211 universities are preferred
  • Solid computer science fundamentals, including algorithms, data structures, networks, and operating systems
  • Proficient in at least one of the following development skill directions:
  • Backend: Familiar with Golang/Rust/Node.js, understanding of microservice architecture; experience with on-chain interaction is a plus
  • Frontend: Familiar with frameworks such as React/Vue, and on-chain tools such as Web3.js/Ethers.js
  • App: Proficient in React Native/Flutter/Swift/Kotlin technology stacks, understanding of wallet-side on-chain interaction mechanisms
  • Smart Contract: Skilled in Solidity/Move/Rust, familiar with EVM or Solana contract deployment and security models
  • Understanding of account models, transaction processes, signature mechanisms, and gas mechanisms in mainstream blockchains (e.g., EVM/Solana)
  • Knowledge of wallet fundamentals, such as mnemonic management, transaction construction and broadcasting, and private key security


岗位职责


  • 后端方向：构建链上服务中台，如交易处理、账户管理、链上数据索引、风险风控等
  • 前端方向：负责 DApp Web 界面开发，实现链上资产管理、交易交互等用户功能
  • 客户端方向：开发多链移动端钱包应用，支持账户管理、交易、Push 通知等能力
  • 智能合约方向：设计并开发 Solidity / Move / Rust 智能合约，涵盖授权、Swap、支付等核心逻辑，保障合约安全与可升级性
  • 支持主流区块链生态（如 Ethereum、Solana、Polygon、BSC 等）
  • 推动多链钱包在链上交易、资产安全、Gas 优化等关键场景的落地
  • 与产品、设计、安全、链上基础设施等团队协作，持续迭代优化


任职要求


  • 计算机或相关专业本科及以上学历，985 / 211 院校优先
  • 扎实的计算机基础，包括算法、数据结构、网络、操作系统等
  • 熟练掌握以下至少一个方向的开发技能：
  • 后端：熟悉 Golang / Rust / Node.js，了解微服务架构，具备链上交互经验者优先
  • 前端：熟悉 React / Vue 等框架，了解 Web3.js / Ethers.js 等链上工具
  • 客户端：掌握 React Native / Flutter / Swift / Kotlin 等技术栈，了解钱包端链上交互机制
  • 智能合约：掌握 Solidity / Move / Rust，熟悉 EVM 或 Solana 合约部署及安全模型
  • 理解主流区块链（如 EVM / Solana）的账户模型、交易流程、签名机制、Gas 机制等
  • 了解钱包基本原理，如助记词管理、交易构造与广播、私钥安全等


加分项


  • 参与过 Web3 黑客松、开源项目或链上项目实践经验者优先
  • 有 Web3 实习经验（如钱包、DeFi、NFT、基础设施方向）者优先
  • 熟悉智能合约安全审计相关知识，了解常见漏洞与防御方式
  • 掌握AI开发实践，可以快速通过AI来构建雏形系统以及持续通过AI来优化系统
  • 了解 L2 扩容、跨链桥、Account Abstraction、Paymaster 等前沿协议与工具
  • 有链上用户交互体验优化、交易成本优化、Gas 费估算等相关经验者优先



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.﻿

jobs.title: Operations Manager 运营经理
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • 主要从事全球范围内的交易所渠道拓展，如KOL、社区节点等。
  • 结合平台拉新工具，设计渠道运营活动，进行用户拉新和交易转化。
  • 分析渠道留存和交易数据，筛选优质渠道、淘汰劣质渠道，提升渠道健康度。
  • 通过渠道和节点辅助平台相关内容分发。


What you'll need


  • 本科及以上学历
  • 有竞品公司（Web3、交易或金融/银行/支付行业）相同职位经验者优先。
  • 能够在压力下高效工作。
  • 具备良好的沟通与团队协作能力，能够跨部门高效合作。
  • 熟练使用英语和普通话进行工作交流。


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Product Marketing & Operation Manager
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


About the role


We are seeking an experienced and driven Product Marketing Manager to lead our new product launches. This role requires a comprehensive understanding of product objectives, target audiences, and unique selling points, as well as the ability to define and achieve launch objectives. The ideal candidate will develop strategic go-to-market (GTM) proposals, manage multi-channel assets, and coordinate delivery across multiple regions. Proficiency in both English and Chinese is crucial for successfully engaging diverse markets.


What you'll do


  • GTM Strategy Development & Execution:
  • Craft and implement strategic marketing plans tailored to new product launches.
  • Develop a deep understanding of product objectives, target audience attributes, and unique selling propositions to inform marketing strategies.
  • Develop GTM proposals that align with launch objectives and drive market penetration.
  • Identify and leverage suitable marketing channels, including social media, PR, influencer partnerships, and events, to enhance product visibility.
  • Comprehensive Campaign Management:
  • Design, oversee, and execute end-to-end marketing campaigns aimed at new product engagement.
  • Manage asset creation, content distribution, and community interaction across multiple platforms.
  • Utilize data analytics to track campaign performance and refine strategies for optimal results.
  • Brand Consistency & Storytelling:
  • Maintain consistency in brand messaging across all marketing materials and initiatives.
  • Develop compelling content strategies that highlight product narratives and value propositions.
  • Coordinate Data Collection and Performance Analysis:
  • Organize and oversee data collection processes to ensure accurate and relevant insights.
  • Provide regular reports with data-driven insights to optimize future product launch



What you'll need


  • Experience: 7+ years in product marketing with a focus on new product launches, experience in creative agency is a plus
  • Languages: Proficiency in both English and Chinese.
  • Skills: Strong capability in multitasking, excellent communication skills for cross-regional team collaboration, and the ability to effectively manage stakeholders.
  • Industry Knowledge: Familiarity with the crypto industry or fintech industry is a plus.
  • Mindset: Strategic thinker with a detail-oriented and proactive approach, capable of executing hands-on tasks to drive market success.



Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges
  • We are a global company with staff members from over 50 different countries and regions
  • We are growing and looking for world-class ambitious talents to help us continue this journey
  • We have a streamlined structure that empowers employees to work efficiently, delivering the best results in a short timeframe
  • We offer competitive salaries and benefits
  • Blockchain technology and digital assets have the potential to change finance in a way no other technology can - be part of it!



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.

jobs.title: Business Analyst
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget is one of the world's leading digital assets ecosystems. With over 120 million registered users, Bitget has one of the most comprehensive suites of blockchain products and services available via bitget.com.


Our mission is to support the growth of the digital assets industry and we believe it represents the future of finance. What we do empowers the future of finance by ensuring secure, efficient and smart digital transactions.


We are one of the fastest growing companies in the digital asset sector. If you are looking for cutting-edge work, where you will have opportunities to develop your career among peers who are experts in their field, and you believe in the future of digital currency, then look no further than Bitget!


What you'll do


  • Conduct targeted analysis of internal and external data to help business leaders gain clear insights into the business, market, and competitors, providing business decision support for business leaders and management teams.
  • Develop and iterate on business operations monitoring frameworks; conduct regular business reviews to accurately and promptly identify key business issues and perform root cause analysis, providing strategic recommendations for operational improvement.
  • Deeply participate in key ongoing business projects, conducting in-depth analysis on specific issues and opportunities through dedicated initiatives, and drive collaboration with business departments to formulate actionable and implementable solutions.
  • Analyze and validate business opportunities, quantifying their potential impact and value; follow up on the execution of business strategies and evaluate their effectiveness.


What you'll need


  • Over 3 years of relevant experience in business analysis, with a strong understanding of common business analysis methodologies.
  • Excellent logical thinking skills, adept at research and analysis, with the ability to systematically think through and analyze problems, coupled with strong report presentation abilities.
  • Proficient in systematic thinking from a holistic/big-picture perspective, capable of analyzing and understanding the business as a whole. Experience in providing end-to-end (closed-loop) support for individual business units is preferred.
  • Possess strong communication, learning, and teamwork skills, demonstrating a strategic mindset and the ability to influence.
  • Bachelor's degree or above; a major in Statistics, Business Management, or related fields is preferred.
  • Fluent in English with proficient communication skills.


Why Bitget?


  • Bitget is the world's leading web 3 platform for copy trading and one of the world's largest and most respected exchanges

jobs.title: BGW Swap Aggregator Backend Engineer 聚合器后端技术工程师
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About us


Bitget Wallet is the non-custodial crypto wallet designed to make crypto simple and secure for everyone. With over 80 million users, we bring together a full suite of crypto services, including swaps, market insights, staking, rewards, DApp exploration, and payment solutions. Supporting 130+ blockchains and millions of tokens, Bitget Wallet enables seamless multi-chain trading across hundreds of DEXs and cross-chain bridges. Backed by a $300+ million user protection fund, it ensures the highest level of security for users' assets.


What you'll do


  • Design and develop the core architecture of the Swap aggregator, optimizing aggregation and order-splitting algorithms.
  • Conduct in-depth research and implement optimal trading path algorithms for cross-chain and on-chain DEXs, ensuring efficient and low-cost trading experiences.
  • Be familiar with major public blockchain ecosystems (such as Ethereum, BSC, Solana, Polygon, etc.), and implement on-chain data parsing and interactions.
  • Design and implement cross-chain asset transfer logic, optimizing on-chain trading performance and security.
  • Build high-concurrency, high-availability backend services to ensure stable operation under heavy trading volumes.
  • Optimize system performance, including latency, throughput, and resource utilization.
  • Continuously track the development trends of Web3, swap aggregators, and blockchain technology, delivering innovative solutions.
  • Explore emerging on-chain technologies to provide a competitive edge for the company’s products.


What you'll need


  • Proficient in Golang with extensive server-side development experience.
  • Deep understanding of swap aggregator architecture and order-splitting algorithms; familiar with aggregator solutions such as 1inch, Uniswap, etc.
  • Skilled in on-chain data parsing and DEX (Decentralized Exchange) algorithms, including AMM and order book models.
  • Familiar with the underlying logic and development tools of major public blockchain ecosystems (such as Ethereum, BSC, Polygon, etc.).
  • Experience in smart contract development or contract interactions; able to quickly analyze on-chain data and trading logic.
  • Extensive experience in designing high-concurrency, high-availability system architecture; proficient in performance optimization and complex system decomposition.
  • Deep understanding of distributed systems, caching technologies, and message queues.
  • Experience working in Web3, blockchain, or fintech industries; familiar with DEX and swap aggregator business logic.
  • Understanding of cryptocurrency market mechanisms, with practical research experience in trading cost and gas optimization.


岗位职责


  • 负责Swap聚合器核心架构的设计与开发，优化聚合与拆单算法。
  • 深入研究并实现跨链与链上DEX的交易路径最优解算法，确保高效、低成本的交易体验。
  • 熟悉各主流公链生态（如Ethereum、BSC、Solana、Polygon等），实现链上数据解析与交互。
  • 设计并实现跨链资产流转逻辑，优化链上交易性能与安全性。
  • 构建高并发、高可用的后端服务，确保服务在高交易量场景下稳定运行。
  • 优化系统性能，包括延迟、吞吐量及资源使用率。
  • 持续跟踪Web3、Swap聚合器及区块链技术发展趋势，输出创新解决方案。
  • 探索新兴链上技术，为公司产品提供竞争优势


任职要求


  • 精通Golang语言，拥有丰富的服务端开发经验。
  • 深入理解Swap聚合器架构及拆单算法，熟悉如1inch、Uniswap等聚合器技术方案。
  • 精通链上数据解析与DEX（去中心化交易所）算法，包括AMM、订单簿等模型。
  • 熟悉主流公链生态系统（如Ethereum、BSC、Polygon等）的底层逻辑及开发工具。
  • 具备合约开发或合约交互经验，能快速分析链上数据及交易逻辑。
  • 丰富的高并发、高可用系统架构设计经验，擅长性能优化及复杂系统拆分。
  • 对分布式系统、缓存技术及消息队列等有深刻理解。
  • 具备Web3、区块链或金融科技行业工作经验，熟悉DEX和Swap聚合器的业务逻辑。
  • 理解加密货币市场运行机制，对交易成本、Gas优化等有实际研究经验。


加分项


  • 熟悉Rust、Solidity等区块链开发语言。
  • 有以下公司 如OKX、1inch、Jupiter、Unizen、Uniswap、0x 相关业务从业经验。
  • 在Swap聚合器算法优化、跨链技术方向有创新性成果。



If you are ambitious and believe that digital assets could be the next financial and technological revolution, please apply!


By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Candidate Privacy Notice.
